faqs.question: Does JECRC University provide 100% placements?
faqs.answer: JECRC University has not released the placement percentage on its offical website. In 2026 placement session, 80 companies visited the campus and presented 1030 offers to the overall Class of 2026 so far.  The overall highest package offered during JECRC University placements 2026 stood at INR 33 LPA, whereas the average package offered to the batch 2026 stood at INR 6.67 LPA.

faqs.question: Are Admissions to BTech at JECRC University entrance based?
faqs.answer: JECRC University is accepting applications for the BTech programmes. Admissions to all courses including BTech are in progress for the year 2025.

faqs.question: Which is more affordable JECRC University and Galgotias University for pursuing BCom?
faqs.answer: While comparing JECRC University and Galgotias University in terms of the fee of studying BA, JECRC University is a more affordable option to opt for a BA programme. The fee for studying the BA course at Galgotias University is INR 2.9 Lacs to INR 3.2 lakh, which is much higher compared to INR 1.6 Lacs - INR 2.3 lakh charged by JECRC University. Therefore, as per the above comparison, JECRC University makes BA a more affordable option than Galgotias University However, it must be noted that the mentioned fee has been taken from the official website and is still subject to change.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes of JECRC University are its BTech, MTech and MBA courses being well sought-out among students for their flexibility when it comes to specialisations as well as the placement opportunities and career growth after graduation.
The JECRC University BTech covers 21+ specialisations with the programme having a focus on skill development and hands-on learning in a variety of technology focused disciplines.
While the JECRC University MBA imparts management techniques covering topics such as Business Analysis, HR, Finance, etc.
Also, the JECRC University MTech allows students to specialise deeper in their chosen field and serves as a fast-track for students who are more suited for research-oriented or wish to undertake more advanced roles whether it be conducting research or developing new tools and products.
Apart from this, the JECRC University Vidhani also features a range of courses offered in distance mode of education through its Directorate of Distance Education. The courses are given in different specialisations, and students can open the university page to learn more about course-specific specialisations. Interested students can check the other popular programmes of JECRC University in this space:

placements.overview:
JECRC University has begun their placement season for the Class of 2026 with 80 companies visiting the campus during the first 100 days of placements, the highest and average packages have been INR 33 LPA and INR 6.67 LPA, respectively. Moreover, 1030 offers have been made to students so far with top recruiters such as HP, Deloitte, Wipro, Capgemini, Hashira, L&T, Nestle, Dabur, Decathlon, Zomato, etc. during the 2026 placements.

While the 2025 placement season saw around 2,230+ placement offers were received by the graduates. Among all the major highlights, the highest package received by the batch was INR 33 LPA. JECRC University Rajasthan hosted 140+ recruiters and recorded 876 students above INR 7 LPA. Around 825 offers were received from FORTUNE 500 Companies and 125 received from Accenture and TCS for BBA, BCA and BCom graduates.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students get substantial industry exposure
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.question: Can I join JECRC University without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The course fee for JECRC University BA programme is INR 90000 for an academic year. For an hons degree students need to pay a total fee of INR 3.6 lakh. The BA course fee is INR 2.7 Lacs for the entire three year course.
faqs.question: What is the course fee for BA at JECRC?

faqs.answer: A:    JECRC University accepts multiple national-level entrance exams, such as CUET-UG, CUET-PG, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc., for admission to specific programmes. JECRC University also offers admission to courses based on the merit of the applicants in the last qualifying exam. The university considers CUET-UG for most of the UG courses, such as BTech, BBA, BCA, BCom, BDes, etc. Aspirants also need to pass a personal interview round for admission to a few courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College life is good, however, the placements are not too good.

review_content.Placements: 10% classmates were placed in office companies, and the rest of them are jobless, doing jobs in BPOs and other fields like sales and marketing. So all average, the placements were not good. I also got my first interview cleared in a sales role, however, they don’t allow us to sit in other internships as one is cleared.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom and infrastructure were good. Labs and libraries were also fine. The canteen was good as well. Sports facilities were good. Medical facilities were also fine, everything was fine.
review_content.Faculty: Examinations were also average. Courses were not provided by the college. semester wise examining were not so hard, however, you will have to study by yourself, as the study material, like books and copies, was not included in the fees and not provided by the college, so be prepared.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college because it gives you an amazing college life.

review_content.Placements: I am a fresher, but as I see my seniors, in comparison to the rest of the colleges, it is far better. The placement statistics are for the batch of 2026. The highest package is INR 33-52 LPA. Average package is INR 6.67-6.8 LPA. As we see, college with this type of college life is crazy.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is average, but rooms are amazing, you get a private room even in a 3-sharing room, as the hostel is like a 3 BHK flat. You have a common room and a common bathroom, and you have full privacy. There are some strict rules in the hostel that are strictly followed. The labs are also well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.

review_content.Placements: Placements in JECRC University are around 90 percent. The highest package was 32 LPA in 2025, the lowest was 2-3 Lakhs, and the average package was 6.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Deloitte, Microsoft, etc. Top roles offered were Data Scientists and software developers (both backend and frontend).
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.

review_content.Placements: I have started my B. Tech in 2024, and at that time the total placements from JECRC University and JECRC Foundation are around 2000 placements. In B. Tech, around 1000 students are placed from JECRC University, and around 75 percent of students from B. Tech got placement. The highest package is 50 LPA, the average is 6 to 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5–4 LPA. There are top recruiting companies like Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Accenture, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro, and the roles offered are software developer, software engineer, data scientist, data science analyst, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: JECRC files pros and cons.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students is 40 to 50 percent who are placed. This year, the highest is, I guess, 33 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HPE and Meta. For internships, the ratio is again low, it's 45 to 50 percent. The top role offered is an employee.
review_content.Infrastructure: I like the infrastructure, it's unique, and you'll definitely feel a friendly environment here. The mess food is good, and the classrooms are also good, kind of like a school vibe, but okay. Wi-Fi works fine, but they can still work on it. Sports facilities are quite good. We have volleyball football, cricket, basketball, tennis, badminton, and pickleball courts.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is good if you are considering a good campus life with decent placements and a good crowd.

review_content.Placements: The placements are good. At par with most private engineering colleges in Rajasthan. Would even say they are better than most private colleges. Companies are ICICI, Tata, HP, and various other top recruiters. The placement record is more than 90 percent.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good, with good classes and all the available facilities one can look for. There is also a very big and recently opened canteen that has a lot of big fast food brands inside with good seating space. The hostels are also good with triple-sharing rooms.

The university adopts a semester system for its BTech programmes to provide systematic learning to the applicants.

course_faqs.question: How is the dissertation in JECRC University MBA?
course_faqs.answer: In the fourth semester, students need to take a specific research project to understand concepts of subject that have been opted in the programme elective. Students are expected to understand emerging market trends and finding solutions to business problems through proper research process. After successfully completing the project, submit the report to the department. After this, they need to undergo Viva-voce before external and internal subject experts to acquire degree in Management.

course_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for JECRC University MBA students?
course_faqs.answer: Hostel fee ranges between INR 1.27 lpa to INR 1.72 lpa. There are three room categories in the hostel, including:AC roomNon-AC three-seated room andNon-AC four-seated roomEach room has a different per annum fee. Hostel fee will be paid in two instalments. Do remember that the hostel will be allotted for only two-years. Students need to pay a one-time registration fee of INR 5,000.

course_faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get a scholarship for MBA programme at JECRC University?
course_faqs.answer: Some of the scholarships offered by JECRC University to its UG and PG programmes:1. Merit based scholarships2. CAT percentile based scholarships: Students with CAT percentile between 40 to 59.99 gets 15 percent scholarship on tuition fees. Students with a CAT percentile of 60 and above can get 20% scholarship on tuition fees.3. Need based scholarships: This scholarship is offered to students from financially weak backgrounds.

Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.

content.Placements: I have started my B. Tech in 2024, and at that time the total placements from JECRC University and JECRC Foundation are around 2000 placements. In B. Tech, around 1000 students are placed from JECRC University, and around 75 percent of students from B. Tech got placement. The highest package is 50 LPA, the average is 6 to 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5–4 LPA. There are top recruiting companies like Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Accenture, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro, and the roles offered are software developer, software engineer, data scientist, data science analyst, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: JECRC files pros and cons.

content.Placements: The percentage of students is 40 to 50 percent who are placed. This year, the highest is, I guess, 33 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HPE and Meta. For internships, the ratio is again low, it's 45 to 50 percent. The top role offered is an employee.
content.Infrastructure: I like the infrastructure, it's unique, and you'll definitely feel a friendly environment here. The mess food is good, and the classrooms are also good, kind of like a school vibe, but okay. Wi-Fi works fine, but they can still work on it. Sports facilities are quite good. We have volleyball football, cricket, basketball, tennis, badminton, and pickleball courts.

faqs.answer: JECRC University admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers BTech, BBA, BSc (Hons), etc. at the UG level. The duration of UG courses range from three to five years. Candidates who have passed Class 12 are eligible to apply for UG courses. The university offers MTech, MBA, MSc (Hons), etc. at the PG level. The duration of PG courses is two years. Candidates who have passed graduation are eligible to apply for PG courses. The mode of application is online for all courses.
faqs.question: How can I apply for JECRC University?

faqs.answer: Total intakes of seats in BTech at JECRC University are 550. The intakes are also based on the performance of candidates in the final qualifying exam. The seat intake varies considering multiple parameters. However, the seat intakes mentioned above are taken from the official website. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.answer: To study MBA from JECRC University students must meet the eligibility of having passed with 60% marks in their UG degree with students who have valid scores from CAT/MAT/XAT of the current session being preferred. The Group Discussion and Personal Interview rounds also decided admissions to JECRC University.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility required to pursue MBA from JECRC University?

paragraphs: JECRC University admission 2026is bothmerit-basedandentrance-based. JECRC University course admission offersmore than 25 coursesat theUG, PG, PhD,PG Diploma, and Certificate programme level through11 schoolsexcluding the Directorate of Executive Education and PhD. The university also offers distance education through theDirectorate of Distance Education. Besides this,JECRC Universityoffers a range of professionalcertificates and diplomacourses through JECRC online.

JECRC admission procedurestarts with filling out an application form for the desired course by applicants. To apply for admission, candidates must ensure that they are meeting the admission requirements set by the university. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university;
Step 1: JECRC University Application Process 2026

The mode of application is online. Candidates must fill out the application form on the university's website. Aspirants applying for a UG or a PG programme need to pay an application fee ofINR 850. The application fee for PhD programmes isINR 1,500.
Step 2: Selection

The university selects candidates for admission to most of the courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. JECRC University also considers scores CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for some of the UG and PG programmes, respectively. The university also accepts JEE Main, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Aspirants also need to further pass a personal interview round for courses such as BAJMC, Integrated Law, BA (Hons), etc.
Step 3: Final Admission
Selected candidates need to report at the campus for document verification. Further, aspirants need to pay theJECRC University feeto confirm their seat.

faqs.answer: It is difficult to say whether getting into JECRC University is tough or easy and will depend on the:Candidate's level of preparationCompetitionAvailable seatsPersonal motivationAs well as a number of other factors that will not be discussed here. faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?

Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

placement_report.college_name: JECRC University Placements 2026: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: JECRC University Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: JECRC University has started the placements for the Class of 2026. In the first 100 days of placement process, 80 companies visited the campus and placed students with good packages. The overall highest package offered during JECRC University placements 2026 stood at INR 33 LPA , whereas the average package offered to the batch 2026 stood at INR 6.67 LPA . The participating recruiters have made 1030 offers so far to the overall Class of 2026. The top recruiters of JECRC University in 2026 include HP, Deloitte, Wipro, Capgemini, Hashira, L&T, Nestle, Dabur, Decathlon, Zomato, etc.

According to the JECRC University NIRF Report 2025, the students of the MBA batch 2024 secured the median salary of INR 4.75 LPA . 246 students of the MBA batch 2024 were placed out of the total 248 graduated students.

hostel.description: The hostel of the university has an on-campus residential facility for students has been very thoughtfully designed and planned. An apartment style -three private, single occupancy rooms open into a common living room equipped with a television set, internet access and a pantry making it a completely independent unit. The hostels are air-conditioned/ Nonair-conditioned, comfortable and conducive for the students to have a productive campus life, providing a perfect setting for academic pursuits.

library.description: The library of the university has a good collection of reference and textbooks and journals of national and international repute is available for the students. The library subscribes to both national and regional newspapers and magazines and journals for the benefit of students and general readers. The library, in addition to the textbook, caters for general reading and has a special section for books and journals for competitive examinations. The students have access to the online e-learning portal for integrated learning including NPTEL.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volley ball Court, Table Tennis, Jacuzzi and spa, Billiards

library.description: The library of the university has a good collection of reference and textbooks and journals of national and international repute is available for the students. The library subscribes to both national and regional newspapers and magazines and journals for the benefit of students and general readers. The library, in addition to the textbook, caters for general reading and has a special section for books and journals for competitive examinations. The students have access to the online e-learning portal for integrated learning including NPTEL.

cafeteria.description: The double storied students' mess next to the hostel complex offers excellent multi-cuisine food to the campus residents. The centrally air-conditioned dining area is supported by the kitchen, mess and cafeteria. The complex also envisages to house convenience stores to meet the daily needs of the residents.

hostel.description: The hostel of the university has an on-campus residential facility for students has been very thoughtfully designed and planned. An apartment style -three private, single occupancy rooms open into a common living room equipped with a television set, internet access and a pantry making it a completely independent unit. The hostels are air-conditioned/ Nonair-conditioned, comfortable and conducive for the students to have a productive campus life, providing a perfect setting for academic pursuits.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volley ball Court, Table Tennis, Jacuzzi and spa, Billiards

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Design Lab, CSET Lab, Digital and Analog Electronics Lab, Control and Robotics Lab, Space Vehicle Mission Planning Lab, Embedded System Lab, Simulator Lab

reviews.review_heading: College life is good, however, the placements are not too good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom and infrastructure were good. Labs and libraries were also fine. The canteen was good as well. Sports facilities were good. Medical facilities were also fine, everything was fine.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college because it gives you an amazing college life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is average, but rooms are amazing, you get a private room even in a 3-sharing room, as the hostel is like a 3 BHK flat. You have a common room and a common bathroom, and you have full privacy. There are some strict rules in the hostel that are strictly followed. The labs are also well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.
reviews.review_text: I am pursuing M.A. B. Tech in Computer Science. There are lots of well-working computer labs with decent Wi-Fi facilities for practice in university, clean and spacious classrooms for theory classes, multiple halls and auditoriums for seminars, and a silent library for studies with access to computers in the library. The hostel is well-structured. The best part about the hostel is that it has personal rooms, a good and proper attendance system, and a gym included in the boys’ hostel. The mess is...

reviews.review_heading: JECRC files pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: I like the infrastructure, it's unique, and you'll definitely feel a friendly environment here. The mess food is good, and the classrooms are also good, kind of like a school vibe, but okay. Wi-Fi works fine, but they can still work on it. Sports facilities are quite good. We have volleyball football, cricket, basketball, tennis, badminton, and pickleball courts.

reviews.review_heading: College is good if you are considering a good campus life with decent placements and a good crowd.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, with good classes and all the available facilities one can look for. There is also a very big and recently opened canteen that has a lot of big fast food brands inside with good seating space. The hostels are also good with triple-sharing rooms.

reviews.review_heading: University life of a student.
reviews.review_text: Labs are air-conditioned, and proper PCs are available for each student. There are two main libraries for books, and students can borrow any book for a 15-day period and then have to return it, otherwise, a fine is to be paid. There's a cafeteria with various outlets that have recently opened, where students can sit and enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and faculty, with a good environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus was very large and far from the main city of Hyderabad, with bad transport facilities to the college. College hostels were messy, and the food was not good. Sports facilities were good. Wi-Fi was present but could not be accessed. Labs and classrooms were good.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is average and usable. There are labs for every specific subject. It has well-furnished classrooms. The library has a lot of books. Faculty members in the hostel are quite nice and help with every problem we face. Food is also good because it is managed by the Stanza Living company. Medical facilities are available for 24 hours. Sports facilities are really good. We have grounds and courts for every game.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Rajasthan and one of the best colleges in India. It is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: The department has high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and access to a central library with good technical resources. Labs are updated regularly. The overall infrastructure is modern and student-friendly. The hostel is decent with clean rooms,  24x7 security, and regular housekeeping. The food quality and canteen are good and hygienic, with multiple food options. The campus has good medical facilities and a health centre. It has a good sports ground for cricket, foot...

reviews.review_heading: Everything works only if you hustle.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus with decent internet speed. Classrooms are good. A library with books specially for law students. Mess food is better than average and managed by a hotel management company called Stanza Living, and it also has a cafeteria. 24/7 medical support with ambulance and dispensary. For sports, it has a football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, volleyball court, basketball court and football turf.

reviews.review_heading: The worst placement in private universities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, in fact hostels are also very good and environment of hostel is also very neat and clean. But the main problem is Wi-Fi. Like in classes you will definitely get the network issue and the faculty doesn't provide you the password of the floor Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with good facilities and amazing events.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained with smart boards and benches with electric circuit with free Wi-Fi throughout the college. Every subject has its dedicated lab like Physics Chemistry and Computer programming. There are around 2 fully functioning libraries with proper facilities consisting of books for specialized courses. Hostel and mess facilities are excellent with a proper menu and air conditioned rooms 3 to 4 students in each room with their own partitioned cubicles.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics - Poor control.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at JECRC University is impressive and student friendly. From spacious classrooms to good campus facilities, everything is well organised. The environment feels positive and supportive for academic purpose. This is a very nice thing of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was the best university for the MCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our campus were among my favourite things. Facility had air conditioning in a number of spaces, including the library and classrooms. Wi-Fi was also available at our college. The hostel boasted first-rate amenities and affordable pricing. The cafeteria was nice, stylish, and affordable.

college_info.college_name: JECRC University

data.description: JECRC University's faculty members serve as the backbone of its academic excellence. The university is striving to become a benchmark for higher learning education and continuously paving its way to achieve academic, professional, cultural, and social enrichment in the lives of individuals and communities. The educators here are not just professors but guides, mentors, and skilled professionals who came up with quality education at the organisation. The faculty members at JECRC University are fully committed to the success of the students with their adoptive teaching techniques, which is a blend of traditional learning with modern methodologies.

college_info.college_name: JECRC University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: JECRC University offers numerous scholarships to meritorious students across various courses based on academic excellence. The university offers these scholarships in the form of fee waivers. JECRC University scholarships include the eligibility criteria of need-based and sports-based scholarships as well.

The university offers a scholarship bifurcating on the basis of UG, PG, BTech and MBA programme students. The eligibility criteria vary on the basis of Class 12 aggregate/ JEE Main percentile, CAT 2024 percentile score and sports achievements (National and International level). faqs.answer: A:    The tuition fee for a two-year MCA course at Graphic Era University ranges between INR 3 lakh - INR INR 3.8 lakh. Although, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and but is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Graphic Era University MCA fees. However, there are some other fee components that also need to pay for both years separately. These are Examination Fee, Library Fee, Insurance Fee (Per Year), Students Welfare Fee, Sports Fee, Online, Students Information, PDP and Transportation Fee.
faqs.question: What is the fees for MCA at Graphic Era University Dehradun?

faqs.answer: A:    Graphic Era University accepts the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) entrance exam scores for admission to BTech. However, admission to the Bachelor of Technology course is based on the candidate's performance in the Joint Entrance Examination Main (JEE Main) examination. To be eligible for admissions, candidates must have passed their Class 12 examination in the Science stream or equivalent with at least 60 percent marks as an aggregate.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Graphic Era University accept for admission to B.Tech?

faqs.answer: A:    Graphic Era Deemed to be University offers a large diversity of courses to students in Management field. Graphic Era University admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as MAT,  NMAT,  XAT,  CAT,  CMAT,  CUET-PG, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.
faqs.question: Can I get into Graphic Era Deemed to be University without CAT?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must complete graduation in relevant discipline with at least 65%-75% aggregate to apply for M.Tech at Graphic Era University (deemed-to-be), Dehradun. Hence, aspirants with 55% in graduation can apply for admission. Candidates must have documents proving their eligibility for verification.
faqs.question: Can I apply for M.Tech with 55% in graduation at Graphic Era University, Dehradun?

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it's a good college.

review_content.Placements: Placement record is good. The highest package is 88 LPA so in the aspects of placement it's pretty good. Best placement can be seen in B.Tech courses as they are giving 100% placement guarantee. In comparison with hill it's better. So if we are looking for a college in terms of placement, Graphic Era can be a better option.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average as it only covers 35 acres. But it's quite large. It seems small as the college has a very large number of students, especially in B.Tech courses. The crowd is quite large. Playground is also below average as it's not that big.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Hotel Operations - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: No doubt my college is much better than any other in terms of areas.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students are sent to companies like Hyatt and Jw Marriott. The college has a lot of good connections with the hospitality industry to place its students. In total, around 95 percent of students got placements from the college, which is more helpful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities that students got from the Graphic Era Deemed to be University are much better and match our expectations, as we expected them to be the same. The mess serves quite good quality of food.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MCA at Graphic Era University Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee for a two-year MCA course at Graphic Era University ranges between INR 3 lakh - INR INR 3.8 lakh. Although, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and but is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Graphic Era University MCA fees. However, there are some other fee components that also need to pay for both years separately. These are Examination Fee, Library Fee, Insurance Fee (Per Year), Students Welfare Fee, Sports Fee, Online, Students Information, PDP and Transportation Fee.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total fee for Graphic Era University BSc course?
overview_faqs.answer: There are multiple components included in the Graphic Era University BSc fees, such as hostel fee, tuition fee, security deposit, etc. The fee components are refundable, one-time payable, or annually/semesterly. Tuition fees for Graphic Era University BSc and BSc (H) courses range between INR 2.82 Lacs and INR 10.6 lakh. It must be noted that the given fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is it good to pursue MBA from Graphic Era University?
overview_faqs.answer: Graphic Era University aims to have the same brand recognition as top-tier institutions, therefore, graduates can achieve career success with hard work and determination. MBA IMPACT can be a great choice for those seeking a quality education and career growth opportunities. Placements: About 80-85% of student got placement in my course. The highest package offered is 16 LPA, the average package offered is 5 LPA and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our course are HDFC, Jaro education, Square Yards and many more.

review_summary.college_name: Graphic Era University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has amazing management. There are placement issues for BCA.

content.Placements: Around 60 percent of students get placed, and the remaining students opt for MCA or higher studies. The highest package offered is 8 LPA from BCA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package offered is around 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. There are not many internship opportunities on campus. The top roles offered are senior software developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Graphic Era Deemed to be University has great facilities of labs and the library. Computers in the lab are in very good condition. There are many labs for practice and a huge library in different blocks. Classrooms are amazing. It provides a smart board in each class. The hostel is a little costly but gives amazing infrastructure and services. The food is pretty good. It has space for both indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Operation Theatre - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the university. It has a great environment and a great hospital.

content.Placements: Around seventy percent of students got placed in the top companies. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. Top role offered in this course is to become an operating theatre technician in the hospital. It is a paramedical course which is a great choice.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is great. I love the information about the graphics its great infrastructure, health care, and living. The food is provided. It has many canteens which provide great taste. It has all the departments. There is a big ground, and it provides a lot of fun.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a good college.

content.Placements: Placement record is good. The highest package is 88 LPA so in the aspects of placement it's pretty good. Best placement can be seen in B.Tech courses as they are giving 100% placement guarantee. In comparison with hill it's better. So if we are looking for a college in terms of placement, Graphic Era can be a better option.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average as it only covers 35 acres. But it's quite large. It seems small as the college has a very large number of students, especially in B.Tech courses. The crowd is quite large. Playground is also below average as it's not that big.

individual_reviews.course: Certificate in Hotel Operations - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: No doubt my college is much better than any other in terms of areas.

content.Placements: Most of the students are sent to companies like Hyatt and Jw Marriott. The college has a lot of good connections with the hospitality industry to place its students. In total, around 95 percent of students got placements from the college, which is more helpful.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities that students got from the Graphic Era Deemed to be University are much better and match our expectations, as we expected them to be the same. The mess serves quite good quality of food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is for those students who are more active in events and fests.

content.Placements: I don't think placements here are good. 70-80 percent of students get placed in my course, as per my knowledge, but packages are not that high. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 2-4 LPA. Around 60 percent of students got internships in the B.Sc. nursing course. ICU nurse and nurse manager are the top roles offered there.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. The librarian and the library are also very large. Wi-Fi facilities are also available in the library. Classrooms could be more furnished, but they are good. The mess and canteen are also decent. There are medical facilities. Hostels are a little bit expensive.

admission_overview.title: Graphic Era University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Graphic Era University (Deemed-to-be), Dehradun admissions are open for various courses. The University offers various UG and PG courses in the streams of Management, Science, Commerce, Engineering, Computer Applications, etc. Moreover, Graphic Era University has a flagship course in Management, i.e., MBA Impact. Graphic Era University admission 2026 are entirely based on both their merit scores in the previous qualifying exams and state/national-level entrance exams for the respective courses. paragraphs: Graphic Era University admissionsare open for all courses. Candidates can appear for GECET or provide a score in accepted entrance exam for admission. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
1: Graphic EraApplication Process 2026

The Graphic Era University admission process starts with filling the application process in online or offline mode for the respective courses. Candidates who are interested in getting admission to any of the UG & PG courses can apply on the university's official website. The application fees is INR 1,500 for a course.
2: Selection Rounds

The selection to most of the UG & PG courses at the Graphic Era University is merit-based. Candidates are selected based on their merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants can also get admission based on their national or university-level entrance exam scores in MBA and MDes programmes. The university also conducts an in-house entrance-cum-scholarship test -GECETfor UG and PG courses. Selected candidates also need to come for a personal interview round for admission to some courses such as MBA, MDes, etc.
3: Admission Confirmation

The selected candidates will be notified about the selection via call, email, or post. To confirm admission, candidates must pay theGraphic Era University feesand submit the relevant documents within the stipulated deadline.

placement_data.title: Graphic Era University Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: The Graphic Era University placements for 2026 are still ongoing. So far, the highest package recorded during the 2026 Graphic Era University placement season was INR 60.30 LPA. Several offers ranging between INR 30 LPA to INR 50 LPA have been recorded for BTech CSE students. Some of the major recruiters that participated in the 2026 Graphic Era University placement drive were DE Shaw, Microsoft, Google, Visa, JP Morgan and many more.
Earlier during the 2025 placements, the highest package offered was INR 61.99 LPA. More than 2300 offers were made across various courses like BCom , BTech , MBA , etc.

nirf.description:
Graphic Era University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Graphic Era University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Graphic Era University climbed 7 ranks to #72 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Graphic Era University climbed 4 ranks to #48 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Graphic Era University's rank is #52, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Graphic Era University climbed 7 ranks to #52 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: The college has amazing management. There are placement issues for BCA.
reviews.review_text: Graphic Era Deemed to be University has great facilities of labs and the library. Computers in the lab are in very good condition. There are many labs for practice and a huge library in different blocks. Classrooms are amazing. It provides a smart board in each class. The hostel is a little costly but gives amazing infrastructure and services. The food is pretty good. It has space for both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the university. It has a great environment and a great hospital.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. I love the information about the graphics its great infrastructure, health care, and living. The food is provided. It has many canteens which provide great taste. It has all the departments. There is a big ground, and it provides a lot of fun.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average as it only covers 35 acres. But it's quite large. It seems small as the college has a very large number of students, especially in B.Tech courses. The crowd is quite large. Playground is also below average as it's not that big.

reviews.review_heading: No doubt my college is much better than any other in terms of areas.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities that students got from the Graphic Era Deemed to be University are much better and match our expectations, as we expected them to be the same. The mess serves quite good quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for those students who are more active in events and fests.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. The librarian and the library are also very large. Wi-Fi facilities are also available in the library. Classrooms could be more furnished, but they are good. The mess and canteen are also decent. There are medical facilities. Hostels are a little bit expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, infrastructure, etc, but not satisfied with placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Classes are amazing, and every class has a smart board installed in it. There are many labs inside the campus, which provide better exposure to the practical aspects of the course. There are also many libraries available. The hostel is good, the food is also good and hygienic, and the hostels are disciplined and have high security.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: If I tell you about facilities, it’s average in my department. I’m not telling about other departments. Quality of hostel I don’t know. Quality of food is good. There are 4-5 canteens where food is available. All things were available and good, like sports, games, and medical facilities too.

reviews.review_heading: Graphic Era University review.
reviews.review_text: Every required facility is available, good food and infrastructure of hostels. We enjoy the services provided in our hostel, and along with that, we have great transportation facilities supported by the hostel and the college. It is a great place to get exposure.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review of my B.Tech ECE program.
reviews.review_text: GU central library reportedly holds over 1,74,700 technical books, many periodicals, and journals. It also has a digital library with more than 1,200 general reading rooms with 300-seat capacity, a book bank, and reference or leading facilities. The campus is described as fully Wi-Fi enabled, as wired and wireless internet access is reported to be available 24x7.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent, really good college.
reviews.review_text: Excellent, Graphic Era infrastructure, of course. The hostel was so excellent, and our course and department were so good. Labs, classrooms, library, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games, etc., are all very excellent. Also, the mess of every hostel is so good, and the college provides us with Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Average college life at Graphic Era Deemed to be University. The crowd is lazy and distracted.
reviews.review_text: Most classrooms are outdated, like they were built 10-20 years ago. Wi-Fi is poor. First-year labs are bad. The library is cramped up in the break, and it's difficult to study as there are no power ports available. The quality of hostels is average, and so is the food. Medical facilities are average. Sports events and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive and industry-oriented B.Tech aerospace at GEU.
reviews.review_text: Over 90% of students got placed. The average package is 5.38 LPA, the median package is 7.25 LPA, and the highest is 54.80 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ISRO, Indian Air Force, Tata Advanced Systems, Airbus, DRDO, MRO, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied but could do better.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and library are very good with comfortable seats and good equipment. Wi-Fi is average. For sports, the teams are good. Mess food is average, and canteens are great. Clinic is good for quick check-ups. Hostel facilities are good as they provide necessary things.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. The quality of hostel is good for the students, and the quality of food is also good. They provide different menu everyday for the students. The facilities for sports and medical in my thinking this college is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements, infrastructure, but average faculty.
reviews.review_text: I don't live in the hostel but the infrastructure is good. I have heard from friends the hostels are decent with all time Wi-Fi and water coolers running 24 hours. The classrooms are more than good. The hostel is good, the mess food is decent, the canteen has variety, plus we have medical help, and sports and games facilities.

paragraphs: The tuition fee for a two-year MCA course at Graphic Era University ranges between INR 3 lakh - INR INR 3.8 lakh. Although, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and but is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Graphic Era University MCA fees. However, there are some other fee components that also need to pay for both years separately. These are Examination Fee, Library Fee, Insurance Fee (Per Year), Students Welfare Fee, Sports Fee, Online, Students Information, PDP and Transportation Fee.

There are multiple components included in the Graphic Era University BSc fees, such as hostel fee, tuition fee, security deposit, etc. The fee components are refundable, one-time payable, or annually/semesterly. Tuition fees for Graphic Era University BSc and BSc (H) courses range between INR 2.82 Lacs and INR 10.6 lakh. It must be noted that the given fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

Graphic Era MBA fee for two years range between INR 7.2 lakh - INR 10.3 lakh. This amount is inclusive of the fee for various MBA courses offered at Graphic Era University. These are MBA (General), MBA (Artificial Intelligence & Data Science) and MBA IEV. However, this information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Graphic Era University MBA fees.
Apart from that, some other fee components also need to pay for both years separately. Find them below:

Graphic Era University (Deemed-to-be) offers various merit-based scholarships to its students of UG and PG courses. To avail of the scholarships, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria as per the requirement. A 10% scholarship is offered to Girls candidates on the net tuition fee and a 5% scholarship is available for Wards of Defence Personnel.

college_info.intro:
PES College Bangalore is famous for its flagship BTech, MBA, & BSc courses. Studying these PESU Bangalore flagship programmes at PES University helps to support the professional and personal growth of the students. This is done through a holistic and immersive learning experience. BTech students engage with the corporate sector on a variety of platforms ranging from industry visits, workshops, hackathons, internships, and industry-wide events such as summits, seminars, conferences, and others. BTech Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) is one of the most popularly opted specialisation. Some of the key highlights of this programme are below:
PES University Bangalore MBA is a full-time, 2-year programme, which consists of a core curriculum along with an internship and various elective courses. PES MBA Bangalore is offered in various major specialisations, including Business Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Human Capital, and Operation Management, among others. The PESU Venture Labs, established by the university, funds the business ideas of students, to help them realise their dream of becoming an entrepreneur. Here is more info around PES College Bangalore courses:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

faqs.answer: A:    The University has disclosed the highest salary for the 2025 passing out batch. The PES University highest package for 2025 placements was INR 68 LPA. Additionally, over 1,500 placement offers were made during the drive.

faqs.answer: A:    According to the latest report, the overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 68 LPA. Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. Some of the top recruiters include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    PES University offers PharmD as a 6 year course with an annual intake of 30 students. The University offers the respective course with a total tuition fees worth INR 16.8 Lakh. Admission to PharmD is offered on then basis of valid scores of KCET. Candidates must visit the official website to learn more about the eligibility criteria for the admission to PharmD.
faqs.question: What is the fees for PharmD course at PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    PES Bangalore offers courses at the UG, PG and PhD level across the fields of Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Design, Management and Commerce, Economics and many more, The University offers these courses on the basis of merit and various accepted entrance exams. PES Bangalore fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 20 Lakh. In comparison to other universities, the cost of academia is higher. However, the University various other facilities apart from academia which is worth the cost being paid.
faqs.question: How costly is PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to MCA at PES University, there is minimum eligibility criteria that needs to fulfil before applying for this course. Interested candidates need to pass graduation either with a minimum 50% aggregate in BSc/BCom/BA with Mathematics as one of the subjects at Class 12 or graduation level or in BCA with a minimum 50% aggregate. Final year students can also apply on a provisional basis, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria at the time of admission. The admission to MCA course will be based on PESSAT or PGCET score.
faqs.question: What is the qualification for MCA in PES University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, admission to BTech is entrance-based. Students can take admission to the BTech course of PES University through JEE Main. The university considers JEE Main scores for admission to all the BTech specialisations, including Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and more. The other option for the BTech course admission is to qualify PESSAT or KCET entrance exams. Interested candidates are required to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria before applying for the course as a mandatory step. Check here for detailed admission process for BTech.
faqs.question: Does PES University accept JEE scores?

reviews_list.review_title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

review_content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

review_summary.college_name: PES University Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: A total of 740 in the seniors' batch. Around 540 have been placed, and many have gone for higher studies. The highest package was 60 LPA. The median is around 12-13 LPA, and the lowest is not available. Companies like Zomato, IBM, Google, AWS, etc., come to this college. The top roles include SDE and ML engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.

content.Placements: In electronics and communication the placement was not that good compared to CSE till last year. The placements are decent for ECE but then in the last year there is a slight dip in the placements for CSE. The placement ratio is almost the same as before.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

admission_overview.college_name: PES University Bangalore Admission 2026: Dates, Eligibility and Selection Fee & Application

admission_overview.title: PES University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: PES University admission 2026 is open for UG, PG and PhD programmes. The private university in Bangalore offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations at UG, PG and doctoral levels. programs are offered in the domains of Engineering, Maedicine, Management and Life Sciences. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice. Admission in the university is primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc. for specific courses. In addition, PES University conducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT for UG and PG programmes. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode. requirements of return on investment for the institution's high fee costs are met with competitive placements.

faqs.answer: PES University admission for UG and PG courses are entrance based. Candidates are shortlisted for the interview after PESSAT. faqs.answer: PES Bangalore offers courses at the UG, PG and PhD level across the fields of Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Design, Management and Commerce, Economics and many more, The University offers these courses on the basis of merit and various accepted entrance exams. PES Bangalore fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 20 Lakh. In comparison to other universities, the cost of academia is higher. However, the University various other facilities apart from academia which is worth the cost being paid.
faqs.question: How costly is PES University?

paragraphs: PES University admission 2026is majorly based on entrance scores. It accepts scores of certain entrance exams such as-JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc.PES Universityconducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT. The university offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations atUG, PG and doctoral levels. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice.PES University admissionto UG and PG courses is based on PESSAT score. There are around 27 courses offered in multiple streams at PES. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode.

PES University admission processincludes registration, entrance exam, counselling, etc. Candidates are first required to register for any of the preferred course. Check below, detailed step wise admission process for PES University:
1. Application

Application forms are available online on the official website of the university. There is a application fee of INR 1,200 which needs to be paid for submitting the form.Candidates must also keep the specified documents ready for registration.
2. Slot Booking

After submission of the form, the candidates have to book a slot for the PESSAT exam. This step is valid only for candidates appearing for PESSAT. Once they have booked their slot, an admit card will be issued. Aspirants must download their admit card.
3. Selection Rounds

PES University admission criteria include eligibility and an entrance exam followed by other selection rounds. The criteria vary as per the course. PESSAT conducted by PES University is accepted for admission to all the courses. National or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, KCET, GATE, etc. are required for admission to specific courses. PES conducts an interview round for shortlisted candidates for admission to some courses.
STEP 4: Counselling

The selected candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to payPES University feeto get a seat in the university. Once the fee is paid, candidates can report to the institute.

PES University feesinclude multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. Any refund in fee will be done as per current UGC refund norms only. Affordability is one of the reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. PES University provides admission to MBA through its in-house entrance exam or other national /state-level entrance exams. Candidates need to passbachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregatein the respective subjects to apply forPES University MBAprogramme. faqs.question: What is the fee at PES University for MBA?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for PES University MBA isINR 14 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.The course fee is the amount that students need to pay to confirm their seat after selection rounds. Besides, there is a registration fee that aspirants need to pay in the start. The application fee is INR 1,200 for MBA course. Candidates can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes.

faqs.question: How do you get MBA seats in PES University?
faqs.answer: PES University MBA admission is based on entrance exam score. The university conducts PESSAT for a duration of 180 minutes to shortlisted candidates for MBA programme. Besides, PES also accepts national and state-level Management entrance exams for MBA admission. Follow the below steps to get a seat in MBA programme of PES University:Eligibility:Candidates must complete a bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate to register for MBA admission. Students also get to work as an intern as a part of the course curriculum. Talking about the placement, MBA students have got placed in top companies. faqs.answer: In PES University, fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. courses_data.name: PES University BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: PES University BBAoffers a three-year UG degree. Along with the BBA (General) course, the University also provides courses such as BBA (Business Analytics), BBA (Hospitality & Event Management), BBA (Sports Management), and BBA (Hons). To get admission to the BBA course, students need to qualify for PESSAT followed by an interview.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BBA in PES University?
faqs.answer: Yes, PES University conducts PESSAT for providing admission to BBA course. The university also considers the marks obtained in the qualifying examination for admission. In order to get admission to BBA at PES University, student need to pass Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in the respective subjects as per the minimum eligibility criteria. The final selection is done based on the performance of candidates in the personal interview (PI) round, that is conducted at the university.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA in PES University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for PES University BBA ranges betweenINR 6 lakh and INR 10.4 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.Candidates need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee after completion of the selection rounds. Apart from the programe fee, aspirants also need to pay a registration fee of INR 1,150. Candidates can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BBA at PES University
faqs.answer: Candidates who want to take admission in BBA at PES University must check their eligibility and appear for the university’s in-house entrance exam, i.e., PESSAT. The PESSAT 2025 exam will be conducted online as a computer-based test at the PES University campus and in 44 cities in the country. The university shortlists candidates based on entrance exam scores.PESSAT resultsare released within three days from the day of the test. Aspirants preparing for the university exam, must checkPESSAT exam

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in PES University?
faqs.answer: For getting seats in PES University, the student must satisfy eligibility criteria, give the PESSAT entrance exam, and then provide rank. Once students qualify for the entrance exam, they are short-listed on the basis of available seats and rank for counseling. Counseling will provide them with seats. So, proper application is to be followed and documents should reach the University in the time frame.

faqs.question: Is PES University admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions to the UG and PG programmes conducted at PES University are now open. All applicants have to fill their online application form at the university portal and enroll themselves for entrance tests such as PESSAT or any other entrance test valid throughout the country.

faqs.question: Can I join PES University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: If you qualify the eligibility criteria, then you can get admission to PES University after clearing class 12 and apply for the course you are interested in. Most courses would require to have passed class 12 with a good percentage and apprear in the PESSAT entrace exam. After clearing the entrace exam, you should be able to secure a seat for your preferred course.

faqs.question: Is PESSAT compulsory for PES University?
faqs.answer: Almost all courses in PES University can be admitted to if a student qualifies through PESSAT. It is the only entrance exam that the college looks into and includes for eligibility in their courses. However, in such exceptional cases like direct admission allowed for the high achievers, one may be exempted from the PESSAT process. Therefore, candidates have to clear the PESSAT exam with the prescribed minimum cutoff.

placement_report.college_name: PES University Bangalore Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: PES University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: PES University has released the 2025 placement data. The overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 68 LPA . Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. The top recruiters of PES University in 2025 include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

In addition to offering placement opportunities to the students, the placements wing of the University looks after the training of students on a continuing basis. In 2025, the students received more than 1,250 internship offers from reputed companies like SAP, NVIDIA, Siemens, etc.
PES University Placement Details 2024

tables.context: Is PES University good in terms of placements?

faqs.question: Is PES University good in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: PES University provides good placements to its graduating students. The students are given excellent placement support every year placing them in top companies. Check out the table below to know the key highlights of the PES University placements 2025: Particulars Placement Statistics (2025) No. of Placement Offers 1,500+ No. of Internship Offers 1,250+ the highest Package INR 68 LPA Companies Visited 350+

faqs.question: Is there 100% placement in PES University?
faqs.answer: The University has not released the placement percentage. The total number of offers made has been released for the batch 2025. Morethan 350 companies visited the PES University campus in 2025 and presented over 1,500 job offers to the students.

faqs.question: Which college provides a better median salary for B.Pharma: DIT University - Admission Office or PES University?
faqs.answer: The median salary package offered to the students after finishing B.Pharma from DIT University - Admission Office is INR 750,000. While, the Median package offered by PES University after completion of B.Pharma is INR 730,000. Basis these stats, DIT University - Admission Office is better option compared to PES University on the Median salary parameter.

faqs.question: What are the placement records of PES University?
faqs.answer: According to the latest report, the overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 68 LPA. Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. Some of the top recruiters include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for PES University MBA is INR 14 lakh . This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The course fee is the amount that students need to pay to confirm their seat after selection rounds. Besides, there is a registration fee that aspirants need to pay in the start. The application fee is INR 1,200 for MBA course. Candidates can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes.

description: PES University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

PES University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 656 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 700 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at PES University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 656 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 239, while in 2023, it was 575.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

PES University accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 6056 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 5241, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

nirf.description:
Over the years, PES University has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. PES University's rankings in 'University' category have exhibited stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, PES University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Engineering' category have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, PES University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
