hostel_campus.college_name: PES University Bangalore Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

data: 100 Feet Ring Road, BSK III Stage, Bangalore (Main Campus)
Separate hostels for girls and boys
Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Auditorium, Research centres, Medical services, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

reviews.review_heading: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are quite excellent, including Wi-Fi for all and a specialised library for law. 
The quality of the hostel is also nice, but the food is not so much appreciated in the canteen, and it takes a lot of time to get prepared. 
There are quite a few sports games like football, basketball, badminton, etc. Including the top infrastructure courts for each sport.

reviews.review_heading: Completely worth a one-time investment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

reviews.review_heading: You will experience every feeling in this college, good placements, and good friends.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a fine infrastructure with high-speed Wi-Fi and a well-built library to study with all kinds of books. A well-maintained canteen, well-facilitated sports field, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: PES: The real reason why to join PES.
reviews.review_text: The campus life, infrastructure, and both indoor and outdoor places are really well-maintained and well-equipped. This is one of the attractions at PES, where we get to see a huge block just for indoor sports and other co-scholastic activities. Here at PES, students get to play sports whenever they want, there are separate fields for different outdoor sports. One of the most attractive being is the cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private university, but the fee is too high.
reviews.review_text: For first-year students, the hostel is not on campus, but from the second year, the hostel is on campus. The Wi-Fi in both the college and the hostel is good. Facilities in the college are also good. The food is of good quality and quantity. Everything mentioned above is available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Worthy for course but not for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and aesthetically pleasing. To sit and study we have quite big libraries and Wi-Fi is available but sometimes it is a trouble to connect with them. Moreover, we have a boys hostel inside the college campus and a girl's hostel outside the campus which is contact based and it is taken up by a living space company, for girls hostel which includes food and snacks for the hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with infrastructure and faculty, bit disappoint and concerned about placements.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, our college has the best facilities. They provide us all we need, including a study area. We have four different libraries, including one exclusively for the law department, which has a collection of even rare books. There is also a three-storied central library and an international-level moot court hall. We have courts for basketball, volleyball, badminton, and tennis, with a highly structured gym facility for students. There are six canteens that provide clean foo...

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements, Great Exposure, but Super Difficult Exams.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty much okayish, not so good I would say because I have seen my friends complaining about the hostel food and all, and also they are building a new hostel now. Wi-Fi, sports, and games are always there, but unfortunately, I am not in the hostel, so I don't know what exactly is happening there.

reviews.review_heading: Not what I expected it to be.
reviews.review_text: The college provided good classroom and lab facilities. The hostel rooms are decent compared to other hostels. There are four canteens on the campus, and the quality of the food is good. The campus is clean and huge. We have small stalls for snacks and stationery inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: PES University at Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: PES University is a wide university including a lot of courses. Specialized lecturers are appointed for all the courses. A higher area is allocated for parking and sports courts. The library, with an extensive collection of books by various authors, was arranged in the college library.

reviews.review_heading: Slightly expensive for studies.
reviews.review_text: Students from different places come here to study, but there is no partiality or discrimination among them. The main aim of the college is to showcase the talents and skills of the students and help them succeed in their careers. But I'm not okay with the hostel food, so I would give it four stars.

reviews.review_heading: NammaPesu: An Honest Take.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in our college. We have ample space for parking, playing cricket, football, and pretty much every outdoor sport. We also have 3 cafeterias, as well as a hospital upcoming in our campus itself. There is also a dedicated room for yoga, as well as a gym room.

college_info.college_name: PES University Bangalore

data.description: PES University arranges faculty development programmes and has experienced faculty members. Several worship and seminars are arranged for students and teachers. The university also conducts student exchange programmes and faculty exchange programmes. The faculty at PES University Bangalore are diploma, PhD, and degree holders. The university also invites guest faculty for various lectures and events.

likes.text: There are many top companies like Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Amazon, Z Scalar, Akamai and others coming to our campus for placements.
PES university is one of the best colleges for computer science placement.

review_summary.college_name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students.

content.Placements: JD institute of fashion technology has good placements every year. Around 30–35% of the students gets placed in our course. The average package offered in our course was between 3-6 LPA. The top recruiters at the college were fashion technology and services companies. The top roles offered were fashion designer, marketing, animation, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good-quality facilities and infrastructure for our course. At this college, there are Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, hostels, sports, etc. facilities available on campus. The college canteen offers food at a reasonable price and is good in taste. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A glimpse into academic prowess and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: In our course almost 100% students got placed in many top recruiting companies like Wendell Rodricks and Masaba Gupta etc. The highest package is 35 Lacs per annum and average package is 12 Lacs per annum and the lowest package is 6.8 Lacs per annum. Top roles offered in our course is Fashion illustrator, pattern makes, Fashion buyer Fashion photographer etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is excellent in all aspects like The college has a well-equipped lab that enhance hands on learning. The hostel facilities are commendable providing a secure and comfortable living environment. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is fully hygienic. Trained medical staff ensures promt and efficient healthcare services for students. In our college many sports facility is also available like sports court and big playground.

individual_reviews.title: I am extremely disappointed and dissatisfied with this college, or rather I would rate it 0.

content.Placements: About 49% of the students got placed. They have not offered any salary packages. None of the top recruiting companies visits the campus for placements. The top roles offered are an intern and a junior designer. Almost all students who got internships have searched the companies on themselves.
content.Infrastructure: We have all the facilities just for name-sake. They don't let us use labs they say that they are only for fashion course students but not for interior designing even though we paid for it. So we only have access to classrooms and Wi-Fi. There are no hostel, mess, canteen, sports and games facilities here.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of the teaching quality. The college is not worth the money paid.

content.Placements: Around 40 students were placed in our course. I haven't completed the course, so no such offers have been made. No such offers have been made as the courses are still going on. Internships are not yet offered as the courses are still going on.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, but the library doesn't have enough books to get answers. Wi-Fi provided by the college is bad. Though fees include lab fee yet not much opportunity is given to use the lab. There is no canteen available in the college, and I haven't heard about the medical facilities provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Design and Decoration - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college experience in learning was good.

content.Placements: There are no good placements in our college as such. Students had to find their placements and even internship. Almost 30% of students got placed, but faculty members were good. They were very understanding and helpful. The fee structure is a bit high to afford, but fashion in college has good exposure.
content.Infrastructure: The college is located in a commercial area. There is very good access to good restaurants and cafes near the college. Classrooms are good and equipped with LED television in all classrooms. There is a central air-conditioning facility throughout the college. Labs were good. The exam centre at our college was very helpful.

hostel_campus.college_name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology

labs.description: Available Facilities: Fashion Designing Lab, Interior Designing Lab, Stitching Lab, Jewellery Designing Lab, Photography Lab, Jewellery Metallurgy Lab, Gemmology Lab, Pattern Making Lab, Sewing Lab

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: The college has good-quality facilities and infrastructure for our course. At this college, there are Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, hostels, sports, etc. facilities available on campus. The college canteen offers food at a reasonable price and is good in taste. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: A glimpse into academic prowess and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is excellent in all aspects like The college has a well-equipped lab that enhance hands on learning. The hostel facilities are commendable providing a secure and comfortable living environment. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is fully hygienic. Trained medical staff ensures promt and efficient healthcare services for students. In our college many sports facility is also available like sports court and big playground.

reviews.review_heading: I am extremely disappointed and dissatisfied with this college, or rather I would rate it 0.
reviews.review_text: We have all the facilities just for name-sake. They don't let us use labs they say that they are only for fashion course students but not for interior designing even though we paid for it. So we only have access to classrooms and Wi-Fi. There are no hostel, mess, canteen, sports and games facilities here.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the teaching quality. The college is not worth the money paid.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, but the library doesn't have enough books to get answers. Wi-Fi provided by the college is bad. Though fees include lab fee yet not much opportunity is given to use the lab. There is no canteen available in the college, and I haven't heard about the medical facilities provided.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college experience in learning was good.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a commercial area. There is very good access to good restaurants and cafes near the college. Classrooms are good and equipped with LED television in all classrooms. There is a central air-conditioning facility throughout the college. Labs were good. The exam centre at our college was very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: This institute is good for its placements, experiences, and learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but facilities in the canteen should be improved. Rest all the facilities provided in the college are fine. They use updated machines and equipment. The library and labs are updated with the latest versions. Overall, it has a nice learning environment, and the college is located on Brigade Road.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied as we have the best faculty members and supporting team.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library and classrooms at best. The infrastructure of our college is the best with air conditioners and all other facilities for teachers and students. We have many labs. Sports are also conducted. All the festivals are celebrated with a unique theme. The college provides a Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and I would like to recommend it to others.
reviews.review_text: The college has good library facilities, and it's very spacious. Classrooms are excellent. The college also has CAD labs. There are spacious pattern labs and good sewing labs. The college even has good textile labs. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have been provided with Wi-Fi which has good speed and very important for a designer. The library has all the books which are needful, and all magazines are also there. Classrooms are very neat, and it has smart class access facilities so that the teacher can make us study easily.

reviews.review_heading: A college in which every student will dream about fashion.
reviews.review_text: It has a very well built classroom with facilities that are needed for students. Machines are provided to everyone. Everyone in the class has their dress forms for draping class. I guess it has the best infrastructure until now. It has everything which a student is needed in a fashion classroom.

reviews.review_heading: The college has only a few faculty members due to which students do not receive much attention.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great, but I do feel that we should have a canteen so that students who spend about 8-9 hours in the college can eat on the campus itself without spending much money. The labs and classrooms are also great. Our chairs squeak a little, and those should be replaced. However, that's just a minor issue.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty members and placements, but the infrastructure can be improved.
reviews.review_text: I like the labs present in this college, but the classrooms are pretty small and congested. Our canteen offers very few food items. There is no place for students to enjoy apart from the terrace of the building. The college doesn't provide any medical facilities. There is only one washroom for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great. Classrooms and other facilities provided by the college are appealing. Quality of the labs and library is really good. The college is well-equipped with all modern facilities. The design and stitching labs are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: We need highly experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, stitching labs and textile labs. We have very spacious classrooms. We don't have a canteen, but we have a stall where biscuits and chips are sold. Quality of labs and classrooms is good. Classrooms and labs are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is nice but also has a few drawbacks.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not really great, but it's nice. It has a well-equipped centralised air-conditioning system. It's convenient to avail every facility in the college. The college doesn't have a canteen. Although it has two buildings, the campus is very small. The classrooms are also very small.

college_info.intro:
Amity University Jaipur through the Amity School of Architecture & Planning, Jaipur provides flagship BDes courses to students. Other popular programmes provided by the university are BTech and BSc. Amity University Jaipur Design students are taught Design Fundamentals, the History of Art and Design, and various other relevant subjects. Amity Jaipur Design students can work as Graphic Designers, Interior Designers, or can take up any field relevant to their stream.
Amity University Jaipur BTech students can work in various non-technical fields such as marketing, customer service, sales, and others. Overall, it is one of the top-ranked universities present in India. BTech, BSc, and other course students are placed in top companies such as Amazon, HCL, Airtel, TCS, Infosys, Deloitte, Wipro, and others. Below mentioned are Amity University Jaipur courses and their respective eligibility and Amity University Jaipur fee structure:

review_content.Placements: Actually, every senior from our college gets a placement. That is true, and the minimum LPA is about 5, which is good. At the beginning, companies like Deloitte and other companies, such as Omics, Logice, and Wipro, come for placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available, including Wi-Fi, labs worth 2-3 lakhs, classrooms with projectors, and a library worth visiting. I suggest everyone at least visit the campus, which provides a positive vibe and is worth every bit. There are several programs ongoing.

reviews_list.review_title: Amity University rocks the stage.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students from my course get placements. The package offered in our course starts from a minimum of 30-40,000 to a maximum of 3-4 LPA. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BTech course is based on the score in entrance exam. The mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Applied Psychology (Honurs/ Research) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My Amity University campus and academic review.

content.Placements: Amity generally gets good placement drive participation. Many big recruiters like Amazon, TCS, IBM, Capgemini, etc, visit campus, and for B.Tech 2025. The highest package is 35.9 LPA, while the average is 9.6 LPA, and the median is 6 LPA. That said, placement outcomes vary widely by course branch.
content.Infrastructure: The campus generally offers modern classrooms, good labs and full campus-wide Wi-Fi, which supports academic excellence for technical professional courses. There are well-equipped laboratories and a large, well-stocked library. Hostels are separate for boys and girls, with options like single, double, and triple sharing. There is reasonably good infrastructure for core courses. Labs, library, classroom and campus facilities generally get positive marks in several reviews.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges in Rajasthan for research studies.

content.Placements: 90% placement students got placement in my course. The highest package offered was 20 LPA, the lowest being 4LPA, and the average was 5 LPA. Panacea Pharmaceuticals, Serum Institute, Biocon, etc, are some of the companies that actively recruit students from my course. 100% students got an internship from my course. The top role offered is an Associate Scientist.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at Amity University, Jaipur, are top-notch. The laboratories, classrooms, and daily amenities are all very good. The laboratories are all equipped with the latest research instruments, which are crucial for my course. The hostel facilities are very good, providing basic amenities needed for students. The food is also very good and affordable for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Bioinformatics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is absolutely worth every penny we are paying.

content.Placements: Actually, every senior from our college gets a placement. That is true, and the minimum LPA is about 5, which is good. At the beginning, companies like Deloitte and other companies, such as Omics, Logice, and Wipro, come for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available, including Wi-Fi, labs worth 2-3 lakhs, classrooms with projectors, and a library worth visiting. I suggest everyone at least visit the campus, which provides a positive vibe and is worth every bit. There are several programs ongoing.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Film and Television Production - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Amity University rocks the stage.

content.Placements: 70% of students from my course get placements. The package offered in our course starts from a minimum of 30-40,000 to a maximum of 3-4 LPA. Top companies include T-Series, Zee Studios, Shemaroo, Netflix, and Amazon, etc. 30% of students get internships at Zee Studios. The top roles offered are DOP, editor, director, and copywriter, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have a strong Wi-Fi connection, a folly studio, a recording studio, a computer lab, and well-cleaned, air-conditioned classrooms. We also have library support. The quality of the mess food was very good, and we have 24-hour medical support. We also have several sports and games available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Cyber Security - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is the best university for the M.Sc. in Cyber Security Course.

content.Placements: The average placement rate for this session and the previous one was 90% in the Cyber Security Course. The highest bid was 25 LPA. The average salary was around 15-20 LPA. Top recruiting companies are DevsData LLC, Nexus IT Group, Alta Associates, etc. Top roles offered are Chief Information Security Officer, Security Architect, etc. More students are getting their internships.
content.Infrastructure: University areas, labs, classrooms, sports fields, and cafeterias are all equipped with Wi-Fi. The labs and classrooms are well-equipped with the latest equipment, projectors, mics, and good AC. The food there is good, if not the best, in terms of taste and hygiene. Hostel rooms are spacious and have LAN and Wi-Fi. Initially, the cooling water caused a scarcity of drinking water, but now, slowly, the problem has been solved.

paragraphs: Amity University admissions are merit as well as entrance-based. Check out the complete details for the Amity University admission process 2026 in the following section:
Step 1: Amity University Jaipur Application Process 2026

The admission procedure of Amity University, Jaipur, includes the application form on the university site.In case the applicant is willing to have a combination of two or more programmes, candidates will have to complete a different application form in case of each course, with an application fee of INR 1,500.The new user would have to create user credentials, enter the corresponding information and documents within the online application form and submit it through the Amity Jaipur admission portal.
Step 2: Amity University Jaipur Selection Process

Amity Jaipur does not depend on standardized testing to select its students but uses the required Personal Interview round to determine the performance of potential students in their study at that university.
Step 3: Final Offer Letter

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Amity  University  Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity Jaipur provides direct admission to candidates fufiling the below-mentioned criteria:Candidates must pass Class 12 (CBSE/ ISC/ State Boards) with at least 80% aggregate for direct admission to UG courses. Aspirants eligible for direct admission get exemption from the entrance exam.Aspirants with at least 70 percentile in CAT/ MAT exam are eligible for direct admission to MBA course. Such candidates are exempted from entrance test and can directly come for GDPI round.Direct admission is not applicable on non-MBA course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Amity University, Jaipur for MBA?
faqs.answer: Amity University Jaipur accepts CAT, MAT, GMAT, GRE or Amity Test followed by skype or personal interview. Candidates with at least 70 percentile in CAT/ MAT are eligible for direct admission. Candidates must also complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate. After completion of selection rounds, candidates need to pay MBA fee.

faqs.question: What is the admission criteria of Amity University Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Amity University Jaipur accepts national or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CAT, GATE, etc. to provide admission to specific courses. Amity Jaipur accepts applications to its more than 50 courses via online mode. The courses are available in various streams like Engineering, Management, Science, Arts, etc.Amity University Jaipur admissions is a mix of entrance and merit-based. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses.

placement_data.title: Amity University Jaipur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest and average packages offered during Amity University Jaipur placement 2024 were INR 52.76 LPA and INR 4.84 LPA, respectively . The median package offered was INR 4 LP A . In total 589 recruiters visited the Amity University Jaipur in 2024 and offered jobs to 475 students . The top recruiters of Amity University Jaipur in 2024 included Microsoft , Accenture, Aditya Birla Group, etc.
Earlier, the highest and average packages offered during Amity University Jaipur placement 2023 were INR 47.60 LPA and INR 5.13 LPA, respectively .
Download : Amity University Jaipur Placement Report 2024

faqs.question: What is the MBA fee at Amity University, Jaipur?

hostel.description: Amity University has AC/Non-AC twin sharing/Single accommodation residential apartment suites with an accommodating capacity of more than 3000 students. The hostels are well ventilated and equipped with geyser and water cooler facilities along with common room and sitting lounges in each hostel.
facilities: Well-equipped Conference hall and Seminar hall.
ATM, hostels facility for boys & girls

library.description: Amity University has a well-stocked library with a collection of more than 40,000 text books, 97 Journals and reference books. Divided into Circulation Section and Reference Section, the central library has a special feature - Web OPAC i.e. Online Public Access Catalogue - for members. Some of the popular online resources accessible to Amity students/ faculty are EBSCO titles, Oxford journals, Cambridge University Press publications, Taylor & Francis publications.Students at AUR can also access digital library through Amizone- Amity Intranet Zone which helps them to reach out to EBSCO Host, UGC-Infonet, INDEST-AICTE, IS1 and Delnet.

reviews.review_heading: My Amity University campus and academic review.
reviews.review_text: The campus generally offers modern classrooms, good labs and full campus-wide Wi-Fi, which supports academic excellence for technical professional courses. There are well-equipped laboratories and a large, well-stocked library. Hostels are separate for boys and girls, with options like single, double, and triple sharing. There is reasonably good infrastructure for core courses. Labs, library, classroom and campus facilities generally get positive marks in several reviews.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Rajasthan for research studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at Amity University, Jaipur, are top-notch. The laboratories, classrooms, and daily amenities are all very good. The laboratories are all equipped with the latest research instruments, which are crucial for my course. The hostel facilities are very good, providing basic amenities needed for students. The food is also very good and affordable for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely worth every penny we are paying.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, including Wi-Fi, labs worth 2-3 lakhs, classrooms with projectors, and a library worth visiting. I suggest everyone at least visit the campus, which provides a positive vibe and is worth every bit. There are several programs ongoing.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University rocks the stage.
reviews.review_text: We have a strong Wi-Fi connection, a folly studio, a recording studio, a computer lab, and well-cleaned, air-conditioned classrooms. We also have library support. The quality of the mess food was very good, and we have 24-hour medical support. We also have several sports and games available.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university for the M.Sc. in Cyber Security Course.
reviews.review_text: University areas, labs, classrooms, sports fields, and cafeterias are all equipped with Wi-Fi. The labs and classrooms are well-equipped with the latest equipment, projectors, mics, and good AC. The food there is good, if not the best, in terms of taste and hygiene. Hostel rooms are spacious and have LAN and Wi-Fi. Initially, the cooling water caused a scarcity of drinking water, but now, slowly, the problem has been solved.

reviews.review_heading: Some faculty are good, and some are average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are above average for now. Last semester, there were many instruments that were not available in the lab, and the classroom chairs were broken. Wi-Fi is good, medical facilities are also good, and at the university level, there are many sports clubs that a student can join.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure college in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very organized and beautifully blends with nature. The facilities are also good, like 5G Wi-Fi, lecture rooms with built-in projectors, and an excellent library that provides computers to students for study. Students just have to log in with their user ID.

reviews.review_heading: Till now, the experience is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good. We have proper labs, and there are separate labs for each language. To be honest, the hostel facilities are up to the mark, but the food quality is not up to the mark. So, you can avoid the mess food sometimes. We have multiple outlets, which also provide multiple food.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure here is average not too good but not shabby either. This college has a coupon system so don't fall for a cheap hostel fee, your money gets pretty drained here. The mess food is average too not good but not bad either except some days.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good and the best college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is going well here. Our faculty is friendly and approachable, and the departments have well-equipped labs. The hostels are clean, and the infrastructure of the buildings is very strong. The food quality in the mess and canteen is hygienic, and the medical facilities are excellent. Additionally, sports and games are prioritized and well-supported.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for B.Tech biotech.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are provided inside the hostel. Classrooms are also very nice. They have centralized air conditioning in the class. In hostel, they provide AC and non-AC rooms. Our hostel rooms are average in size. We have Nescafe inside the hostel and vending machines so that we can access snacks and food at night. Classrooms are big and they have projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Amity is a beautiful and sustainable campus.
reviews.review_text: My course provides well-rounded labs with major industrial machines like bioreactors (50L), freeze dryers, SEM, etc. The infrastructure of the building is good with Wi-Fi connectivity all over the campus. We have a government-sponsored project in my course too. Hostels are well-equipped with every necessity including Wi-Fi 24x7, water cooler, and laundry. We have different options for mess which students can choose according to their will. We have a dedicated medical emergency room for any kind ...

reviews.review_heading: Amity is humongous in terms of opportunities and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college campus is really good. The campus is humongous and astonishing. Our college has huge fields which are full of trees and greenery. It's quite peaceful and lovely to sit on the ground in the evening. Our course is really helping me a lot in understanding the subjects and maintaining my knowledge of the trends in the market. It will obviously help me in the future, as I will be up to date with the future market trends and placements.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and well-equipped. There is a free Wi-Fi facility available throughout the whole college. The college is very vast covering 150 acres of land and is very well maintained. The college maintains a nature-loving vibe which helps us to stay connected with nature.

reviews.review_heading: Great vibrant campus and good academics with many improvements taking place.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available for course/department is great. We have central Wi-Fi and AC. Many labs are available and there is a central library. Coming to hostel, we have good room and timely we have staff to clean our rooms and bathrooms daily, and laundry is also available. Food is manageable.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering programmes is around INR 1,23,556 to 4,38,260.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average college for the average marks.

review_content.Placements: In my college, campus placements are so less. It is about 30-40%. It is also very hard. 30-40% got placed because they tried from the outside courses. They put more effort into getting placed. Before 2022, there were good placements, In 2023 and 2024, there were not good placements. The highest package in our department is 7 LPA. The lowest is 3.4 LPA. TCS is one of the companies which hire the most students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good but not as the expected life like an engineering student wants. The campus gathered all the colleges in a little bit of area. Pharmacy, polytechnic, MBA, and MCA branches are in one building. There is no hostel service for boys. There is only a girls' hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good, with good infrastructure and environment.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students were placed in 2023. 10 LPA was the highest package for 5-6 students in the top company. TCS, Capgemini, Cognizant and many other companies are recruiting. 35% of students got internships from Sankey Solutions. Website development and software development were the top roles offered .
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and there is hostel only for girls Canteen food is average. There should be more varieties and good taste for the canteen food. There is a sports ground for the students for various sports and games. There are also indoor sports like chess, carrom, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college of engineering.

content.Placements: The college provides very good placements. The highest salary package offered is 26 LPA - 20 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA - 9 LPA. The lowest is 3.25 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The worst hostel I have ever seen. While taking admission, it showed a lot of facilities like a water filter, a study table, a lift, etc. Now it's almost 3 months after taking admission; they have not given study tables till now. The lift has not been working for 3 months. They are making false promises. The college is good, very clean. We have good Wi-Fi. Outer is available. The college canteen is well. Food is like home food, great college. Awesome experience to live here. The rector and the staff are very well-mannered. Food quality is great, and they provide daily cleaning in hostel rooms. The place is quite peaceful, mostly during exam periods. Overall, the experience is great to live here. Fully recommend them because they provide complete security to the girls. A very good hostel has several facility shortcomings. The non-functional lift poses a convenience, while the intermittent hot water supply disrupts daily routine. Moreover, the absence of study tables hampers academic productivity. Improved maintenance and essential amenities like functional lifts, consistent hot water, and study areas are essential for enhancing the overall hostel experience.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I had a most enjoyable journey at the college.

content.Placements: 85% of students get placed through the college campus drive. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are RevBoosters and Trimech India. Internships are provided to 70 students. From internships, students are selected as full-time employees in the same organisation.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available, but all sports equipment is available. The mess is very clean and hygienic. There are large monitors for digital learning. A MacBook lab is also present for engineering students to work and understand more effectively.

individual_reviews.title: Enhance and grow with JSPM.

content.Placements: The course Is Information Technology; in this, the syllabus is provided by the SPPU university. The placement is really better in IT depth than other departments. The average package is 10 Lacs and minimum is 3.5 Lacs. The students need to do internships and other courses.

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 58195 and 256553 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 58195, B.E in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Data Science turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 96147.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 58195.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 75.8 and 92.4, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 92.4. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 75.8, Mechanical

Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 92.4. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 91.36 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 58.49. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 68.17 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Jayawantrao Sawant College of Engineering was 58.49. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 60.07 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 48.73.

hostel.description: Hostel for girls with two seater and three seater rooms, internet connectivity, indoor and outdoor games
Hostel for girls with two seater and three seater rooms, internet connectivity, indoor and outdoor games

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college of engineering.
reviews.review_text: The worst hostel I have ever seen. While taking admission, it showed a lot of facilities like a water filter, a study table, a lift, etc. Now it's almost 3 months after taking admission; they have not given study tables till now. The lift has not been working for 3 months. They are making false promises. The college is good, very clean. We have good Wi-Fi. Outer is available. The college canteen is well. Food is like home food, great college. Awesome experience to live here. The rector and the s...

reviews.review_heading: I had a most enjoyable journey at the college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available, but all sports equipment is available. The mess is very clean and hygienic. There are large monitors for digital learning. A MacBook lab is also present for engineering students to work and understand more effectively.

reviews.review_heading: Average college for the average marks.
reviews.review_text: Good but not as the expected life like an engineering student wants. The campus gathered all the colleges in a little bit of area. Pharmacy, polytechnic, MBA, and MCA branches are in one building. There is no hostel service for boys. There is only a girls' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, with good infrastructure and environment.
reviews.review_text:
Good infrastructure and there is hostel only for girls
Canteen food is average. There should be more varieties and good taste for the canteen food.
There is a sports ground for the students for various sports and games.
There are also indoor sports like chess, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Enhance and grow with JSPM.
reviews.review_text:
I am not living at the hostel. 
The infrastructure is awesome, and Wi-Fi is also available. Classrooms and also labs are available.
Also, the ground is so huge for sports.
The lab has PCs and Wi-Fi systems that help to perform practical tasks and help to gain practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Best decision is to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is excellent. College labs are equipped with advanced tools Wi-Fi is present in every classroom and library. The library is very big; we have many PCs in the library. You can read books on those or get physical books from the library. The hostel is separate for girls and boys. Our hostel is very strict; no one without an ID or password can enter the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Dandiya night, industrial trip, freshers, farewell, and Western Day are all celebrated on campus. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, lab and libraries. Classrooms have fans, AC and projectors. Every department has a separate club where students work on projects. The hostel has a large walking area, and the ground and mess have separate spaces. 38,000 fees for hostels and 24,000 for mess every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, low fees and satisfied with faculty of 2024 batch.
reviews.review_text: College has the finest infrastructure with ICT classrooms and fully Wi-Fi campus. Library is online and offline both with book availability. The canteen is very clean and provides healthy and good food with low rates. There are cafeterias such like Nescafe and various juice centers.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of my BE journey.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus was located in a very vast area. Wi-Fi connection was available throughout the entire campus, including labs, classrooms, library, etc. The canteen at the college was good. There were no hostel facilities available during my course. Labs had working computers.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Our college has 2 buildings. We have a very small ground and a small sports room. All facilities are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is available for girls. The hostel facility is not available for boys. They have to rent a private room. It charges a high fee. Our college is small. They provide many facilities. They provide few sports facilities. The library has limited books.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the 2022.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good but the administration need to look after student demands while making teams for organizing cultural events. Library services should change according to student needs. Need to update the outdated curriculum .

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college of engineering for the 12th professionals.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure here are not so good because there is a network issue all over the college its so frustrating to students. The classrooms are clean and the library also. The canteen is the most beautiful thing in this college because there is so much for a person.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus infrastructure. Placements are moderate. Good faculty support .
reviews.review_text: Good campus infrastructure. Good canteen is provided on campus but campus students want two canteens because one is not sufficient. Ground is there but not big is size.  Class infrastructure & laboratory environment is good. Wi-Fi is provided in class and computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides quality education.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities. Free Wi-Fi is available in classrooms and labs. Our college has a library for students. Students can borrow books from the library. Our college provides a girls' hostel. The boys' hostel is not available in our college.

college_info.intro:
Hindusthan College of Arts and Science's popular programmes are BSc and MBA. HICAS Coimbatore students are placed in top companies such as Zoho Corporation, Ramco Cement Ltd, Digital Intelligence Systems, and others. The college aims to provide world-class Management-related education to the students. MBA students can become Management Trainee, Sales Representatives, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Hindusthan College of Arts and Science offers UG, PG, certificate, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Computer Application, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BSc, BCA, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MBA, MCA, and other courses to students. The college also provides diploma courses to students. Below are some of the courses offered by Hindustan Arts and Science Coimbatore and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Hindustan College of Arts and Science offers three years BSc programme across multiple specialisations. BSc admission is entirely merit based as per the eligibility criteria set by the college admission body. Find below the BSc eligibility criteria:Any candidate who has completed Class 12 of the Tamilnadu Higher Secondary Board Examinations/ CBSE/ or equivalentPrivate candidates under open schooling systemHigher Secondary or equivalent examinations conducted by all other state boardsPreference is given to candidates who passed in the first attemptBSc SpecialisationsBiotechnologyComputer ScienceElectronics & Communication ScienceElectronic MediaMathematicsMicrobiologyVisual CommunicationPsychology
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at Hindustan College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    Regarded for its extensive offers in terms of facilities, faculty caliber, and career placement, Hindustan College of Arts and Science in Chennai seems to be well-regarded. It shows good industry ties with an approximate 85% placement rate and alluring packages from leading recruiters like Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. Well-stocked labs, spotless classrooms, and helpful faculty are all present on campus. Though personal preferences may differ, the college stands out among the other options in Chennai's educational scene for students because of its dedication to academic quality, real-world experience, and holistic growth.
faqs.question: Is Hindustan College of Arts and Science best in Chennai?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no entrance exam required for admission to BCA course at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science. Candidates willing to get admission to this course can get direct admission based on their Class 12 merit scores. Further, the college prepares merit list based on the past academic records of candidates along with scrutinizing their applications.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BCA at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    HICAS BCom seat allotment is based on marks secured by candidates in the Class 12 examination. HICAS BCom seat intake varies between 60 and 180 depending upon the specialisation selected by candidates. Check below the specialisation-wise HICAS BCom seats:CourseSeat Intake BCom in Computer Applications 180BCom 120BCom in Information Technology 120BCom in Corporate Secretaryship120 BCom in Professional Accounting 120BCom in Accounting and Finance 120BCom in Banking and Insurance 60BCom in Cost and Management Accounting 60BCom in International Business 60Note: This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Data Science and Analytics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great place for education and enjoyment.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed. My senior placed with the highest package of 4.5 LPA (Accenture) but it is not really the highest package. The lowest package is 1.8 LPA. Top companies are Accenture, Zoho, Cognizant, Infosys, etc. Top roles offered are data scientist, data analyst, statistician, data visualiser, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms are awesome with great facilities and also with many advanced software programs used in this course. Hostel food is not really always good but canteen food is good. It is a college that supports much in extra-curricular activities like sports and cultural events.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best college for the MBA course.

content.Placements: Our college is quite unique and serene. Due to its ease of use and quality, 77% of students are enrolled in this course. In our college, the lowest package is 6 LPA, and the highest package is 22 LPA. Numerous firms, like Deloitte, TCS, Wipro, and others recruit students from our course, providing the greatest and most convenient placements. 75% of our college graduates are hired by corporations. The top positions available for students are HR, manager, and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The college offered digital learning, projector-based learning, a digital library, Wi-Fi in the library, and charging ports. Although there is no hostel, the food served in the restaurant is always fresh and interesting. Additionally, there is a medical aid box and a medical room. The bathroom is clean and hygienic. The college also has special facilities for athletics and sports.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at our college is good, with good facilities. There are many departments available in our college. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, and medical facilities are good enough.

Recruiting companies were Zoho, Infosys, HP, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and LTI. More than 30% of students got internships. Roles offered were software developer, web developer, data scientist, cyber security expert, AI/ML engineer, and full stack developer.
content.Infrastructure: Well, the labs and classrooms were not so good at the same time. The labs were average and the system was okay. Few of the systems may not be in working condition. The Wi-Fi connection was also average, not good. There were a lot of canteens available in this college. The price range was also valued for the product. The food was good but hostel food was the worst. This college had own hospital with the same name as the college so don't worry about medical facilities. In sports, they give importance and scholarships to the students.

admission_overview.college_name: Hindusthan College of Arts and Science Admissions Process 2025: Eligibility & Selection

admission_process.title: Hindusthan College of Arts and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HICAS admission process 2025is both merit-based and entrance-based. HICAS accepts admission on the basis ofentrance testfor specific courses such asMBA, MCA, and PhD. Whereas for remaining courses, direct admission is offered based on the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates. HICAS application forms can be filled in bothonlineandofflinemodes.
Hindusthan College of Arts and Scienceis affiliated withBharathiar University, Coimbatore. Read the complete article to know more about Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission.

The institute offers admission to over57 coursesat UG, PG, and PhD levels across various streams, such asArts & Humanities, ScienceandAccounting, and Commerce. Apart from this, HICAS also offers 5 diploma and certificate courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria forHICAS courses:
GATE/UGC NET/CSIR NET
Read More:HICAS Admission PolicyandHICAS Admission Brochure 2025

Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission consists of multiple steps. HICAS admission begins with an online/ offline registration process. Interested students can check out the following section to learn more about Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission in detail:
HICAS Application Process

HICAS accepts both online/ offline applications for admission to UG & PG courses. Candidates must fill an application form either on the university's official website or they can submit a hard copy of the application form to HICAS.

For PhD course admission, candidates must apply offline. The candidates who want to apply for M. Phil/ PhD programme are advised to visit the official university website. Candidates can download the application from the website. The candidates have to download two copies of the application and submit the filled in application at college.
HICAS Selection Rounds
For MBA & MCA course, students are admitted based on TANCET scores. Whereas for other UG & PG courses, candidates are selected based on their merit of the last qualifying exam.
HICAS Merit List Release & Fee Payment

Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission is subjected to the rules of reservation of the Government of Tamil Nadu andBharathiar University, Coimbatore. A partial 50% of the seats are filled as per the reservation policy stipulated by the regulatory bodies and 50% of the seats are filled through Management Quota. The shortlisted candidates will be notified through merit lists. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theHindusthan College of Arts and Science feeto confirm their seats in the university.
For more information aboutHICAS admissioncheck out the below video:

courses_data.description: Hindustan College of Arts & Science offers a three-year BSc course across various specialisations. Direct admission is offered to students based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. More details around eligbility, seats and fee for HICAS BSc course are as follows:

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Hindustan College of Arts and Science accept for admission to BSc?
faqs.answer: For admission to Hindustan College of Arts and Science, applicants should pass Class 12 with PCM as the Main Subjects or a High School Senior Secondary exam by the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) of India or any of the equivalent exams conducted by any State Board. The applicants should have secured a minimum 45% aggregate with English as a mandatory subject of the course. A relaxation of 5% of the minimum aggregate is allowed for the SC/ST candidates.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at HICAS for BA?
faqs.answer: HICAS BA admission forms are out on the institute's official website. Candidates seeking admission to the programme must submit the application form either in online or offline mode. Given below is theHindusthan College of Arts and Science BA admission process:STEP 1:Visit the college office or fill out the application online on HICAS website. In the application form, candidates must provide personal, guardian and, academic details. The final step of the application process is to pay the HICAS B

faqs.question: Is BSc available at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, BSc course is available at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science. The university offers BSc courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BSc course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 . Hindusthan College of Arts and Science's admission process is merit-based.

courses_data.name: HICAS MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Hindustan College of Arts & Science MBA admission is completely entrance-based. Students are admitted based on a validTANCETscore. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, i.e., to pass graduation with minimum 50% aggregate. Check the following section for more details around HICAS MBA admission 2025:

faqs.question: How to get admission to MBA at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: To get admission to MBA at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science, candidates must pass graduation with minimum 50% aggrgegate from a recognised board. As the college is affiliated with Bharathiar University, candidates must qualify TANCET with a valid score (TANCET/ CET/ MAT for Management Quota). The selected candidates will be notified through merit list released on the official notice board of the college. Further, candidates must pay a certain amount of fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria of MBA programme for admission at Hindustan College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for MBA admission, candidates must have a Bachelor's degree with a minimum 50% aggregate.

hostel.description: The Hostels are situated within the campus of Hindusthan College of Arts & Science.There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girl's. No of Students in Boy's Hotel is 1000 and Girls's hostel is 800.They are provided with Vegetarian and Non Vegetarian food. There is a central canteen and six cafeteria inside the college premises.

library.description: The college central library functions in a networked environment managed by a library management system to support its various operations and services. The library has a huge collection of books and subscriptions to National and International Journals. The College has membership and subscription to online resources like Inflibnet, Delnet, National Digital Library and Swayam Prabha. The library has an audio visual facility, photocopying facility, air conditioned conference hall and a digital library for enriching the learning environment in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great place for education and enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms are awesome with great facilities and also with many advanced software programs used in this course. Hostel food is not really always good but canteen food is good. It is a college that supports much in extra-curricular activities like sports and cultural events.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The college offered digital learning, projector-based learning, a digital library, Wi-Fi in the library, and charging ports. Although there is no hostel, the food served in the restaurant is always fresh and interesting. Additionally, there is a medical aid box and a medical room. The bathroom is clean and hygienic. The college also has special facilities for athletics and sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at our college is good, with good facilities. There are many departments available in our college. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, and medical facilities are good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindusthan College of Arts and Science [HICAS]
reviews.review_text: 89% of the marks were placed in my course. A minimum of 10,000 to 200,000 was offered in my course. L&T company and Infosys company offer placements to my college. 50% of people got internships from my course in Infosys. Jobs are available in IT companies and trading companies.

reviews.review_heading: Strong foundation, practical skills, bright career prospects, and so many events.
reviews.review_text: Well, the labs and classrooms were not so good at the same time. The labs were average and the system was okay. Few of the systems may not be in working condition. The Wi-Fi connection was also average, not good. There were a lot of canteens available in this college. The price range was also valued for the product. The food was good but hostel food was the worst. This college had own hospital with the same name as the college so don't worry about medical facilities. In sports, they give importa...

reviews.review_heading: My college has no limits.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good and it is a very old college. With a good reputation and classrooms are very hi-fi and have a good Wi-Fi network. It has a hi-tech library. Food in the mess and canteen is good. It has a mobile hospital in our college. In our college, students have secured many medals and shields in various sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: It's worth the money. You should give it a try.
reviews.review_text: There are numerous labs, and separate hostels for men and women, with options like normal, deluxe, semi-deluxe, super deluxe, and ultra-deluxe. There are more than 15 canteens and a large auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: It is a tech-driven campus with strong placements and vibrant student life.
reviews.review_text: The department offers well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a central library with vast academic resources. The hostel has clean rooms, decent food in the mess and canteen, 24x7 medical support and good sports facilities including indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Why it has the best academics and faculty?
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi and separate labs for fabric design, drafting, stitching, and pattern making. The labs have all the necessary equipment for our use. Classrooms are smart classrooms. The college has a very accessible library as well. Hostel facilities were good and secure, and there is a hospital clinic inside, so there is no need to fear.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college. The infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and a library with all essential books are provided. Hostels are facilitated with hot water both for bathing and drinking. Rooms are provided with cots, chairs, and study desks. The mess food menu is not very great. The food quality is low but adjustable. Hindustan Hospital is nearby and the only medicine fee is for students with college ID. There is a basketball court, badminton court, and cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Life at HICAS is a blissful moment in my career.
reviews.review_text: Our MAAC dept offers many facilities unlike other departments, like air-conditioned classrooms, and computer labs that are open until 7 pm. College Wi-Fi is good too, and many necessary books are available at the library, and some fun novels like Harry Potter are available too. You may use your ID card to enter the library. Hostels have facilities like hot drinking water, and hot water in the morning for bathing. Food quality is not bad. There would be canteens everywhere, and a ground near the ...

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are the best. The library has a large collection of books on various subjects and also offers free Wi-Fi. Wi-Fi connections are also provided at some other locations. Many eateries are present on campus. There is also a hospital within the campus. We have 5 grounds, a sports complex, and a courtyard inside most of the hostels where the students also play football, cricket, hockey, and other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for those who want to enjoy without worrying about career.
reviews.review_text: In terms of facilities and infrastructure, it is good. Not very worse. Perhaps in a few classrooms we will experience some minor issues. UG students will get to learn through smart classes with projectors. Most of the time, that is frequently available for PG students. Hostel food is not likable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Com. In Computer Application Course.
reviews.review_text: The products and services offered at our college are extensive. Classrooms are equipped with air conditioning and air conditioning. Our campus has shared free Wi-Fi. The library is spacious with many books. The hotel is very clean. Food and care are good. Restaurants and medical facilities have been built there. There are sporting and cultural activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: Football and cricket fields are available at our university, along with badminton and basketball facilities. Both the science and art libraries on campus include a large collection of books and journals, but they are not digital. There is Wi-Fi on campus, which gives users access to premium journals. The library didn't have some books.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Banasthali Vidyapith ranks #78 under the category 'Engineering'.

Banasthali Vidyapith admissions are open for UG and PG courses. More updates are as follows:

table.details: - 17th by India Today for MSW - 22nd by NIRF for Pharmacy -741-750 by QS Asian University Ranking 2026 in Asia Category

college_info.intro:
The Banasthali Vidyapith lagship programmes offered at Banasthali Vidyapith include BTech, BSc and MBA. Apart from this, the university offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes in the disciplines of Mathematics, Science, Management, Commerce, Arts, Engineering, Aviation, Education, Design, Law and Journalism. The university offers distance learning programmes to its students. The institute has been ranked #66 by the NIRF 2025 under the category University, #71 under Engineering, and #22 under Pharmacy. It provides 61 master's programmes and 32 doctoral degrees in the fields of Humanities, Social Sciences, Sciences, Law, Education, Commerce, and Management. Candidates can check the courses offered at Banasthali Vidyapith in the table mentioned below:
For more information about Banasthali Vidyapith, check out the video below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This university is one of the best in Jaipur

review_content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is situated in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This university has good placement opportunities. Many well-known tech companies visit this university every year for placements. The highest package of this university is 47 LPA, and the lowest package is 8 LPA. At least 60 percent is required for internship purposes. After pursuing this course, you will enhance your career in the Biology department, as you will become a nurse in a well-educated hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is very good. The university occupies a lot of area. It provides many facilities, like Wi-Fi available all the time in the hostels and departments for students and faculty, so they can easily learn what they want. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the library is very big and provides many opportunities for students. There are many hostels for students who live on campus. The university also has food and medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are few, and fests are boring. Other activities are nice.

review_content.Placements: There are almost 200 students in my course, and as the graduation approached, I think only 1/4th would be. The highest package is 28 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA - 4 LPA. All the companies visit and hire in mass but the top one would be Deloitte. I think the top roles would be B.E/B.Tech and B.A.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in the hostels is fine but only available at certain times. You can only be connected on your laptops. Labs are above average but again no Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have AC but the new departments are very modern and aesthetic. There are libraries in almost every department while a central one is also available.
