review_summary.college_name: Banasthali Vidyapith Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is well known in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This University is mainly for girls and we highlight that this University is best in placement purpose. There are many courses offered by this University and the highest package of this University is 45 LPA and the lowest package of this University is 7 LPA. At least 65 percent is required by the students for the internship opportunities and many roles are offered by this University.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of B.A. in this University is very good. There are many facilities so I can easily pursue this course. There are many facilities provided by this University like all-time Wi-Fi facilities for the students. The University classrooms are fully air-conditioned and there are many hostels in this University because no day scholars are allowed, where students live together. There are many extra facilities available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our 850-acre residential women's campus hosts 25,000 students with elite sports and vibrant fests.

content.Placements: The majority of students were successfully placed in the B.Com. The highest package is approximately 7 LPA. Top recruiters are Deloitte, Deutsche Bank, Planetspark, PWC, Ditto Insurance, McDonald, DE Shaw, and others. Roles offered to students include Audit Assurance, Insurance Advisory, Management trainee, Executive trainee, Audit Assistant, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are far better than those of other semi-private colleges available in India. The quality of hostels is very good, the food was also better, and with a variety on each weekday. If we talk about sports facilities, they are outstanding, the trainers are very good in nature, and they provide students with quality time and guidance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This university is one of the best in Jaipur

content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is situated in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This university has good placement opportunities. Many well-known tech companies visit this university every year for placements. The highest package of this university is 47 LPA, and the lowest package is 8 LPA. At least 60 percent is required for internship purposes. After pursuing this course, you will enhance your career in the Biology department, as you will become a nurse in a well-educated hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is very good. The university occupies a lot of area. It provides many facilities, like Wi-Fi available all the time in the hostels and departments for students and faculty, so they can easily learn what they want. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the library is very big and provides many opportunities for students. There are many hostels for students who live on campus. The university also has food and medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Placements are few, and fests are boring. Other activities are nice.

content.Placements: There are almost 200 students in my course, and as the graduation approached, I think only 1/4th would be. The highest package is 28 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA - 4 LPA. All the companies visit and hire in mass but the top one would be Deloitte. I think the top roles would be B.E/B.Tech and B.A.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in the hostels is fine but only available at certain times. You can only be connected on your laptops. Labs are above average but again no Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have AC but the new departments are very modern and aesthetic. There are libraries in almost every department while a central one is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is the best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Banasthali Vidyapith is situated in Jaipur, Rajasthan. This university offers the best placement opportunities for students. The highest package of this university is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 7 LPA. At least 60 percent is required for internship purposes.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this course is best for students. In one semester, many facilities are provided, such as all-time Wi-Fi. This university has a big library, where students can study books and novels. There are many hostels in this university for students. This provide a good environment. The food quality in this university is also very good. The university conducts many fests every year.

admission_overview.college_name: Banasthali Vidyapith Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Banasthali Vidyapith admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The university has its own entrance exam called Banasthali University Aptitude Test. The in-house entrance exam is conducted for admission to its various UG and PG courses.

The admission processis entirely based on merit or BUAT as per course requirements. The university conducts an aptitude test to select candidates for most of the UG and PG courses. Find below the topBV coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Class 12 with a minimum of 60% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) in the Science stream withPhysics, Chemistry, and Mathematics orBiologyfor (Biotechnology) as compulsory subjects from a recognised school
Banasthali University Aptitude Test+ Counselling + Academic Merit
Class 12 in Science/ Arts/ Commerce stream with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Banasthali University Aptitude Test
Class 12 with Physics,Chemistry, Biology/Mathematicswith at least 60% aggregate
Banasthali University Aptitude Test
Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate
Merit-based
Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Banasthali University Aptitude Test + Merit in the last qualifying examination
Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate
Merit-based
Graduation in Law (5-year integrated Law/3-year LLB)
Banasthali University Aptitude Test
To know the course-wise total tuition fee and average package offered at BU, Jaipur:
Note:The information is sourced from the official website and it may change further.
BU admits students based on merit or entrance exam scores as per course requirements. Find out theBanasthali Vidyapith admission process 2025below:
1: Banasthali Vidyapith Application Process 2025
Candidates can apply in online/offline mode.
2: Shortlisting via Aptitude Test/ Merit
Candidates are selected based on merit and the Banasthali University Aptitude Test.
3: Payment of Admission Fee & Admission Confirmation
After completion of the selection rounds, candidates are called for document verification. The students selected for respective courses must pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

courses_data.description: Banasthali Vidyapith, Jaipur provides a four-year full-time BTech course at the UG level. The curriculum of the programme is divided into eight semesters. Students can apply for the course both online or offline. It is required for candidates to pass Class 12 as the basic eligibility requirement for BTech admission. The selection to this course is based on BUAT conducted by Banasthali Vidyapith. Allocation of the branch is finalised at the time of counselling based on merit.

courses_data.name: Banasthali Vidyapith MBA Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Banasthali Vidyapith offers a full-timeMaster of Business Administration (MBA)of two-year duration. The programme offers an industry-oriented programme is divided into four semesters. Banasthali Vidyapith MBA admission is merit-cum-aptitude test-based. The university conducts the Banasthali University Aptitude Test to select candidates. Besides, candidates must complete a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate from a university recognised by the Association of Indian Universities to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Banasthali for MBA?
faqs.answer: Banasthali Vidyapith admissions for MBA is based on entrance-exam. The university conducts an aptitude test to select candidates for MBA programme. BUAT is conducted for three hours in online mode once in a year. Aspirants who have qualified the entrance exam are called for counselling and seat confirmation.

faqs.question: Is Banasthali University good for an MBA?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of Banasthali Vidyapith. Talking about placements, the median package offered in 2023 to PG two-year course isINR 4.01 LPA. A total of 411 students were placed in top companies. ITC, Axis bank, Philips, Decathlon and IBM visited the campus in recent past during Banasthali Vidyapith MBA placements.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA in Banasthali Vidyapith?
faqs.answer: Yes, Banasthali Vidyapith conducts an aptitude test for admission to MBA programme. It is an online test conducted for three hours. The test is divided into four sections. Find them below:Language Comprehension (English & Hindi)Mathematical SkillsData Analysis & SufficiencyIntelligence & Critical Reasoning

faqs.question: Is there direct admission in Banasthali University?
faqs.answer: Bananasthali Vidyapith course admissions to all courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers admission to various UG and PG courses. The university conductes Banasthali University Aptitude Test for admission to selective courses such as BTech, MBA, BSc Nursing, LLM, etc. There is no way to get direct admission to these courses. Admissions are solely based on entrance exam. However for courses such as BA, BSc, BCom, MA, MSc, etc.,. There is no requirement to qualify for any entrance exam. Candidates are only required to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria and fill an online application form. Based on the past academic records of the applicants, the university will select the right candidates.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Banasthali Vidyapith offers?
faqs.answer: The university offers 15+ undergraduate courses in the disciplines of Mathematics, Science, Management, Commerce, Arts, Engineering, Aviation, Education, Design, Law, and Journalism. It also offers 60+ masters and 25+ PhD courses in the disciplines of Humanities, Social Sciences, Law, Education, Commerce and Management. The popular courses of Banasthali Vidyapith are BTech and MBA. These courses are offered across various specialisations. Admission to most of the courses at Banashtali Vidyapith is entrance-based. Whereas, for other courses, candidates are selected based on their previous merit scores.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Banasthali Vidyapith admission form?
faqs.answer: Banasthali Vidyapith admissions are currently open. The university usually releases the admission form in April. Since admission to some of the courses is entrance-based, the university also releases the dates for the aptitude test. The university conducts Banasthali University Aptitude Test in June for different courses.

faqs.question: How to get into BCom courses at Banasthali Vidyapith?
faqs.answer: Banasthali Vidyapith BCom is a three years UG-level programme. The university admits students to its BCom course based on marks obtained by students in Class 12. Admission process of BCom at Banasthali Vidyapith can be divided into three steps. Following is a detailed explanation of these stages:Application process- Banasthali Vidyapith offers two modes for interested students to submit their applicants. First is the online mode. In this mode students are required to visit the university’s official website and fill out the applicant form.The second is the offline mode. Students who wish to submit their application offline, require to first send DD/IPO for INR 1,000 in favor of "Banasthali Vidyapith" payable at Banasthali/Jaipur in order to obtain a prospectus and application form. It is to be sent to Secretary-Banasthali Vidyapith, P.O. Banasthali Vidyapith -304022, Rajasthan, INDIA. Upon receival of the DD, the university will send the application form along with the prospectus.Shortl

placement_data.title: Banasthali Vidyapith Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement details of 2025 batch are yet to be released on the official website of Banasthali Vidyapith University. The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for the batch 2024. According to the report, 804 BTech students were placed from the total 692 graduated students of the batch 2024 with a median package of INR 9.5 LPA . In MTech , 12 students of the batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 7.25 LPA.

In PG 2 year program , 423 students of the batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 4.25 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Banasthali Vidyapith University in the recent past include Accenture, DE Shaw, Deloitte, TCS, Infosys , etc.

The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Banasthali Vidyapith rankings.

nirf.description:
Banasthali Vidyapith has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith climbed 1 rank to #66 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith climbed 7 ranks to #71 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Banasthali Vidyapith climbed 6 ranks to #22 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Banasthali Vidyapith has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Banasthali Vidyapith indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Banasthali Vidyapith fell 80 ranks to #741 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Banasthali Vidyapith fell 22 ranks to #224 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

hostel_campus.college_name: Banasthali Vidyapith Infrastructure Details & Reviews

highlights: Build collections and create tools to support research and learning;
Maximise access to and promote the use of internal as well as external information resources;
Ensure the preservation and long-lasting availability of library resources;
Create attractive and comfortable  physical and virtual environments for study and research;
Collaborate with Vidyapith faculty and researchers to enrich the collection services.

hostel.description: There are 29 hostels with a capacity of housing 110 to 438 students. The student admitted to the University will compulsorily have to join a hostel unless the student is a ward of a worker of the University and stays with him/her in the campus or the student belongs to a neighboring village community within a radius of 2.5 Km. There are 31 student hostels on the campus of the University. There is a different number of rooms in each hostel ranging from 80 to 120. All rooms are well furnished with basic amenities provided. Each hostel has a separate Mess, Newspaper and Telephone facility.
facilities: Build collections and create tools to support research and learning;

data: High-speed internet and power, a secure environment, a swimming pool, an athletic ground, hostels and more

library.description: the Central Library’s collection of 200000 books, reports, theses, dissertations, bound journals, manuscripts, albums, pamphlets, maps, charts, audio/video cassettes, gramophone records, CDs/DVDs, atlas, slides and many more. The library currently receives over 300 national and international journals. About 9000+ journals are accessible online under UGC-INFONET Consortia. The library offers Reference Services, Users’ Orientation Services, Circulation Services, Current Awareness Services, and Plagiarism Checking. In addition to the Central Library, there are 9 departmental libraries in the higher education system and 3 school libraries. All the libraries have been using the LIBSYS, an Integrated Library Management software package with all the modules for the library housekeeping operations.

reviews.review_heading: This is best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of B.A. in this University is very good. There are many facilities so I can easily pursue this course. There are many facilities provided by this University like all-time Wi-Fi facilities for the students. The University classrooms are fully air-conditioned and there are many hostels in this University because no day scholars are allowed, where students live together. There are many extra facilities available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our 850-acre residential women's campus hosts 25,000 students with elite sports and vibrant fests.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are far better than those of other semi-private colleges available in India. The quality of hostels is very good, the food was also better, and with a variety on each weekday. If we talk about sports facilities, they are outstanding, the trainers are very good in nature, and they provide students with quality time and guidance.

reviews.review_heading: This university is one of the best in Jaipur
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is very good. The university occupies a lot of area. It provides many facilities, like Wi-Fi available all the time in the hostels and departments for students and faculty, so they can easily learn what they want. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the library is very big and provides many opportunities for students. There are many hostels for students who live on campus. The university also has food and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are few, and fests are boring. Other activities are nice.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in the hostels is fine but only available at certain times. You can only be connected on your laptops. Labs are above average but again no Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have AC but the new departments are very modern and aesthetic. There are libraries in almost every department while a central one is also available.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this course is best for students. In one semester, many facilities are provided, such as all-time Wi-Fi. This university has a big library, where students can study books and novels. There are many hostels in this university for students. This provide a good environment. The food quality in this university is also very good. The university conducts many fests every year.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good at helping students to achieve their goals.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in hostel are very good in my hostel, not all hostels are good but mine is perfect for me. The food they provide is very healthy and tasty. Infrastructure and facilities in classroom and college are also good, which also helps us to study properly in a peaceful space. There are many libraries in which we can study.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and knowledgeable teacher but no placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is good. Rooms are spacious and comfortable and that place is so peaceful in itself, which leads to mind peace. As it total girls university so the security is also apt. ACs are not allowed there, and girls have to survive in the fans which leads to an increase in their strength.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this course is best for the students. There are many facilities provided such as all time Wi-Fi facilities. There are many classrooms for the students that provide the best environment. Many hostels are available in this University where students live together.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The university is very big. There are many hostels where students live together. Many facilities are provided, including Wi-Fi. The college has a big library. Students from different courses can access according to their time allotment. The hostels are very big. The food quality in every hostel is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Seats in classrooms are very comfortable, and departments are highly maintained, especially the one of my course. The hostel is properly furnished, and wardens are kind. Food is not up to the mark, but you can find all the sports facilities here.

reviews.review_heading: The college, hostels and teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of department is good. The hostels are well maintained and clean, but not all hotels are because a few hostels are old, but I don't like one thing, they can't give AC or cooler in the room. In the room, there are only wall fans on each bed and they don't allow us to bring any coolers, they only allow a table fan. And the quality of mess food is sometimes really good and tasty, and sometimes it's just okay. The mess food isn't same in every hostel because it's de...

reviews.review_heading: College is very good, girls always feel safe, everything is good, and everyone helps each other.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is very good, and the food is very nice. The medical facilities and sports are very good. So many games are here, and we can play every game here. Extra activities include development courses and a Certificate course (language, dancing, etc. ).

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, placement and infrastructure of my college.
reviews.review_text: Class infrastructure is very good, and the library has many books that are sufficient for us. Labs are also in very good condition. My hostel is good, but there are 2 or 3 hostels here whose conditions are very bad. Due to my luck, I got a good hostel with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Needs some polishing, but still satisfied, glad to be here.
reviews.review_text: Departments and hostels provide a good Wi-Fi facility. The labs are also always available, clean, and updated. The libraries are huge. All kinds of books are available, and they have a huge collection. And not just one but multiple libraries. Hostel food is okay-ish; you can survive away from home. You'll still miss your home's food, obviously, but it's manageable. Canteen food is also great, at times expensive for some. Medical facilities are not that great. Many students have complained about ...

reviews.review_heading: I definitely do not recommend this to anyone.
reviews.review_text: There are many libraries, and each department has its own library. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostels. Classrooms and hostels do not have AC. Even coolers are not allowed in the hostels. There are no ceiling fans in hostel rooms, so students have to survive on wall fans and their personal fans.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes at Pearl Academy Jaipur include BDes and MDes. Apart from this, the institute also offers UG and PG Diploma courses in Design and Fashion, including Graphic Design, Jewellery Design, Interior Design, Fashion Design, and Craft and design. It also offers PG courses specifically designed for working professionals. The institute also extends several professional Certificate courses.
Check some of the popular programmes offered at Pearl Academy Jaipur along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in this space:

faqs.answer: A:    Pearl Academy Jaipur's placements 2025 report is yet to be published. Once it is released, it will be updated on this page. faqs.question: What is the highest package of Pearl Academy Jaipur?

faqs.answer: A:    Pearl Academy Jaipur offers BDes course in various specialisations viz., Interior Architecture Design, Communication Design (Animation and VFX), UX / UI Communication Design and Fashion Styling, etc. When it comes to the placements, the institute offers decent placements annually. Check out the table for more clarity:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2023)Placement rate99%Highest packageINR 20.27 LPA
faqs.question: Does Pearl Academy Jaipur offer good placement for students after Fashion Designing courses?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pearl Academy, Jaipur offers UG, PG and certificate courses in the various domains of Design, Fashion and Media. At the UG level - it offers three and four-year Bachelor’s degree programmes in various specialisations including Accessory Design, Interior Design, Jewellery Design and Fashion Design. At the PG level, it offers a two-year Master's degree programme in various specialisations, including Interior Design and Styling, and Fashion Design.

faqs.answer: A:    The total fees of MDes courses at Pearl Academy Jaipur include multiple components, such as tuition fees, academic services, infrastructure fees, technology fees, etc. Check out the different components of fees of MDes in Interior Design below:Annual Fee (to be paid semester-wise)Tuition FeeINR 70,000Academic Services FeeINR 2.12 lakhInfrastructure FeeINR 2.27 lakhTechnology Fee 42,500Total5.52 lakhThis fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee structure for M.Des course at Pearl Academy, Jaipur?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, admission to Pearl Academy BDes course is entirely entrance-based. The institute conducts its own entrance exam, i.e., PAF for the selection of eligible candidates. Those who are willing to get admission to this course must qualify for the following rounds:General Proficiency Test (GPT): Evaluates a candidate’s proficiency in the English language, Logical reasoning, Quantitative Ability & Data Interpretation.Design Aptitude Test (DAT): Analyses a candidates' aptitude for creativity, drawing, design ability, power of observation and imagination, sensitivity to environment and communication skills.Interested candidates are required to qualify for both the rounds in order to get admission.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BDes at Pearl Academy?

faqs.answer: A:    The institute conducts Pearl Academy Entrance Exam (PAF) for admission to its MDes courses. PAF Entrance Exam consists of General Proficiency Test (GPT) for UG. In this test, the students are evaluated based on their aptitude, career focus, ability to express themselves, potential as a team member, eligibility to pursue the programme, and communication skills.
faqs.question: Does Pearl Academy conduct any entrance exam for MDes admissions?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the dates released on the official website of the institution Pearl Academy Jaipur MDes deadline for the January session ends on Jan 13,  2025. However, candidates must note that the Pearl Academy application is open in multiple cycles - January, April, June, and August. Hence, if candidates have not applied in the January session can prepare themselves for the upcoming April sessions.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent platform for fashion students to enrich their knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides 100% placements opportunities for students of various streams with possibilities where our career could get ahead. Top designers, graphic designers and marketing where they set us to be in top recruiters. They lead us to cover the mainstream.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our Jaipur campus has the best infrastructure for the designing students among India, with completely equipped machines. Opportunities have been completely given to us to enrich the knowledge of fashion throughout the course and trained us throughout.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Life changing opportunities with international exposure and excellent faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There is 99% placement by the college and depends on the portfolio. The highest salary goes to 5 lacs to 25k. Export Houses, Designers like Manish Malhotra, Yashraj Groups etc. recruited the students. All roles played by a designer from illustrator to tailoring to management to innovators was offered. Salary pachage to our course goes from 40 lacs to even 5 lacs. 100% students get internships as it depends on the portfolios and Pearl makes us capable enough to have an innovative and creative portfolio.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is to the point in case of facilities. The Hostels are really good and the mess too as my friends stay there and are very satisfied with the Hostel. There is time to time upgradation in the facilities demanded by the students. There is full freedom of speech and the facilities provided are very satisfying and useful for the students.

review_summary.college_name: Pearl Academy Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Our college regularly conducts placement workshops to prepare students for job interviews. This helped us to be industry-ready by the time we completed our course. Almost 90% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 18 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. Air-conditioners and projectors were available in classrooms. Stitching labs, textile labs, etc., were available. Classrooms were spacious and well-equipped. The hostel facilities were good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I did Post Graduation course, journey was amazing overall. I definitely recommend it.

content.Placements: Placements were just okay. Not all Post graduated students were placed by the university. Candidates had to look for jobs on their own. Also in the practical world, more priority is given to lift students instead of Pearl so ya getting a job is quite a difficult bit ya who so ever were placed got a decent package as a fresher.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure wise nothing can beat Pearl Academy, Jaipur. The college provides Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library where you can log in to fashion websites free of cost, and access to stitching, dyeing, etc. Labs at any time of the day or call it any day. Nothing can beat the quality of services they provide.

individual_reviews.course: M.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent platform for fashion students to enrich their knowledge.

content.Placements: Our college provides 100% placements opportunities for students of various streams with possibilities where our career could get ahead. Top designers, graphic designers and marketing where they set us to be in top recruiters. They lead us to cover the mainstream.
content.Infrastructure: Our Jaipur campus has the best infrastructure for the designing students among India, with completely equipped machines. Opportunities have been completely given to us to enrich the knowledge of fashion throughout the course and trained us throughout.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Life changing opportunities with international exposure and excellent faculty members.

content.Placements: There is 99% placement by the college and depends on the portfolio. The highest salary goes to 5 lacs to 25k. Export Houses, Designers like Manish Malhotra, Yashraj Groups etc. recruited the students. All roles played by a designer from illustrator to tailoring to management to innovators was offered. Salary pachage to our course goes from 40 lacs to even 5 lacs. 100% students get internships as it depends on the portfolios and Pearl makes us capable enough to have an innovative and creative portfolio.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is to the point in case of facilities. The Hostels are really good and the mess too as my friends stay there and are very satisfied with the Hostel. There is time to time upgradation in the facilities demanded by the students. There is full freedom of speech and the facilities provided are very satisfying and useful for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Interior Architecture Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, inspiring faculty, but can work better for placements.

content.Placements: The placements are still not so good. Seniors face difficulty in iad batch to find jobs. Some good students might get a good placement, but there is no 100 percent guarantee of placements. Although, it is improving now. We can find jobs abroad, but there are less opportunities in India.
content.Infrastructure: A medical room is, and good air-conditioning is available in the college. Labs and classrooms are neat and clean with proper air conditioners and projector screens. The Wi-Fi connection quality is not that good. Gaming and sports are good as there is a big playground on the campus.

1: Pearl Academy Jaipur Application Process 2026
For getting admissions to the course, submit an application form, beforehand ensure that you comply with all the eligibility requirements. To apply for the desired programme, follow these details:
2: Shortlisting of students

The result for each, of course, is published on the Pearl Academy official website after the conclusion of the application process. Additionally, individual scorecards are also emailed to the students. Candidates are selected based on PAF.

Students selected based on scores in the entrance exam are invited for the interview round. It is a compulsory admission round and hence, selected students must ensure that they appear for this round.
3: Payment of Admission Fee & Admission Confirmation
The selected students can confirm their seats by paying the admission fee in part or full.

content.Placements: Placements at my college IIITDM-J are very nice. Around 70-75 percent of students get placed every year from this college, especially in CSE. The highest package is 87.5 LPA, which means it is in India. The average package is around 21.4 LPA. Top recruiters include Google, Adobe, and Nvidia.

Average package for CSE is around 20 LPA.

It also has PHC for immediate medical-related issues. Mess food is good. Every hostel has one canteen. We have football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis courts. There are also two indoor badminton courts, chess, carrom, table tennis, and gym rooms. Overall, the infrastructure is excellent.

admission_overview.college_name: IIITDM Jabalpur IIITDM Jabalpur Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: IIITDM Jabalpur admissionsare granted based onJEE MainsandGATE scoresto its BTech and MTech programmes, respectively. It offers a wide range of courses in Design and Technology for both UG, PG and PhD level courses.IIITDM Jabalpurcourse admission isentrance exam-based.The institute inducts candidates for the flagship BTech programme through JoSAA/ CSAB counselling based on valid JEE-Main scores. BTech being the flagship programme of IIIT Jabalpur is offered across five programmes. If you're interested in pursuing any of the courses at IIITDM in Jabalpur, candidates can check the eligibility criteria before applying atIIIT Jabalpur

IIITDM Jabalpur offers various courses at UG, PG and PhD levels. The eligibility criteria for the courses are Class 12 and graduation with minimum marks and selection is based on an entrance exam. Here are some popular courses of IIITDM, Jabalpur with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The fees offered at IIITDM Jabalpur vary from course to course and depending upon the specialisation. The candidates must pay the registration fee, examination fee, etc., apart from the total tuition fee. Here are some topIIITDM Jabalpur courseswith their total tuition fee along with the seat intake as per the courses. The reserved seat will be filled as per government of India rules:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website and is subject to change. Check out the completeIIITDM Jabalpur Fee Structure

The IIITDM Jabalpur admission criteria are entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on scores in the accepted entrance examination followed by respective selection rounds/counselling. The steps involved in the admission process are explained below:
STEP 1: IIITDM Jabalpur Application Process 2025

For IIITDM Jabalpur course admission must visit its official website to apply online. To apply for theBTechcandidates need to appear for theJEE Mainentrance exam. For MTech admission, candidates need to apply forGATE. Moreover, the aspirant shall ensure that the application form is submitted within the prescribed due date.
STEP 2: Release of Cutoff List

After the application process, the institute releases a course-wise cutoff list. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission.
STEP 3: Counselling

Candidates applying for a BTech course further have to go throughJoSAA counsellingfor seat allotment and, for MTech admission, CCMT conducts the counselling round. While the candidates who apply for a PhD may have to go through an interview round.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
After the selection rounds and counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible candidates. Selected students can further pay the required fee to confirm their seats.

The applicants who score well in the JEE Mains will be considered for admission. The programme offers four specializations that span four years, with a full-time tuition cost of INR 5.22 Lakh. The eligibility criterion requires a minimum of 75% in class 12, and candidates must have a valid score in JEE Mains to be

faqs.question: What is the total fee for BTech at IIITDM, Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech at IIITDM Jabalpur is INR 5.22 lakh for four years for full time. The eligibility for the same is class 12 with 75% and the selection is based on the entrance exam, candidates require a valid score in JEE Mains for admission in IIITDM  Jabalpur. faqs.question: Can I get admission to IIITDM Jabalpur with a rank of 40000?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission at  IIITDM Jabalpur with a rank of 40K if you belong to the General All India category. This category had the overall cutoff rank ranging from13297to64090. Hence, yes, admissions are possible with this rank for the General AI category.For the OBC AI category, admissions are also possible due to the last round cutoff being64779. Please remember that other categories will have different qualifying cutoffs accordingly.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIIT Jabalpur without JEE?
faqs.answer: No, it is not possible to get admission at IIITDM Jabalpur for BTech without a genuine JEE Main score. Applications have to be made through the JEE Main website and through JoSAA counselling for the allotment of seats. Institute fixes cutoff ranks on the basis of minimum marks obtained by candidates, and within the opening rank and closing ranks, admissions are given. Due to the stiff merit-based criteria followed by IIITDM Jabalpur, JEE Main is compulsory for BTech admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for getting into IIITDM, Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for the admission in IIITDM, Jabalpur is Class 12 with 75% for UG and graduation with 60% for PG courses. The offered courses are for full time and duration of three- four years. For better understanding refer the below table:CoursesEligibilityBDesClass 12 with 75%Exams:UCEEDBE / BTechClass 12 with 75 %Exams:JEE Main/DASA UGME/MTechGraduation with 60 %Exams:CCMTMDesGraduation with 60%Exams:CEED

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_report.college_name: IIITDM Jabalpur Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IIITDM Jabalpur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: A total of 13 international PPOs were made during IIITDM Jabalpur placement 2025 . Further, the overall highest domestic package offered during the placement drive 2025 was INR 87.54 LPA . The average package received by UG and PG students in 2025 was INR 21.49 LPA and INR 12.52 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, more than 90 companies visited the institute campus for the 2024 drive and offered 284 job opportunities to eligible BTech , MTech , and other courses students. The highest international and highest domestic packages stood at INR 122 LPA and INR 110 LPA, respectively. The IIITDM Jabalpur average package for UG and PG courses stood at INR 19.27 LPA and INR 12.54 LPA, respectively. Additionally, 3 international offers were made during IIIT Jabalpur placements 2024.

faqs.answer: Over 90 recruiters from diverse sectors participated in placements 2024. A total of 284 job offers were made and 65% of the students received packages of more than INR 10 LPA. faqs.question: What is the average placement package offered at IIIT Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: The average package offered during UG placements 2024 was INR 19.27 LPA and the average package for PG courses stood at INR 12.54 LPA. Earlier, the average package for UG and PG placements 2023 stood at INR 21.63 LPA and INR 13 LPA, respectively. The table below mentions the IIIT Jabalpur average package for the past three years: Course 2022 Average Package (INR) 2023 Average Package (INR) 2024 Average Package (INR) UG 14.45 LPA 21.63 LPA 19.27 LPA PG 10.40 LPA 13 LPA 12.54 LPA NOTE: The 2022 salary details are fetched from official reports, which are no longer available on the official website.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Des course at IIITDM Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: INR 5.7 Lacs is the total tuition fee for BDes at IIITDM Jabalpur. The eligibility criteria for BDes are good enough marks in Class 12 and a valid score in the UCEED entrance exam. Candidates who want to apply for admission have to fill out an application form online and pay INR 2000. This amount is from official website and may be changed later.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for BTech at IIITDM, Jabalpur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech at IIITDM Jabalpur is INR 5.22 lakh for four years for full time. The eligibility for the same is class 12 with 75% and the selection is based on the entrance exam, candidates require a valid score in JEE Mains for admission in IIITDM Jabalpur. Refer to the table for more details: Parameters Details Course BTech Eligibility for Full Time Eligibility: Class 12 with 75% Selection: JEE Mains Total Tuition Fees INR 5.22 lakh

description: IIITDM Jabalpur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIITDM Jabalpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 9 years of IIITDM Jabalpur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIITDM Jabalpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIITDM Jabalpur CSE cutoff 2025 was 16611 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 20916 and 52908, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitiv

For the General AI category students, the IIITDM Jabalpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 16611 and 64090 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 16611 and 20916, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIITDM Jabalpur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIITDM Jabalpur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIITDM Jabalpur. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering ( Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) with last round cutoff scores of 477 and 466, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 477. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 322 and 427 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIITDM Jabalpur - Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

IIITDM Jabalpur UCEED cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the B.Des course. In the meantime, candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view the UCEED 2025 first and last round cutoff details.

In 2025, the IIITDM Jabalpur B.Des cutoff 2025 was 267 in the last round for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In the first round, the cutoff rank stood at . Check out the table below to view the UCEED 2025 cutoff for the General category under the AI

For the General AI quota, the UCEED 2025 cutoff for B.Des admission was 267 in the last round. In 2024, the cutoff for the same course was 187, while in 2023, it was 165. So, analysing the last three years' cutoff data, it is evident that UCEED cutoff ranks saw a jump in the last round closing rank for B.Des admission over three years.

IIITDM Jabalpur - Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing accepts the UCEED entrance exam to shortlist students for B.Des admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the important UCEED 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

The UCEED 2025 counselling was concluded with the release of the five seat allotment rounds. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise UCEED cutoff lists from the table below for admission to the B.Des course at IIITDM Jabalpur.

IIITDM Jabalpur MDes cutoff 2024 is based on CEED scores 2024 followed by the round-wise CEED Counselling. IIITDM Jabalpur CEED cutoff 2024 is out for Part A. The mean and standard deviation for CEED 2024 Part A are 41.90 and 16.72, respectively. Refer to the table given below to check out the CEED Part A cutoff 2024 for IIITDM Jabalpur.

Considering the last round of IIITDM Jabalpur CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering ( Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Electronics and Communication Engineering (Nanoelectronics and VLSI Design) and Manufacturing and Automation had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI qu

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is IIITDM Jabalpur. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #101-150 under Engineering category. IIITDM Jabalpur excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around IIITDM Jabalpur rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, IIITDM Jabalpur has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, IIITDM Jabalpur's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIITDM-Jabalpur CSE.
reviews.review_text: IIITDM-Jabalpur provides top-notch infrastructure for CSE Students, including fully Wi-Fi-enabled labs, modern classrooms, and a digital library with vast resources. Hostels are spacious and clean with good Wi-Fi. It provides 24X7 water facility. The mess is also good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure, and balanced college life.
reviews.review_text: Institute infrastructure is really good. It has a lecture hall and tutorial complexes for classes. Core lab complex for core courses, library, and computer center. It also has PHC for immediate medical-related issues. Mess food is good. Every hostel has one canteen. We have football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis courts. There are also two indoor badminton courts, chess, carrom, table tennis, and gym rooms. Overall, the infrastructure is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: IIITDM Jabalpur truthful review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the college are very good and great. Infrastructure is very good and well maintained by the college, and the college has Wi-Fi and many kinds of labs that are maintained by the college very well, which makes the college techified.

reviews.review_heading: Real talk about IIITDM Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities that are available in our college are very top-notch and tier I will say and I think, our college is equipped with very modern things like Wi-Fi, computer labs, fingerprint blocks, and many more. College also has a very clean and well-maintained infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: If you are searching for a college for engineering, then this college is best, you can come.
reviews.review_text: In every classroom, lab, and library, a 5G Wi-Fi internet connection is available, and all areas are neat and clean. The hostels are good. There are six hostels in my college, and LAN is available in every room. Healthy food is available in the mess, canteen, etc., with two messes: one for vegetarian and one for non-vegetarian food. All clubs for every sport and ground are available.

reviews.review_heading: Great review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is really good. There are so many good classrooms which we like. The quality of food and canteen is good. The mess is somewhat bad. All facilities are available in our college. All sports are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college and the place where I met the most toxic people ever in my life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good particularly the hostels good the lecture halls and LHTC were great. Professors were just very arrogant and they did not care about the future of students. All they had was ego just pure ego and they did not care about the dignity of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, enjoyable college life with good placements.
reviews.review_text: IIIT Jabalpur has a well-developed campus with all the necessary infrastructure and facilities for students. Spread over 300 acres, it has academic buildings, research centers, and well-equipped classrooms. The library has a large collection of books, research papers, and digital materials. The institute provides hostel facilities for both boys and girls, with Wi-Fi, common rooms, and mess services. Faculty and staff also have residential quarters on campus. For sports and recreation, there are ...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the faculty is good, but some are good and some are not. Overall, the college is also good.
reviews.review_text: The lab and classrooms are very good, spacious, and clean, with projectors, noise-canceling walls, speakers, and air conditioning. The hostel is good, but not too clean, students have to clean themselves, although there is cleaning on a daily basis. Proper hot water is provided, mess food is decent, and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college alumni have qualified for UPSC, CAT, and top companies exams.
reviews.review_text: The Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing IIITDM Jabalpur has better infrastructure than private colleges. Everything is provided on our college campus like Wi-Fi, Smart labs, Smart classrooms, and a library,  at an affordable fee.

reviews.review_heading: The college experience is good.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, and all the equipment is needed for experiments. The mess food offers both non-veg and veg options, and food quality is average. The best part about the mess is that it has a facility for fast food, which is good. The worst part is the hostel, as the infrastructure is good, but the availability of the network is poor. It does not have Wi-Fi, but it has LAN in each room with a speed of 200 Mbps. However, the problem with the LAN is that it sometimes disconnects and stays down for a...

reviews.review_heading: College Review of IIITDM Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. It includes lecture halls, libraries, hostels, administration, and labs. Hostel facilities are not that great, and for medical issues, they provide medicine facilities from the primary healthcare center within our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Inside view of IIITDM Jabalpur from a 3rd-year student.
reviews.review_text: The lecture hall and tutorial complex are very nice at IIITDM Jabalpur. All the classrooms are smart classes, and LHTC is Wi-Fi-enabled (more than 70%). The library has more than enough books from all fields of academics in engineering and also has books of fiction. Hostels are also good, and the hostel rent is only 11,000 INR, which is very nominal. First and second-year students are put in Hall 3 and Hall 4, which are triple sharing, whereas for third and fourth-year students, the college prov...

reviews.review_heading: Huge campus. Very less fest. Cultural clubs are very active. Good placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available almost everywhere. Classrooms are big and few can accommodate up to 300 students. There are library and computer center where we can go and study and use it also. There is a core complex for all labs like mechanical and ECE. All labs are well-maintained. college_info.intro:
Among the different courses at SRM University a few stand out as the flagship programmes of the institute being its BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) and MBA programmes.
SRMIST University Kattankulathur Tamil Nadu is also known for its MBA programme, with state-of-the-art facilities and experienced faculty. The SRMIST MBA programme is extended for a duration of two years across a range of specialisations, some of which are shown here:
Another particular popular course choice are the Health Science programmes which are extended in the UG, PG, and Post-PG levels under a number of specialisations such as Pharmacy, Physiotherapy, Public Health, etc. Interested students can learn more about SRMIST Kattankulathur and its MSc programme below:

faqs.question: Can a student join SRM IST without an entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The deemed-to-be university accepts GATE score for M.Tech admission. However, aspirants who have not qualified GATE can also get admission to M.Tech course by qualifying SRMJEEE (PG) conducted by the university. SRM will conduct SRMJEEE in two phases. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to attend the counselling and document verification round. Only after the payment of course fee, admission is confirmed in the university.
faqs.question: Is GATE required for M.Tech admission at SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur?

faqs.answer: A:    The university fee structure is cumulative of several components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. A few of these components are one-time payable, while some have are charged annually/semesterly. SRM IST Chennai MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.9 Lacs and INR 11.5 lakh. Moreover, the one-time fee range between INR 1,200 and INR 11,000 and the hostel charges range between INR 1.45 Lacs and INR 3.3 lakh.The fee mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for SRM University MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    SRM Institute of Science and Technology admission is entrance-based for most of the courses. The Institute accepts national-level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, TANCET, NATA, SRMJEEE, SRMJEEM etc. for admission to MBA, BArch, BTech, M.Tech and other courses. Offering more than 80 courses and providing an annual intake of 52 K+, SRM IST offers admission based on the counselling through SRMJEEE e-counselling. To conclude, it is not very difficult to seek admission at SRM IST.

overview_faqs.question: Is the SRM fee refundable?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM IST fee refund policy is based on UGC guidelines. Candidates get full refund at any time between the academic year of admission. Candidates are required to submit an application form signed by them t and their parent in person or online for refund. Candidates get refund to their bank provided in the refund request form. The refund will be processed by RTGS or NEFT.

review_summary.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Lovely days at my college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague, as a lot of students opt out of placements because of their CGPA, and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student, you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. For internships, you have to secure them yourself, as the college gives almost zero support.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best and excellent college.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students got internship. 85 percent of students got placed. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Google, and Microsoft. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top roles are project manager and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in our college. The classrooms are neat and clean with comfortable benches. The washrooms are neat and clean. The labs are good. The books are available in the library. We have good Wi-Fi connection. The hostel facilities are good, and canteen is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Occupational Therapy (BOT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is asia number one of tamilnadu.

content.Placements: 90 above and average package and recruitment process and global and IT value to improve ourselves and prepare for the course. The package level is based on experience and knowledge, companies only give higher level monthly salaries to those who are capable of working in the company. Many companies are offered in my college.
content.Infrastructure: Food is available in the hostel and is strictly maintained. Students have fixed discipline and are given time for breaks in the main canteen. There are many canteens in the college for food, and temples are also present on the campus, as it is a big college in Tamil Nadu SRM campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About good and enjoyable college.

content.Placements: From 7th semester, students become eligible for campus placements. Top companies are Amazon, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HUL, HCL, and so on. I got an offer in 2 companies, Infosys and Base Automation Technologies. The highest package is 51 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA to 5 LPA. 90% of people are easily getting placed, and have plans after getting the placements to work.
content.Infrastructure: The main thing I would like to mention here is library, over 4 lakhs books are placed in the library including IAS, IFS, IPS, central and state government aspirants can also use it. The gym is overall good. Campus timing is 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM, depending on the day of the order and departments. Security is very strict here so students can't do any unnecessary activities inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great campus life, Bad ROI.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague as a lot of students just opt out of placement because of their CGPA and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. Internship you have to secure at your college gives you almost zero support there.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and Classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. Library is also pretty good with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o clock so beware of that.

admission_overview.title: SRM IST Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: SRM Institute of Science and Technology course admission 2026 is currently open. The admission is entrance-based for most of the courses. It accepts national level entrance exams. Some of the accepted exams are CAT, CMAT, GMAT, etc. the university also conducts its own entrance exams for admission to BTech and MTech. Candidates can fill out the application form online.

eligibility_selection.title: SRM IST Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: SRM IST admissions are based on merit or entrance exams scores of the candidates. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. SRM fees for a four-year BTech course are between INR 11 lakh to INR 23.8 lakh. Check below the eligibility and selection for some of the popular SRM Institute of Science and Technology courses: Popular Courses

courses_table.selection_criteria: GMAT/ CAT/ MAT/ TANCET/ CMAT/ NMAT/ SAT/ SRMJEEM + PI

Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate

faqs.answer: No, SRM IST does not accept CUET score for admission to any of its UG & PG courses. The university conducts its in-house entrance exam for BTech and MTech, i.e., SRM JEE. Further, for admission to MBA course, the university accepts scores of national-level entrance exams such as GMAT, CAT, MAT, TANCE, etc. SRM University also offers direct admission to courses such as BA, MSc, etc., based on the merit of last qualifying exams of previous education.
faqs.question: Does SRM Institute of Science and Technology accept CUET?

faqs.answer: Candidates looking for course admissions must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. For UG courses, candidates must complete Class 12 and for PG courses, students must complete graduation. Candidates must also fill or attach their scorecard at the time of applying for the respective courses. The university provides direct admission to courses such as BA, BCom, MSc, etc., based on merit of Class 12. However, for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, BSc, etc., candidates have to also qualify for the entrance exam accepted for the particular courses.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in SRM University using Class 12 board marks?

faqs.answer: SRM University Chennai offers Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) and Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) courses at the UG level in the Medical stream through NEET UG scores followed by round-wise NEET Counselling. As per SRM University Chennai cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 195886 for admission to the MBBS course. The Round 1 closing rank for the same stood at 637582 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For BDS admission, the NEET UG first and last-round closing ranks were 980273 and 980273, respectively.
faqs.question: What is SRM cutoff mark?

faqs.answer: The university fee structure is cumulative of several components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. A few of these components are one-time payable, while some have are charged annually/semesterly. SRM IST Chennai MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.9 Lacs and INR 11.5 lakh. Moreover, the one-time fee range between INR 1,200 and INR 11,000 and the hostel charges range between INR 1.45 Lacs and INR 3.3 lakh.The fee mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for SRM University MBA?

paragraphs: SRM Institute of Technology admissionis a multi-step process. It starts with the release of the application form and concludes with seat allotment. SRM IST admission process can differ from course to course. Aspirants are advised to carefully check the course-specific selection procedure.
Check below the step-wise SRM University admission process:

The applications can be submitted online by visiting the official website atsrmist.edu.in. Students are required to submit a separate application for separate courses. The application fee for each course isINR 1,200.

SRM University accepts various national-level entrance test scores for admissions. It also conducts its own entrance tests, such as SRMJEEL, SRMJEEE and SRMJEEM. Further, the personal interview round is conducted for a few courses. Once all the rounds are completed, it releases an official merit list.

Once selection is done, students are called for the counselling process. In this process, students are allocated a seat in order of their rank and the availability of seats. Those who get a seat are required to participate in document verification process.

courses_data.name: SRM IST BCA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: SRM Institute of Science and Technology offers a BCA course at the UG level. It's a full-time course offered by SRM for candidates who have completed Class 12 from a recognised board of education with a minimum of 50% aggregate. To get more details about the BCA programme refer to the table below:

faqs.question: Does SRM University campus offers the BCA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Kattanlkulathur campus of SRMIST offers BCA programme. It is a three-year UG course. For admission to the programme, aspirants should have passed Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate. In addition, aspirant should have studied either of the mandatory subjects -Mathematics/Business Mathematics/Statistics/Allied Mathematics.The seat allotment is carried out based on merit in the last qualifying examination.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for BCA at SRM University Chennai?
faqs.answer: SRMIST Chennai fees has tuition fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc.The total tuition fee ranges betweenINR 1.3 lakh and INR 3.8 lakh. The fees also includes registration fee of INR 5,000.

faqs.question: How the admission process happens for BCA in SRM Chennai? Is there any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Check the steps below for SRM Chennai admission process for BCA:1: SRMIST BCA Application ProcessCandidates have to apply online for BCA. The application fee for BCA is INR 1,200.2: Shortlisting of StudentsThe applications are further scanned by the authorities.3: Admission ConfirmationThe selected candidates then have to submit important documents for verification and pay the fee for course admisssion. Course commencement and orientation details are provided to the students by the institute.

faqs.question: Is it compulsory to have Maths to pursue BCA from SRM University Chennai?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying based on their Class 12 scores must have Maths or Business Mathematics/Statistics/Allied Mathematics. However, those who wish to apply on their basis of their Diploma in Engineering don't need the same. Candidates must have passed the qualifying exam with the minimum aggregate, i.e., 50%.

courses_data.name: SRM IST MTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: SRM Institute of Science and Technology offers a MTech course for two-years at the PG level across various specialisations. The university offers MTech in Aerospace, Power Electronics & Drives, Computer Science and Engineering w/s Full stack, etc. The university also offers part-time BTech programme for three-years in Cloud Computing and Block Chain (empowered by Great Learning) , Cyber Security (empowered by Great Learning) and Structural Engineering. Candidates who have completed graduation can apply for MTech.

faqs.question: How can I join SRM University MTech course?
faqs.answer: The deemed-to-be university accepts GATE score for admission to M.Tech course. However, aspirants who have not qualified GATE can also get admission to M.Tech course by qualifying SRMJEEE (PG) conducted by the university. SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur will conduct SRMJEEE in two phases. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to attend the counselling and document verification round. Only after the payment of course fee, admission is confirmed in the university.

faqs.question: What is the M.Tech fee at SRM Kattankulathur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for SRM IST M.Tech is INR 3.20 Lacs - INR 17.50 lakh. The fee also includes the integrated MBA fees. Candidates need to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds.However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package offered during SRM University placements?
faqs.answer: The SRM highest package offered during the 2025 placement drive stood at INR 65 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered during placements 2024 was INR 52 LPA . The following table showcases the highest package for placements between 2023 and 2025: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) Placement Statistics (2025) Highest Package INR 57 LPA INR 52 LPA INR 65 LPA

faqs.question: How many high paying offers were provided during SRM Kattankulathur placements?
faqs.answer: During the SRM Kattankulathur 2025 placements, recruiters offered over 4,227 high-paying jobs. In 2024, the participating recruiters presented over 3,295 high-paying job offers to the students. The total number of high-paying job offers provided during SRM placements between 2024 and 2025 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Placement Statistics (2025) Total high paying job offers 3,295+ 4,227

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Sc students at SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Centre?
faqs.answer: SRM Medical College Hospital and Research Centre: Placement package Placements: Students receive the abundance of the practical experience via internships at the SRM Medical Hospitals, that starts from forth-year on. The figure is beyond 70% in terms of placements, and the average starting salary comes up to the figure of 3.5 Lacs per annum, whereas the highest is 15 Lacs per annum. Being directed by public hospitals and clinics, companies may not appoint a large number of graduates, but graduates are often capable of maneuvering themselves into highly ranked positions such as Senior Consultant.

faqs.question: What is the average placement package of SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Kattankulathur?
faqs.answer: The SRMIST average package for 2025 stood at INR 6.68 LPA. Earlier, the average package for 2024 placements stood at INR 7.13 LPA and in 2023 it was INR 10.5 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during SRM Kattankulathur BTech CSE placements?
faqs.answer: The SRM average package CSE offered during the 2025 placement drive is yet to be published on the official website. Once the SRM average package CSE is released, it will be updated on this page. However, the overall average package during SRM placement in 2025 stood at INR 6.68 LPA. The same is tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2025) Average package INR 6.68 LPA The average SRM Institute of Science and Technology packages offered between 2023 and 2025 are presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) Placement Statistics (2025) Average package INR 10.5 LPA INR 7.13 LPA INR 6.68 LPA

faqs.question: How much does BTech cost in SRM University?
faqs.answer: SRM Institute of Science and Technology BTech fees has multiple components, like tuition fee, security deposit, & more. The UG level programme are available with the tuition fees of INR 11 lakh to INR 23.8 lakh. The mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
