nirf.description:
SRM Institute of Science and Technology has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SRM Institute of Science and Technology indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. SRM Institute of Science and Technology's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 11 ranks to #21 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 6 ranks to #12 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 15 ranks to #13 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 4 ranks to #11 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: SRM University has 14 blocks for boys and 7 blocks for girls. All the hostels have hi speed Wi-Fi connectivity and are provided with solar water have heating systems, mineral water supply, water cooler in each floor, generator power supply.Students are offered with healthy and sumptuous food options at highly subsidized rates and can choose to have North Indian or South Indian menu in the dining halls that are co-located. the hostels also offer a multi-cuisine dining facility providing Thai, Chinese and continental food for the benefit of our international students,.Rooms with single cot ,study table & chair, cupboard & common mirror are available. Most hostels have common washrooms, a few blocks are available with attached bath and AC rooms too. Facilities such as gym, prayer halls, games, sports and cultural activities has been facilitated. 3 International hostels with modernized kitchen,library,drinking water, water heater, telephone,power supply, medical care, recreation,stationery shop, laundry point, gym, playground, indoor games, banking facility, a/c dining hall, a/c study hall and one off campus international hostel is also available.
facilities: College Infrastructure: SRM has a well-defined layout in terms of infrastructure. The campus is spread over a large area, with all the basic facilities provided. There are huge grounds and indoor courts for sports; the gymnasium is made for the students of the college. The library is technically advanced and has a good collection of books. The classrooms are well maintained with smart boards installed, and the washrooms are clean. The canteen has diverse varieties of food that are hygienic and affordable.

Academics: CSE has proven to be a good course for me as it aligns with my interests and liking for computers and programming. The course is well updated, and even the curricula followed in college fall in line with the skills required in the job sector. The course has a lot of research and practicality, which definitely makes one job-ready. The teachers are cooperative and experienced, and they mentor each student at every point.

Placements: Approximately 70% of the students get hired in the recruitment drive held by the college. The placement drive is held in the most efficient manner. The average package is around 5 LPA, which is a good kickstart for any student in their respective fields. The college has a placement cell that is responsible for inviting firms to the college and guiding fellow students in getting placed, hence making the college supportive. The placements must be inclusive of all the courses, which is a demerit.

Value-for-money: The annual tuition fee structure was a bit on the expensive side, as my yearly fee was around 3 lacs p/a, which might not be affordable for many students. But the quality of services and education, with all the basic amenities, make SRM worth the investment. Personally, SRM is making each penny count.

Campus Life: Though the college is isolated from the main part of the city, it is glorious from the inside. There are sports activities in the college and many cultural societies, like dance and music societies. Moreover, there are various clubs that keep on participating in educational competitions. Various seminars are held and several festivals are conducted throughout the year, making college life happen. There's a medical room to handle any emergency as and when it arises!

library.description: The university library is fully air conditioned 15 storey building comprises a rich collection of books covering various branches of Engineering and Technology, Medical and Health Sciences and Science and Humanities. The library has stocked 140518 volumes of books consisting of 61289 titles. The collection also includes 1550 handbooks & 200 encyclopedias. Back volume is about 4105.  8235 above project thesis. 781 standards which include BIS, ISA & IEEE. Around 5938 books CDs, 2710 journal CDs, 25 encyclopedia on CDs, 20 self learning tutorials, 850 video programs are available in the library.Cumulative database of nearly 2.52 lakh records covering the period from 1990 - 1999 are available. The library building is fully air-conditioned and automated. Photocopy facility is available in the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Hockey Ground

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SRM School of Management, SRMIST - SRM Institute of Science and Technology, ChennaiReviewed on 24 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Lovely days at my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

reviews.review_heading: Best and excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. The classrooms are neat and clean with comfortable benches. The washrooms are neat and clean. The labs are good. The books are available in the library. We have good Wi-Fi connection. The hostel facilities are good, and canteen is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by College of Occupational Therapy, SRM IST, KattankulathurReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is asia number one of tamilnadu.
reviews.review_text: Food is available in the hostel and is strictly maintained. Students have fixed discipline and are given time for breaks in the main canteen. There are many canteens in the college for food, and temples are also present on the campus, as it is a big college in Tamil Nadu SRM campus.

reviews.review_heading: About good and enjoyable college.
reviews.review_text: The main thing I would like to mention here is library, over 4 lakhs books are placed in the library including IAS, IFS, IPS, central and state government aspirants can also use it. The gym is overall good. Campus timing is 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM, depending on the day of the order and departments. Security is very strict here so students can't do any unnecessary activities inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Vibrant college life at SRM.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure and facilities, it is very good. It has high-tech labs and a good Wi-Fi connection. It has a huge central library containing all kinds of books where students can go to study and read in their free time. The classrooms are equipped with CCTV, smart boards, and projectors, and all are in very good condition. The hostel rooms are very good, with nice furniture. The food is fine and has a variety, plus there are lots of canteen cafes plus the sports facilities are good to...

reviews.review_heading: It’s good, but it feels boring sometimes.
reviews.review_text: It has good lab facilities and solid infrastructure. Canteens are available everywhere, but they have computer science labs in most of the buildings. However, the Wi-Fi is very bad. There are certain criteria that students must follow. Overall, it's excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, solid infrastructure, supportive faculty, and a relevant BCA data science course.
reviews.review_text: SRM IST has good infrastructure for BCA Data Science. Classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated, labs are equipped with modern computers and software, and Wi-Fi is reliable across campus. The library has a decent collection of books and digital resources. Hostels are clean with basic amenities, and the mess food is average but edible while the canteen offers a variety of snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports and games facilities like basketball, cricket, and indoor gam...

reviews.review_heading: Great CSE and good placement, good faculty and good future, good labs and great outcome.
reviews.review_text: CSE has high-speed Wi-Fi and multiple modern computer labs. Smart AC classrooms and a well-equipped, big library and digital courses like IEEE, Springer, NPTEL. Hostels are clean with Wi-Fi, AC and non-AC options, laundry and good security. Mess food is average, and there is an excellent medical facility 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The classrooms and labs have very good infrastructure. College has a very big library, which is a real value for money. The facilities in the hostel are a bit for me, but the food is very good. Medical and sports facilities are great.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by SRM Kattankulathur Dental College and Hospital University Main CampusReviewed on 24 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for BDS and a hospital.
reviews.review_text: The surroundings of the college are pretty great, it has everything in its locality. There is a gym, restaurant, hotels, turf, Game Centre, cafes and a lot of exploring options around the college. I stayed in the hostel for 3 years. They only have a very limited number of AC rooms. And you cannot get a single room. The food quality is terrible. There are many departments like the pharmacology department, pathology department, biochemistry department, microbiology depth, moral pathology departmen...

reviews.review_heading: It is a very expensive college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very big and beautiful. There are many places to eat on campus, such as Subway, Domino's, etc. Hostels are very clean. There are vending machines in every hostel, but they are not stocked properly. The mess food is very good. There are free gyms available, but the machines are not good and they are very crowded. The library is also crowded, and it is hard to find a place to sit. They have well-maintained facilities for sports like a basketball court, volleyball court, Gyms and so o...

college_info.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology

data.description: SRM University Kattankulathur has reputed faculty with over 2,000 members . These include teaching and non-teaching staff. International faculty also visit the campus regularly. This provides students with a wide range of perspectives, and creates a vibrant environment. Most of the teaching staff is qualified and hold PhDs.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Kattankulathur

likes.text: SRM has good placement record and gives the opportunity to grow in the career and many of companies visit the campus.
Top recruiting companies were Wipro, Cognizant, TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, IBM giving job offers to hundreds of students from our department.
Roles like software developer intern, software development engineer, associate cloud engineer, full-stack developer, data science intern, and site reliability engineer are offered to the students.
Placements are good because every student gets ample opportunities to get a job, But it depends on your academic percentage and department.

BDes students are taught subjects such as Foundation of Art and Fashion Apparel Design (Kids Wear with a Design collection), Basic Design (Development of design using basic elements), The Illustration Art and Flat Rendering, History of Art (Past & Present scenario of art), Life drawing (Live model sketching, Outdoor sketching & 3D modeling), and others. reviews_list.batch_info: Masters Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best interior design college with well-structured and organised courses.

review_content.Placements: Almost all students got placements in 2024, and internship opportunities are lavish. They have very good and highly recognised collaborations with big brands, fashion houses, and designers. The salary range was decent like 6-8.5 LPA. My seniors told us that companies like Times of India, Disney, Zara, Zee, etc., visit the college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. CAD labs are excellent. Products and tools are available with the best quality. Stationery items are also available on the campus. Books are also available in the library, which is really good. IIFD has the best and most modern classrooms with projectors.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Totally satisfied with IIFD because of its teachers, good placements, and top-class facilities.

review_content.Placements: IIFD has a dedicated placement cell that strongly helps students during placements. Many of my good friends who already pass out from IIFD Chandigarh got placed right after graduation. Around 85% of students in their batch were placed. Many of them are now working with top brands.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have fast Wi-Fi, better conditions labs, good looking classrooms, and a small library that needs magazines and books. They have very limited indoor sports. Hostel is only for girls now and many of my friends are staying there. They have a good experience in IIFD hostel.

review_summary.college_name: IIFD Chandigarh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Interior Design (BID) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good design college with fine facilities.

content.Placements: I am currently studying interior design in a UG course which is for 4 years. I really enjoy and gain new skills at IIFD. The seniors told me the truth about the college that in 2023, the packages can go up to 9 LPA - 10 LPA depending upon our skills and portfolio.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities at IIFD are top-notch. They have a full CCTV-secured campus and offer free Wi-Fi. Our campus is clean and has a greenery area where we can have fun or sit with our friends. There is a book space. Labs and stationery are also available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college with excellent faculty members, and I gained good skills at IIFD.

content.Placements: Good placements are available at IIFD after graduate. Industry top and reputed companies, brands, and designers are offered jobs at IIFD placement cell. During the semester end, they can also help us find internships. All of my batches are sent to the various job openings to try out. There is no issue regarding placement offers.
content.Infrastructure: They have great classrooms and interactive lectures. It is a very healthy atmosphere for studying. Campus gives me a good vibe, and is fully under CCTV surveillance. The college provides us free Wi-Fi facility. We have an open greenery area with good seating arrangements. There is a book self and labs with the latest software available. All things are very well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Masters Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best interior design college with well-structured and organised courses.

content.Placements: Almost all students got placements in 2024, and internship opportunities are lavish. They have very good and highly recognised collaborations with big brands, fashion houses, and designers. The salary range was decent like 6-8.5 LPA. My seniors told us that companies like Times of India, Disney, Zara, Zee, etc., visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. CAD labs are excellent. Products and tools are available with the best quality. Stationery items are also available on the campus. Books are also available in the library, which is really good. IIFD has the best and most modern classrooms with projectors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Totally satisfied with IIFD because of its teachers, good placements, and top-class facilities.

content.Placements: IIFD has a dedicated placement cell that strongly helps students during placements. Many of my good friends who already pass out from IIFD Chandigarh got placed right after graduation. Around 85% of students in their batch were placed. Many of them are now working with top brands.
content.Infrastructure: We have fast Wi-Fi, better conditions labs, good looking classrooms, and a small library that needs magazines and books. They have very limited indoor sports. Hostel is only for girls now and many of my friends are staying there. They have a good experience in IIFD hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Designing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Totally worth getting a part of IIFD!

content.Placements: The College gives us lots of chances to learn and get ready for our future careers. The college offers an average package of 8-10 LPA to the students. IIFD Chandigarh is one of the best colleges in terms of education quality & placements. They offer assured placements.
content.Infrastructure: I am doing B.Sc. in Interior Design, a Bachelor degree programme in interior designing. My course includes 40% theory and 60% practical part, such as live projects, case studies, and workshops. IIFD has modern labs with the latest software collection.

paragraphs: IIFD Chandigarh admissionsare completely merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. Find below the step-wise explanation of the admission process at IIFD Chandigarh:
STEP 1: IIFD Chandigarh Application Process 2026

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://iifd.in/online-application/., for admission to the various programme. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
Students are selected based on merit. However, candidates must meet the last educational qualification set by the college. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIIFD Chandigarh feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing B.Sc. from IIFD Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: After completing B.Sc. Fashion Design at IIFD Chandigarh, you can get numerous job opportunities. These may range from being a fashion designer, costume designer, or fashion illustrator to that of a fashion merchandiser. The other professions after which one can work may include trend forecasters, fashion influencers, and even the production manager. All this curriculum provides the students with all the knowledge regarding designs, marketing, and textiles involved. The Indian fashion industry is booming fast, and graduates can expect competitive salary packages. The starting packages between INR 15,000 and 2 LPA, depending on the role and experience.

hostel_campus.college_name: IIFD Chandigarh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A good design college with fine facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities at IIFD are top-notch. They have a full CCTV-secured campus and offer free Wi-Fi. Our campus is clean and has a greenery area where we can have fun or sit with our friends. There is a book space. Labs and stationery are also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with excellent faculty members, and I gained good skills at IIFD.
reviews.review_text: They have great classrooms and interactive lectures. It is a very healthy atmosphere for studying. Campus gives me a good vibe, and is fully under CCTV surveillance. The college provides us free Wi-Fi facility. We have an open greenery area with good seating arrangements. There is a book self and labs with the latest software available. All things are very well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best interior design college with well-structured and organised courses.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. CAD labs are excellent. Products and tools are available with the best quality. Stationery items are also available on the campus. Books are also available in the library, which is really good. IIFD has the best and most modern classrooms with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with IIFD because of its teachers, good placements, and top-class facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have fast Wi-Fi, better conditions labs, good looking classrooms, and a small library that needs magazines and books. They have very limited indoor sports. Hostel is only for girls now and many of my friends are staying there. They have a good experience in IIFD hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Totally worth getting a part of IIFD!
reviews.review_text: I am doing B.Sc. in Interior Design, a Bachelor degree programme in interior designing. My course includes 40% theory and 60% practical part, such as live projects, case studies, and workshops. IIFD has modern labs with the latest software collection.

reviews.review_heading: An Amazing Design College with Top Class Teachers!
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent campus with good vibes. The hostel facility is only for girls. One of my classmates who is from Uttarakhand, stays there and told me that the hostel life at IIFD is amazing. She told me that the food is really tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good Faculty, Placements, and Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The MFA in Interior Design at IIFD is perfect for students who want to take their creative and designing skills to the next level. This advanced program focuses on teaching innovative techniques, area planning, and the use of modern and updated materials.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing Design College. It's really worth choosing IIFD.
reviews.review_text: The Advanced Diploma in Interior at IIFD is supported by the best infrastructure designed to foster creativity and practical development. IIFD has well-designed studios, maintained classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, and every necessary piece of equipment required.

reviews.review_heading: My experience is really nice. IIFD is overall the best textile design college in India.
reviews.review_text: The college has a big space and a beautiful campus. I really have good vibes there. The infrastructure available is also nice, and the college campus has Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, a library, and other necessary facilities for students. A hostel facility is only available for girls. The food in the mess was really good.

reviews.review_heading: Great platforms and facilities.
reviews.review_text: High quality infrastructure in the campus provided the best lavish environment for students to work on assignments. All stationary available inside the campus, high quality dress forms and grading tables for professional experience. The building design has great ventilation, fully air conditioned building with projectors for professional presentations.

reviews.review_heading: The education quality provided is awesome, and the campus is cheerful.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are available for different disciplines and subjects. The classrooms have projectors. There are a lot of opportunities to follow your passion in dance, music etc. The hostels are very joyful to stay.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied and feel lucky to be part of IIFD.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good here. There are air-conditioned classrooms and labs. I am a day scholar, but my friends told me that the hostel is very comfortable to stay in. There is Wi-Fi all over the two campuses. The fashion labs are awesome and provide good practical exposure for the course.

reviews.review_heading: Best Choice for Fashion Design Education.
reviews.review_text: One of the best college in terms of infrastructure. The College campus is really beautiful and inside area is full air conditioned and clean all the time. The college also have free and fast Wi-Fi access, modern classrooms, dedicated labs for draping and pattern making.

reviews.review_heading: Inspiring faculty, a good curriculum and assured placement.
reviews.review_text: My course MFA in fashion at IIFD having a good infrastructure, it totally designed to enhance creativity and practical learning. The facilities include well maintained design studies, stitching and pattern making labs as well as textile workshops to give us more exposure.

reviews.review_heading: Good team of faculty and infrastructure! Overall perfect college for fashion designing.
reviews.review_text: The college has good and beautiful campus area. It has Wi-Fi, sitting space, modern classrooms with projectors, separate labs for stitching, pattern making and computer labs for CAD. They also have a hostel near to the campus with all needed amenities.

review_summary.college_name: Veer Narmad Gujarat University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty good placements in 2027.

content.Placements: There are 50 percent of students placed in our course BBA. The highest package offered is 25000, the lowest package offered is 15000, and the average package offered is 10000. 80 percent of students got their internship in the BBA course in so many companies, like Reliance and Tata, and so many other companies that have high posts.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our course are very good and are well equipped. Wi-Fi and labs are good, the library is average in our college. The quality of the hostel is very good, and the mess is also good. Canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are average in college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (B.C.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good learning environment, but infrastructure needs improvement.

content.Placements: In our BCA batch, around 40-50% of students were placed, mostly through local IT companies and small tech firms. The highest package was about 3.5 LPA, the lowest around 1.8 LPA, and the average package remained near 2.2-2.5 LPA. Nearly 30% of students received internships in areas like IT support, data entry, and basic web development. Top recruiters included nearby software companies, service agencies, and digital firms from Vapi and Surat. The most common roles offered were Junior Developer, Data Entry Operator, Technical Support Assistant, and Web Designer Trainee. Overall, placements were decent for motivated students.

admission_overview.college_name: Veer Narmad Gujarat University Course Admissions 2025: Courses, Application Process, Reservation Policy, Exams, FAQs

paragraphs: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) admissionsare merit and entrance-based.Veer Narmad South Gujarat University coursesare offered in Art, Science, Management, Commerce, Law, Architecture, etc. Admission to most courses atVNSGUis based on course-specific entrance exams. The university conducts course entrance exams and grants seats based on applicants’ performance in the test.
Check the below infographic for Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) admissions process:

The Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) offers 30+ courses at UG, PG, diploma, certificate and doctoral level. Find below the eligibility and selection process for the various courses of VNSGU:

The Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) offers more than 30 courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, certificate, and doctoral levels. Below are the fees and seat intake for the variousVNSGU coursesoffered by the university:

Aspirants can use the online application portal to apply for admission to Veer Narmad South Gujarat University. However, it is recommended to check the eligibility criteria before filling out the application form. Once the application fee is paid, the form can be successfully submitted. Here is a breakdown of the admission procedure for VNSGU:Application Process:Candidates willing to be admitted at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University must fill out the university’s application form by paying the required registration fee for final submission.

Selection Round:Veer Narmad South Gujarat University admission is bothmeritandentrance exam-based.For admission to courses like MBA, VNSGU accepts admission based on valid scores in CMAT and for the majority of the programmes,and for courses like BA, BCom, BSc the selection is based on their marks in the qualifying exam.

Admission Confirmation:After the successful completion of the selection process, candidates will be required to report to the admission cell at VNSGU for document verification and fee payment leading to final seat allotment.
For more details about Admission process of VNSGU check out the below video:

faqs.question: What jobs can I get after completing BCom from VNSGU Surat?
faqs.answer: After completing the Veer Narmad South Gujarat University BCom course, students have a broad career scope to explore. This is because pursuing a BCom course helps students gain knowledge of various concepts, such as financial management, Cost Accounting, Time Value of Money, etc. Mentioned below are a few job profiles for BCom degree holders to pursue and their corresponding average salaries: Auditor: INR 3.5 - 5.5 LPA Insurance Advisor: INR 2.5 - 4 LPA Business Executive: INR 2 - 4.5 LPA Accountant: INR 2.5 - 4 LPA Consultant: INR 3 - 5 LPA

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy at VNSGU for BA?
faqs.answer: VNSGU provides a fee refund if a student wishes to cancel the admission. However, it is subject to fulfillment of eligibility criteria for fee refund. Tabulated below is the percentage of refund and the eligibility requirements: Percentage of Refund of fees Eligibility 100% 15 days before the formally notified last date of admission 90% Less than 15 days before the formally notified last date of admission 80% 15 days or less after the formally notified last date of admission 50% 30 days or less, but more than 15 days after being formally notified last date of admission No refund More than 30 days after being formally notified of the last date of admission Note: The above information is as per the official sources. However, it’s still subject to changes.

faqs.question: Is studying at VNSGU expensive?
faqs.answer: No, Veer Narmad South Gujarat University is considered to be affordable for most students. The fee structure of the programme ranges between INR 23,000 - INR 7.68 lakh. The fee structure includes multiple components tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the entrance tests or last qualifying exam as required for the VNSGU Surat admission process.

description: VNSGU Surat cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:
VNSGU Surat NEET Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the MBBS course for all rounds and categories under the All India quota. The cutoff was in the form of opening and closing ranks.

For the General AI category, the 2025 last round cutoff was 5503. On the other hand, for the OBC AI category, the cutoff in the last round was 8149. This difference in the ranks means that the competition for the General AI category is higher than the OBC AI category.

In this section, students can know the category, round, college, and quota-wise cutoff ranks for 2025, 2024 and 2023. According to the VNSGU Surat MBBS Cutoff 2025, the General AI category has a cutoff in the last round in 2025 at 3869. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff for the same course and category was 3080 and 3590, respectively. This difference in the ranks means that the competition for the General AI category has been fluctuating.

Since admission for the academic year 2025-26 is now closed, candidates can see the table below to know when the next academic year enrolment starts. The table below contains the NEET UG important dates 2026 for admission to the MBBS course at this university.

The NEET UG counselling process is crucial for admission to the MBBS course at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University. In the 2025-26 academic batch, there were 3 rounds of counselling conducted, with different qualifying ranks in each. Analysing the past year cutoff trend helps students know what the qualifying ranks could be for the next academic session. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the round and year-wise cutoff for 2025, as well as for 2024 and 2023.

VNSGU Surat NEET PG cutoff 2025 was published for admission to MD and MS courses. The cutoff was out in the form of opening and closing ranks till round 2 for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI quota, the round 2 cutoff ranged from 1194 to 32127, with the hardest course for admission being MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy, as it had the lowest cutoff rank. To know the round 2 cutoff for other offered courses, students can see below.

According to the VNSGU Surat MD cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the two easiest MD course specialisations for enrolment were MD in Bio-Chemistry, followed by MD in Pathology, with the cutoff being 32127 and 31181, respectively.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff details for other categories and courses for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

Only those students who appeared in the NEET PG entrance examination can appear in the counselling process conducted by the MCC. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the consolidated PDF list for various rounds for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

VNSGU Surat cutoff 2023 is based on GUJCET scores followed by the Counselling. The institution gants admission to the MBA, MCA, and B.Arch. courses via GUJCET. However, the admission got closed after the release of Round 3 seat allotment result. Based on GUJCET Round 1 seat allotment, the BHU cutoff 2023 has been released for B.Arch course, which stood at 20173 for the General AI category candidates. Candidates seeking admission to the VNSGU B.Arch course can refer to the table given below to ch
Candidates can check the latest round-wise consolidated lists for VNSGU cutoff 2023 and 2021 from the table below:

VNSGU Surat NATA cutoff 2024 was concluded for B.Arch at the UG level. As per the VNSGU cutoff 2024 concluding round, the B.Arch course cutoff stood at, 21181 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
VNSGU Gujarat accepts NATA scores for admission to the undergraduate courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NATA dates regarding UG admission.

VNSGU Surat Counselling 2024 has been concluded for admission to the B.Arch courses for various categories such as General AI category. Students can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise counselling latest round seat allotment results:

Other than NEET PG, VNSGU also offers MD and MS courses through Gujarat NEET PG, followed by counselling. As per VNSGU Gujarat NEET PG cutoff 2022, the Round 1 closing rank was 261 for MDS in Public Health Dentistry under General AI category students. Below is the Round 1 and Last-round closing rank for the BHU MDS course for the General category students under the AI quota.

VNSGU Surat accepts Gujarat NEET scores for admission to MBBS course. The cutoff scores were released for different categories under the Home State quota. As per VNSGU Surat cutoff 2024 for the Round 1, the MBBS course's cutoff stood at 13159 for Government Medical College, Surat for the students belonging to the General Home State category.

The VNSGU Surat cutoff 2024 has been released for all the MBA and MCA courses. The cutoff was released for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories as opening and closing ranks for All India and Home State categories. The VNSGU Surat cutoff 2024 for the last-round ranged between 9910047 and 9928002 for the General AI category students. Considering the cutoff data, a fluctuating trend can be visible to the candidates belonging to General AI category. For more information, candidates can

Admission to VNSGU Surat were conducted in 2023 based on the Gujarat University's separate exam for Home State category candidates. In 2023, for the General Home State category, only Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) course's cutoff was released at a cutoff rank of 56.26. Similarly, for the OBC quota, the cutoff rank stood at 46.19.
The relevant questions for VNSGU Surat are given below:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vidyabharti Trust College of BBAReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty good placements in 2027.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course are very good and are well equipped. Wi-Fi and labs are good, the library is average in our college. The quality of the hostel is very good, and the mess is also good. Canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are average in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by R.K. Desai Achchhariwala College of Computer and Applied SciencesReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment, but infrastructure needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The college provides basic but useful facilities for students. Classrooms are clean and spacious, and the computer labs have the required systems for practical work, though the infrastructure is simple. The library offers course-related books and a quiet space for study. Wi-Fi is available in some areas of the campus. The college also has a small canteen, sports ground, and seminar hall for events. While the facilities are not modern or high-tech, they are sufficient for regular academic learnin...

reviews.review_heading: Placements are poor, and the campus environment lacks vibrancy, activities, or practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good overall, with a decent campus and clean classrooms. However, there are a few major limitations. The college does not provide hostel facilities. Most of the students are from Surat. Those who are not live in PGs (mostly Rs. 7,000–Rs. 8,000 per month) or in shared flats (5–6 students per flat), and a few live in the government hostel called Samras Hostel. There is no Wi-Fi access for students. It is only for administrative use. Additionally, the institute does not ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SDJ International CollegeReviewed on 2 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college has very best and experienced faculty with a Ph.D. degree; this ensures the best study.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like smart boards and proper benching in college are available. Library and computer lab have more than 4 workstations available with internet connection. College also has many celebration festivals, and the Inferno, which is the main fest of this college, gained fame in the whole of Surat.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shri Uttar Gujarat B. B. A. CollegeReviewed on 2 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It’s good for leaving students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. Our department has modern Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped specialized labs like IoT and Embedded Systems. Hostel facilities are very affordable and secure, though the mess food quality can be inconsistent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SDJ International CollegeReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement. Infrastructure and facilities are good, and I am satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Various basic facilities are available at the college. The computer science lab, canteen, and library can seat more than 50 students to read, with sports tournaments, etc. Satisfaction with the college infrastructure and facilities is high, and various types of events are ongoing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri J S Bhakta And Shri K M Bhakta Arts And Shri A N Shah Science And Shri N F Shah Commerce CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is a good college in Surat.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. The building was renovated a few years ago so the infrastructure is very good. Hostels are available here so students can live here. We can say that many facilities are available here and classrooms are good. The library is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Udhna Citizen Commerce College and S.P.B. College of Business Administration and Smt. Diwaliben Harjibhai Gondaliya College of BCA and ITReviewed on 25 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Students get substantial industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: In this college, there are almost all types of facilities, such as a huge library with all types of books for reading.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Pioneer Homoeopathic Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is very good, and includes a hospital.
reviews.review_text: In our course, there is a CBDC course. It gives all type of knowledge is included in it. In this, we need 50% to pass at least. Every 3 months we have a viva exam that is a periodic assessment, and every 6 months we have a term test in which there is a theory exam as well as a viva exam.  It gives best faculty staff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Narmada College of Science and CommerceReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a place to brighten up ourselves.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 buildings for all courses. There is a separate building for master's course. There is a refreshment point where students sit, talk, and have some snacks. There is a huge ground in college with a cricket pitch. It has a proper basketball court. Narmada College campus is known as a green campus as it has bio-technology, and its campus has a scenic view.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Udhna Citizen Commerce College and S.P.B. College of Business Administration and Smt. Diwaliben Harjibhai Gondaliya College of BCA and ITReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not good, but okay. Students not satisfied because faculty is good, but college management is okay.
reviews.review_text: The quality of things like benches and classrooms are very poor. The computers don't work, and many things related to the classroom are not in good condition. Students are not satisfied with facilities for studying. The campus is good, but overall, the college is just okay, not very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by J. Z. Shah Arts and H. P. Desai Commerce CollegeReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college provided a decent learning environment with helpful faculty and basic facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent. Classrooms are well-maintained. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is well stocked and quiet for study. There was no hostel facility. The food quality in the canteen was moderate, and while basic medical support was available, sports and games facilities were limited.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ambaba Commerce CollegeReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for B.Com in Surat.
reviews.review_text: Gym equipped with all the necessary instruments, high-class library, and classrooms with AC. Different labs for various subjects, each equipped with high-tech quality and modern-day standards. World-class hostel structure, cricket playground, basketball court, and indoor table tennis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SDJ International CollegeReviewed on 7 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A well-rounded experience with balanced academics, facilities, and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: College has excellent infrastructure with well maintained classrooms and libraries. The food in the canteen is hygienic and offers a good variety. Sports and game facilities are impressive encouraging physical activity and team spirit. Overall a very nice and supportive environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I recommend students to get admission here.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are full facilities for students who learn computer courses like BCA, MCA, and B.Tech. There are advanced computer labs and an auditorium in our college. There are 3 computer labs, 7 AC classrooms, and 2 AC libraries. In our college, all facilities are of the best quality. The hostel is not available at our college. The food in the canteen is awesome. Sports area is the best. It provides all types of game equipment.

data.description: Yes, Veer Narmad South Gujarat University does offer hostel facilities. Students who are officially admitted to a course offered at the main campus of the university and wish to reside on campus opt for hostel facilities. As per the official website, there are separate hostel facilities available for boys and girls. Moreover, as per student reviews present on Shiksha, the university offers good hostel facilities. The university's in-house hostels provide quality food, electricity, and a strict but secure environment.

college_info.college_name: IDeA World College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: IDeA World College admissions 2025 are open for various courses.

college_info.intro:
IDeA World College popular programmes are BDes, BSc in Design, and diploma courses. While studying BDes, students will be offered one year of a fully paid internship. Students are given an opportunity to take part in the various live projects and participate in several international design exhibitions. The student's work is showcased in various world-leading publications offline and online. IDeA World College is ranked among the top 10 design institutes in India.
IDeA World College is visited by top companies such as Raymond, Puma, Tommy Hilfiger, and others. IDeA World College has professional faculty members. IDeA World College faculty motivates students to work on their knowledge and skills. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by IDeA World College and their respective eligibility and IDeA World College fee structure:

student_insights.feedback: Offered every semester
Students can work with faculty on research projects
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IDeA World College offers UG, PG, and diploma courses to students. These courses are provided across Interior Design, Fashion Design, Graphic Design, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BSc (2 courses), BVA, and BDes (3 courses) to students. At the PG level, the college offers PG Diploma options (3 courses) to students. The college also provides a UG Diploma (5 courses) to students. Below mentioned are some of the IDeA World College courses and their respective eligibility and IDeA World College fee:

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Top interior design Diploma in Bangalore.

review_content.Placements: I have just started this course about a few months ago, therefore I cannot say much in that regard. The placement drive only starts after our interior design Diploma course. The college provides a 100 percent placement assistance, and I find it really hopeful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is lovely. As an interior design student, I find it absolutely a treat how well-designed the college is. The classrooms are big and spacious. They have glass walls instead of regular ones. It is really beautiful. We do not have an hostel here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Best teachers, top Fashion Design College.

review_content.Placements: The top roles vary in different sectors, and since I am just in my first year, I am not very sure about the placement process, but from what I have heard, the college provides 100 percent placement assistance and has a good alumni network, and I am looking forward to when my time comes.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department is great with labs and proper equipment for Fashion Design, the classrooms are nice and well-ventilated, there is no hostel facility, but the administration can guide you regarding nearby stays, and there is a small canteen at my campus where we can usually find chips and cup noodles.

review_summary.college_name: IDeA World College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has top-notch teachers. It offers the best interior design course in Bangalore.

content.Placements: I am just 4 months into the course, and I am not too sure about the placement drive regarding which companies will come or not. I have heard that the last month of the one-year course would be filled with internships and exams. We will find out at that time.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure in general is great. Classrooms are very wide and beautifully designed with glass. As our course is rather practical-work-based, we do not have requirements for any library here. There is a hostel here for students, but they usually guide us to stay at some nice PGs.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best interior design institute in Bangalore.

content.Placements: The environment here provides a better opportunity to get placements in relation to interior designing. The institution is keen on making us train in such a way that it becomes easier for the final rounds. Apart from that, placements also come with good exposure towards the industry, so that's another plus point.
content.Infrastructure: The college itself is pretty immersive, with well-established classrooms. Many facilities are available, such as air-conditioners and digital learning. It even provides a mini snacks counter for students. All items are well-furnished. The college itself is decorated to inspire an interior awareness.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Top interior design Diploma in Bangalore.

content.Placements: I have just started this course about a few months ago, therefore I cannot say much in that regard. The placement drive only starts after our interior design Diploma course. The college provides a 100 percent placement assistance, and I find it really hopeful.
content.Infrastructure: The college is lovely. As an interior design student, I find it absolutely a treat how well-designed the college is. The classrooms are big and spacious. They have glass walls instead of regular ones. It is really beautiful. We do not have an hostel here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best teachers, top Fashion Design College.

content.Placements: The top roles vary in different sectors, and since I am just in my first year, I am not very sure about the placement process, but from what I have heard, the college provides 100 percent placement assistance and has a good alumni network, and I am looking forward to when my time comes.
content.Infrastructure: The department is great with labs and proper equipment for Fashion Design, the classrooms are nice and well-ventilated, there is no hostel facility, but the administration can guide you regarding nearby stays, and there is a small canteen at my campus where we can usually find chips and cup noodles.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best fashion design college, skilled mentors.

content.Placements: I am in my second year currently. From what I have heard, the batch before our batch, almost everyone got placed, and a few of them opted for higher studies. The college provides a 100% placement assistance as well. Teachers guide us mostly regarding the right internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college is perfectly well put together. I find it Instagram-friendly, to be honest. On the aesthetics side, the college provides an adequate lab for all the assignments. The classrooms have screens for presentation and projections. There is a small canteen for fingerfood on campus too.

highlights.summary:
Babu Banarasi Das University admissions 2026 are currently open for all courses. Interested candidates can go to the official website to apply to the desired course.

The CUET PG exam 2026 will be conducted from Mar 6 to Mar 27, 2026, for admission to several PG courses.

college_info.intro:
Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow consists of more than 10 schools, including the School of Engineering, the School of Management, the School of Legal Studies and the School of Computer Applications, among others. BBDU Lucknow offers various UG, PG, certificate, and PhD courses, across many streams such as management, technology, engineering sciences, legal studies, education, and humanities, among others.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at the university. Baba Banarasi Das University offers the BTech programme in several specialisations, such as Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The popularity of the BTech programme offered at BBDU is attributed to its state-of-the-art engineering school equipped with both modern and traditional ways of learning and excellent faculty. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.

content.Placements: 5 to 10 percent of students are placed in college. The highest package of BBD is 48 LPA in Microsoft btech. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top companies are Microsoft accenture google Flipkart, Cisco, Amazon, TCS etc. 20 to 30 percent of students got intership. The role of the course is to offer b tech and other courses.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.

content.Placements: There are low placements, so we have to get placements on our own capabilities. Only relying on the university will not get us placed. We can expect students to get a package ranging from 2-3 LPA only. Companies that come for placements are HCL, Infosys, etc. We can get internships at IBM, but it's completely based on our skills.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.

content.Placements: Almost every year, 70-80 percent of students get placements. 23-24 LPA is the highest package, the average packages are 3 to 4 LPA, and the mean is 12 to 13 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, etc. are the top companies and recruiters which come in the college for placements. On an average, 32-40% from my course got internships in companies like HCL and Cognizant. paragraphs: Babu Banaras Das University admission 2025is currently open. Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like CLAT, CAT, etc., for admission to specific courses.BBD Universityoffers more than 25 courses through 11 schools at UG, PG, certificate and doctoral levels. The mode ofBabuBanarasi Das University course admissionsis primarilyonline.

Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The University offers courses such asBTech, BSc, BDS, BBA, LLB,etc. at theUG leveland theMBA, MTech, MSc, MCA programmes, etc. at thePG level. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses at BBDU. 1: BBDU Application Process

BBD University application process is conducted both online and offline modes. Candidates must fill in all necessary details and submit the form to confirm candidature. Students can check the detailedBBD University feestructure here.
2: Merit List Publication

Following the application period, the university releases a merit list indicating the minimum required scores for eligibility in various courses. Aspirants meeting or exceeding the cutoff marks proceed to the subsequent selection phase.
3: Counselling Session

After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates must appear for counselling round. After the counselling round, candidates will receive the confirmed seat after completing few more steps.
4: Admission Confirmation
For final admission, shortlisted candidates must pay the fees and confirm the seat. This step finalises the enrollment process at BBDU.

courses_data.description: BBDU offers a MBA programme with a 4 semester duration, provided by the School of Management.The candidates must have achieved at least 50% aggregate in their graduation or equivalent CGPA to be eligible to apply.The shortlisting process involves potential candidates undergoing a national-level entrance examination, which may be either the MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, ATMA, or GMAT, and then counselling the successful ones before they are allowed to join the MBA programme.

courses_data.name: Babu Banarasi Das University  BCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The BBDU Lucknow BCA Course is a three-year course which consists of six semesters. BCA at BBDU Lucknow is offered in three specialisations under the School of Computer Applications.The requirements of the applicants for the BCA course are that they should have completed Class 12.The BCA program at BBDU can be gained by merit with a minimum of 50 per cent in Class 12, and hence it will ensure that students with a strong academic background are considered to undertake this program.

faqs.question: In how many specialisations BCA courses are offered at BBDU?
faqs.answer: BBDU Lucknow's BCA programme spans three years, encompassing six semesters, and is offered in three specializations under the School of CA. The BCA course is offered in three specialisations namely, BCA, BCA in Data Science and AI in Collaboration with IBM andBCA in Cyber Security & Forensics in Collaboration with IBM. The minimum eligibility is passing Class 12. Admission to the BCA programme at BBDU is merit-based, with a minimum requirement of 50% in Class 12.

faqs.question: How to get admission to BCA at BBDU?
faqs.answer: The university shortlist candidates for BCA course based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate can apply for the BCA course. After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants must pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The total course fee for BCA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 2.90 lakh. The fee varies a

faqs.question: How do I get admission to the Babu Banarasi Das University?
faqs.answer: Babu Banarasi Das University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like CLAT, CAT, etc., for admission to specific courses. The mode of BabuBanarasi Das University course admissionsis primarily online. The university offers courses in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Law, Architecture, etc. In addition to this, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation.

faqs.question: How can candidates join Babu Banarasi Das University?

placement_data.title: BBD University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest packages offered at BBD University for engineering, management and BCA/MCA courses stood at INR 23 LPA , INR 10 LPA and INR 10 LPA , respectively for 2024.

Earlier, 142 recruiters participated in the placement process 2023 and placed 1,366 students of the batch 2023. The highest package offered during BBD University placements in 2023 stood at INR 9 LPA. The top recruiters of BBD University placements in 2023 included Amazon, TCS, Infosys, HCL, Wipro , etc.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BBA at BBDU?
faqs.answer: The total course fee for BBA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 4.2 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to BBDU BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50%-55% aggregate to apply for BBA course. The fee for BBA varies as per the specialisation. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.

description: BBDU cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

BBDU NEET UG cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BDS course for various categories under the Home State quota. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks till 4 rounds.

For the General HS category, the BDS cutoff in the last round was 77788. This means that this is the maximum rank at which admissions are allowed. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for the first and last rounds for the General HS quota.

As per the BBDU BDS cutoff 2025, the last round rank was 77788. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff was 304455 and 1078764, respectively, for the General HS quota candidates. After analysing these ranks, we can conclude that the competition for this category for the BDS course has been fluctuating over the years.
To know the cutoff for other courses, categories, rounds, etc., use the filters in the table below.
Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends for the General All India category students:

BBDU accepts UPTAC cutoff ranks for admission to the BE/BTech course. Admission for the year 2025-26 is over. To know when the applications, exams, etc., for the next academic session start, check the table below.
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's UPTAC Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

The BBDU BDS cutoff 2025 can be seen in the table below, along with the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023. Students needed to attain a rank of 77788 or lower to be able to gain admission at this university. This is the requirement for the students under the General HS quota. To know the maximum and minimum cutoff ranks for other rounds, categories and years, students can view the table below.

In this section, students can access the BBDU MDS cutoff 2025, 2024, as well as 2023. As per the first round, the most competitive course was MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, with a cutoff of 4356. On the other hand, the most popular course in the last round was MDS in Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, with the cutoff being 6103.

hostel_campus.college_name: BBDU Lucknow Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel facility for 2000+ boys and 1000+ girls respectively is available in the campus. The hostel accommodation is on twin / triple sharing basis. Each hostel has a recreation room with television and indoor games facility.

library.description: Babu Banarasi Das University library has rich & well-stocked central & school libraries with more than 2,00,000 Books, E-Library, E-Journals, Periodicals and Journals in print as well as in electronic form with online subscription of IEEE, INDEST, Science Direct, Bentham.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Table Tannis

library.description: Babu Banarasi Das University library has rich & well-stocked central & school libraries with more than 2,00,000 Books, E-Library, E-Journals, Periodicals and Journals in print as well as in electronic form with online subscription of IEEE, INDEST, Science Direct, Bentham.

hostel.description: Hostel facility for 2000+ boys and 1000+ girls respectively is available in the campus. The hostel accommodation is on twin / triple sharing basis. Each hostel has a recreation room with television and indoor games facility.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Table Tannis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in  Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Good  college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs. Classes are well-equipped with modern design and devices, such as smart boards, and well-maintained furniture like tables and chairs. Generally, the food is good, and on any special occasion, they bring better food with deluxe parties. The sports facilities are well maintained with good opportunities, welcoming the students to show their talent.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, average placements, and a large green campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good. Labs, classrooms and library are well maintained and properly equipped. As a first year student, our classes are on the 5th floor of 8 floor as well 2 ground floors building, and getting a lift at 9 a. m. is difficult, so we often use the stairs, which actually helps in staying fit. Hostels are in good condition, though not perfect. Mess food is sometimes good and sometimes average, while the canteen food is quite good. Medical facilities are av...

reviews.review_heading: The college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works well, labs are fantastic, and classrooms are spacious and well-equipped. The library is big. Hostels are not very suitable for living. Mess food is so bad that people sometimes get sick. Facilities at BBD (Babu Banarasi Das) institutions in Lucknow generally receive mixed reviews, with hostels often rated average to poor (especially food quality), while medical and sports facilities are usually available. Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs are generally well-regarded.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent in terms of placement, and the quality of study is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good because the buildings are well-maintained, and a beautiful infrastructure is provided by the college. The internal structure of my building is very good. Classrooms are well-maintained, and a digital board is present in all classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: College is good only for rich people, and if anyone comes from middle class, then this is not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Everything is very much okay. But the hostel facilities are not good. The food in the mess is very poor quality. The hostel fees are also very high, they charge 80,000 per annum for three B. Ed rooms, and they don’t provide facilities like high-end amenities. They give only one almirah and one B. Ed with table and chair, and the rooms are very small, so it’s not good.

reviews.review_heading: Small talks about college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, not that bad. It's in working condition and maintained. It's okay working, but they upgraded their infrastructure last year, but it's not that good. They were updated from the last one we had before, so it’s okay, but not that okay. You can work with it.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college to take admission in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Banarasi Das University is not that great. It has average infrastructure. It has a large library, and they also provide Wi-Fi to all the departments. The quality of the hostel is average, and the food was okay. This college also provided a mess.

reviews.review_heading: BBDU Lucknow offers great faculty, placements, and a lively campus for learning and growth.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my course are very good. We get many seminars, we have labs and a classroom with video representation, a proper quiz, and fully AC, centralized AC, and many books related to our course. Our hostel is also good with full safety and security, and we have a proper medical area where students get proper treatment, and the quality of food is also good. There are many options on the menu that they cook regularly, and we also have a proper play area in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. The course completion, the sports game facilities, medical facilities, and mess and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library is well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. However, during the course, the sports, game facilities, medical facilities, mess, and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low-budget studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library is well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor and not worth staying there during the course completion. The sports, game facilities, medical facilities, and mess and canteen facilities are also good.

college_info.college_name: BBDU Lucknow Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total course fee for BBA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 4.2 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to BBDU BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50%-55% aggregate to apply for BBA course. The fee for BBA varies as per the specialisation. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.

The total tuition fee for various course at Babu Banarasi Das University is different as per courses. Students can check the table below to know the total tuition fee for various courses at BBDU Lucknow:

Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow provides several merit and need-based scholarships to students. Some of the scholarships offered at the university include Research Fellowship, Scholarship for SC/ST Category Students, Scholarship for OBC and Minority categories, etc.  The Research Fellowship is offered to PhD students in the form of financial assistance. The university also offers financial assistance to the students coming from the economically weaker sections of the society. The SC/ ST/ OBC scholarships are offered to students belonging to the respective minority community.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Modern College of Arts, Science and Commerce, Progressive Education Society offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for offline learning, students can choose from several streams such as Science and Animation. At the UG stage, courses available include B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.Sc., MCA and M.Com. individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Best college for M. Com in Pune. Approximately 50 percent of students get placements every year, and we can get placement chances by scoring good in end semester exams. The average package for many years is 5–6 LPA, which is so good. There are a lot of alumni who are working in big companies.
content.Infrastructure: There are labs, classrooms, and a library equipped with Wi-Fi and air conditioning. There is good ventilation in each and every room. There are a lot of sports opportunities that any student can get every year. The hostel facilities are also so good.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in CA - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A short review of Modern College of Arts, Science, and Commerce, Pune.

content.Placements: I am a final-year student at Modern College, Pune. Our placement cell has not opened yet, so I don't have any idea about the package offered by the college. I will try to ask my seniors about the internship and the recruiting company for my course. Many companies visit the college to hire students for job placements or internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a small library, a gym, and a small sports room, too, which has basic facilities for students. We also have an auditorium where seminars are conducted. Cultural programmes also take place. The college has a huge parking lot for two-wheelers and four-wheelers, and it also has a medical shop nearby in case of emergency. We also have hostel facilities for outside students to stay.

individual_reviews.title: It’s good for topper students, but normal or average students will be unattended.

content.Placements: Only 10% of students get placement, and the package is also average. They don’t take personal student attention, it’s like, if you want to learn, you learn, or else it’s your decision. No big companies visit for placement, only small companies with packages of 2 to 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Not too good, it’s average teaching with no person-to-person attention to students. individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good course and has helpful faculty.

content.Placements: An average of 70% of students get placed in the B.Sc. CS course. The highest package is 7 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. The average package offered is 4–5 LPA. Companies such as Wipro, Cognizant, Accenture, and TCS visited the campus. Around 80% of students get internships in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. Students have access to Wi-Fi. Labs and library are in good condition.
