reviews.review_text: The college has labs, PC, etc. The library is provided in the college, and this college also has a canteen, which is pretty cheap and reasonable to have a bunch of breakfast at college. The canteen also has a mess system for students and also has a playground for basketball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, and it also has strong security. The food available in the mess is very good, with three meals and two snacks provided daily. Medical facilities are also accessible for students. In our department, classrooms and a library are available for students and are of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Well-rounded psychology program with great faculty and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean. They have projectors. We had a functional psychology lab and access to books in the library. Wi-Fi worked across the campus. The hostel is decent. The mess food is hygienic and medical help was nearby. Sports facilities and common areas were also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for this course.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good library where we can get books related to any course. It also has a reading hall where students can study every day. The hostel is also very good and has security. The food in the hostel is also good. We get food three times a day and two times snacks.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for this course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are very good. The quality of food available in the mess is very good. We get food three times a day and snacks twice a day. The college has good facilities available for sports. The hostel has good security for students.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members of the college are good. Placements are provided in college.
reviews.review_text: Good labs are provided for students in college. The hostel of the college is very good, and they provide 3-time meals and 2 times snacks per day. The hotel has study rooms and TV rooms as well.

Indus University admissions 2026 are open for all courses. Below are the latest updates:

college_info.intro:
Indus University Ahmedabad has various undergraduate, postgraduate & doctorate programs in Engineering, Pharmacy, Life and Basic Sciences, Agriculture, Business Management, Education, Law and Sciences & other fields. Some of prominent programs of university are BSc, BCom, BCom (Hons), BA LLB, BTech, MTech, MBA & several other programs in various specialisations including Aviation, Biomedical, Civil, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cyber Security, Designing, and many more.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at Indus University. Indus University BTech programme here offers ten specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Computer Engineering, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Metallurgical Engineering, Information Technology, and Mechanical Engineering. Also, the Indus University MBA programme here comes in many specialisations such as Integrated MBA, Dual Degree MBA (BBA + MBA), BBA, BCom (Honors) with ACCA UK, MBA, BBA in Aviation, and many more. Below are some of courses offered by Indus University & respective eligibility and Indus University fees:

review_content.Placements: The university has established itself as one of the premier institutions, not only in terms of academic excellence but also in securing the future of its students through 100% placement assistance. The commitment towards career development is evident from the first year itself, as the training and placement cell actively guides students with skill development, personality enhancement, and industry readiness programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recreation centers, and green open space further add to the overall campus appeal.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indus University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: With an emphasis on academics and excellent study resources, Indus University provides MBA students with a positive educational experience. The university's facilities and faculty are first-rate. But unlike some other universities, Indus University has a smaller campus community, and job placement rates are mediocre, with a median salary of $3–4 Lacs annually. The institution offers admission based on graduation results and, in the event that there are open seats, through management quota. To choose the specialisation that best fits their objectives, prospective students should think about their hobbies and career goals.

paragraphs: Indus University admissions start with online registrations. Further, candidates must qualify for the respective entrance exam and fulfil the basic eligibility requirements as per the courses. Check below the detailed steps for the Indus University admission process:
Step 1: Indus University Application Process

Indus University's application process is conducted in an online mode. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the university for their desired programme. While filling the application form, they must submit the supporting documents of previous qualifications and pay an application fee for the respective UG & PG courses.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to Indus University is both merit and entrance-based. For admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, BDes, etc., candidates must qualify for national/ university-level entrance exams. However, the university offers direct admission to courses such as BSc, BCA, BCom, MSc, etc. For some courses, candidates must also appear for the PI round.
Step 3: Final Admission

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the university releases the list of shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIndus University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of

Indus University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Indus University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Indus University JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Indus University.

Indus University GUJCET cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and for all categories and quotas in the form of opening and closing ranks. In 2025, Indus University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, ranged from 15086 to 50896 for students belonging to the General HS quota.

Among all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Information and Communication Technology and B.Tech. in Information Technology were the most competitive for admission in the General HS category. To view the first and last rounds' cuto

GUJCET 2025 cutoff ranks for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course range between 15086 to 50896 in the General HS category. B.Tech. in Information and Communication Technology emerged as the most competitive specialisation for admission, with a last round closing rank of 15086 under the HS quota.
To view the detailed cutoff ranks across different categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options provided below:

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

Indus University accepts NATA scores for admission to the B.Arch course. Indus University cutoff 2024 for B.Arch course has been released for a single round of seat allotment based. As per Indus University cutoff 2024, the closing score for B.Arch was 21182 for the general category All India candidates. Similarly, for the General Home State category candidates, the cutoff for the same course stood at 11431. Tabulated below are the closing scores for NATA for B.Arch course'cutoff:

hostel_campus.college_name: Indus University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostels for boys and girls and also a separate block for international students in the hostel buildings. spacious, well-furnished rooms with 24x7 power supply, Wi-Fi connection, television, water purifier, water cooler and facilities for indoor and outdoor games, fitness center and gym with the latest equipment, first-aid facility and 120 kwh capacities solar power.

library.description: Indus University spread across 600 Sqm, has a well stocked library with collection of over 26000 volumes of books besides subscriptions for more than 250 National and International Journals. It also possesses Electronic Resources on books, journals, project reports along with CDs and DVDs on specific topics of interest. One can also find reprographic facilities in the library. The library has an Online Publication Access Catalogue (OPAC) and institutional membership with ADINET and DELNET providing online access to a large number of e-books and e-journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Playground

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is good, but if you want to study, you can opt for a better college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are good, well-maintained, and air-conditioned, but there is no Wi-Fi which was promised at the time of joining. Canteen and mess are good. We also have sports facilities, but instruments are missing. I haven't used medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend taking admission in Indus University.
reviews.review_text: They have the best facilities. They have the best hostel in their segment. The hostel provides gym facilities, hygienic food, and playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Ahmedabad with the best placement.
reviews.review_text: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recrea...

reviews.review_heading: For education purposes, this is basically our Indus College.
reviews.review_text: We have a college in the Racharda area, and all people come from home, hostel, and also PG students here. They come to study from outside the city and country. They really love the college, and the hostel is too good. There are two or three sharing rooms in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and very friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure, the canteen, etc. The security is also awesome, and most importantly, there is no ragging at all. All students are very nice and humble. The atmosphere for freshers is very good and trustworthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with the poor faculty, fake placements, and average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are nice and well-maintained. There is no Wi-Fi for personal use, and it has only limited access for official work. The library is also decent. Hostel rooms are average. Food in a mess is sometimes tasty and sometimes not. I never saw a medical room in my college, so I do not have an idea about it. Sports facilities are great.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and a balanced campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our computer science department is well-equipped with modern labs. It has high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a central library with access to journals and e-resources. Hostel provides decent rooms with basic amenities, 24/7 water and electricity and Wi-Fi. Mess food is average but hygienic with a variety of vegetarian options. Campus also includes medical facilities with a visiting doctor. It also has good good sports infrastructure including cricket, football ground and indoor games like ta...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities with active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and a good library are available. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. Mess food is average; canteens offer better variety. The medical room is active 24/7, and sports facilities like gym, playground, and courts are available.

reviews.review_heading: From campus to career: Life at Indus University
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Indus University, especially for the B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering department, is quite robust and student-friendly. The department is equipped with state-of-the-art computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, and smart classrooms with projectors and modern seating arrangements. The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. The rooms are generally clean and furnished with basic amenities like a study table, chair, cupboard, and fans. The hostel bu...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a balanced campus life with growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good infrastructure, with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, with basic amenities like laundry, security, and study areas are provided. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and placement opportunities in core sectors.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available for students Wi-Fi, full AC classrooms, library, etc. Best quality hostel facilities are provided to students, and the best quality of food is available in mess and canteen. They even provide medical facilities, and all types of sports and games are there.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, supportive faculty, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. It offers clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and 24x7 security. The mess provides hygienic vegetarian food, and the taste is average. The canteen offers snacks and fast food. Medical care is available on campus with doctors and emergency support. Sports like cricket, football, and badminton are encouraged, with regular tournaments and well-maintained grounds for students to stay active and healthy throughout their academic life.

reviews.review_heading: In 2025, the college is justifying with fee totally. It has the best return on investment so far.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good and facilities are also good. There are various labs and good infrastructure for overall practicals. The library is fine not that good and not that bad. Hostel rooms are okay, but the food is very delicious at affordable rates. Apart from this, Indus University has a very good infrastructure for sports. It has a basketball court, football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Tech. in Cyber Security course at Indus University.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like labs, canteen, and sports are pretty good. There are some negative points like there is not much place to sit around on campus during free lectures or lunch breaks. It is a small campus and the classrooms are also bearable.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and it is good for study.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is very huge. There are many aircraft on campus, one airplane at the campus, an entrance by helicopter, and JET planet behind the main building our parking slots are very huge. We have grounds to play activities like basketball and pickleball ground.

data.description: Mess food is sometimes good sometimes average, I would say learn cooking for one meal beacause maybe what they made for lunch or dinner you don't eat that or don't like that.  They serve food three times a day. The canteen also serves good food.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best design college in Kolkata, and I am very happy for being a part of this college.

review_content.Placements: Since I am still pursuing my course (masters in fashion designing and technology), so I don't know proper information about placements. However, our institute provides 100% training and placement assistance from more than 30 training and placement partners and makes students industry-ready. So, I am sure if I give my 100% and work hard, then our institute definitely will provide me with good placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our institute is really good, and there are air-conditioned classrooms. Our institute is well maintained with modern technology and equipment. faqs.question: Q: Is INSD Kolkata a good institute to pursue MBA?

faqs.answer: Yes, INSD Kolkata is approved by UGC. The postgraduate courses at INSD Kolkata are approved by Himalayan Garhwal University. The institute was established in 2011. individual_reviews.course: Advance Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A fun campus life and good facilities .

content.Placements: They do offer internships to you; if you're capable and able to crack interviews by firms that are introduced to you, you will definitely get internship opportunities. Interviews are held on campus only so you don't have to visit somewhere else. You can definitely go to this institution.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are nice, I would say. As an interior design student, we don't need many facilities. Just the basic needs and they are there. But for fashion design students, sewing machines and everything else are there. For us, we need to carry our own laptop, as we have to work on that only.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The journey in this college is beautiful.

content.Placements: I'm in an advanced diploma course that doesn't provide placement. But students are offered internships and training under good brands like Mark's and Spencer's, Benetton, PC Chandra, Fashion L, etc. Currently, I am pursuing the course, and I am looking forward to getting trained under good companies.
content.Infrastructure: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, sewing machines as required by students. There is also a small library. Hostel or canteen facilities are not available. Classrooms are spacious and beautifully decorated as it is a fashion college. Only vegetarian food is served on the campus.

individual_reviews.title: I am totally satisfied with the college and course, and the faculty members are very great.

admission_overview.college_name: INSD Kolkata Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: International School of Design, Kolkata Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: INSD Kolkata admission process 2025ismerit-based. International School of Design (INSD), Kolkata is a private institute offeringUG, PG, advanceddiploma, and diploma courses in the field ofFashion Designing. The institute offersfull-timeandshort-termcourses as well. INSD Kolkata admission to any of the courses is based on candidates' merit scores in the qualifying examination. Registrations for admission to theINSD Kolkataare available bothonline and offline.

International School of Design admission is conducted in online and offline modes. Admission to all the courses is merit-based and candidates are required to meet the minimum eligibility criteria before applying to a course. INSD’s admissions arehighly competitivewith limited seats and candidates are advised to apply early to secure the seat.
The table below presents the eligibility criteria for some of theINSD Kolkata courses:
Eligibility Criteria
Class 12 from a recognised board
Merit-based
Graduation from a recognised institute/ university
-UG Diploma
-After Class 10 Diploma
Class 10 from a recognised board
Note:The information mentioned above is collated from various internet sources. Hence, it is indicative.

International School of Design tuition fee ranges betweenINR 3 lakh to INR 4.24 lakhfor UG and PG courses. While diploma and certificate courses cost between INR 56,000 to INR 2.4 lakh. Students can pay the fee yearly or semester-wise depending on the course requirements, there are a few components that are paid only once, such as a one-time fee.Registrationand Prospectus fees areINR 21,500. faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, International School of Design at Kolkata began its operations from the year 2011. This institution specializes in giving education in design of three streams namely fashion design graphic design and interior design. To help students it offers various courses with various criterias. For example, from certificate courses, diplomas, advanced diplomas, graduation to post graduation courses in design. The duration of these courses also vary from 6 months to 4 years. Obviously the fees for each of these courses also varies depending on the duration as well as what the contents of the course. The fees for different courses in this Institute vary from about rupees 50000 to about rupees 4 lakhs. Institution also offers scholarships based on the needs of the students. This institution also offers the facility of paying tuition fees in installments to help students. Best wishes to you.

faqs.question: What is the fee for PG courses at International School of Design, Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Fees for the PG programme is 9 Lacs approximately .there is scholarship is Course Fees Action M Des -INR 82,836 (1st Yr Fees) Advanced Diploma -Rs.1.43 Lakhs (Total Fees) M.Des -Rs.84,960 (1st Yr Fees) MLBM- Rs.3 Lakhs (Total Fees)

hostel_campus.college_name: INSD Kolkata Infrastructure Details & Reviews

labs.description: Available Facilities: CAD Designing Lab, Designing Lab, Fashion Lab, Conference Lab

reviews.review_heading: A fun campus life and good facilities .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are nice, I would say. As an interior design student, we don't need many facilities. Just the basic needs and they are there. But for fashion design students, sewing machines and everything else are there. For us, we need to carry our own laptop, as we have to work on that only.

reviews.review_heading: The journey in this college is beautiful.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, sewing machines as required by students. There is also a small library. Hostel or canteen facilities are not available. Classrooms are spacious and beautifully decorated as it is a fashion college. Only vegetarian food is served on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best design college in Kolkata, and I am very happy for being a part of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our institute is really good, and there are air-conditioned classrooms. Our institute is well maintained with modern technology and equipment. Students will get all the facilities which they would need. Right now, we are attending online classes. I am waiting for the situation to get better, so the institute will conduct offline classes as before.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure and facilities. Teachers are very good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities of the institution are good. Classrooms are well-equipped with all the materials which are needed for classes. There is no hostel or mess on the college campus. Now due to the covid situation, online classes are going on.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with the college and course, and the faculty members are very great.
reviews.review_text: In INSD, we have a very good and peaceful environment. We have free Wi-Fi in our college. We have air-conditioned laboratories, and we have stitching machines, mannequins etc. We have medical facilities and a canteen, and they are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Our institute help us to make our dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: Our institute gives us all kind of facilities. We have classrooms for fashion designing and everything we want is available in our institute. They take us for industrial surveys to make us ready for industries. They take us to different events where we learn many things.

reviews.review_heading: The exposure, the knowledge and the activities provided here are worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good here, and all the classrooms are neat and clean. All the facilities required for every department are available in their respective classrooms. For fashion designing, all the required things are available. So, it is really convenient to work and study.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good teaching quality, friendly faculty members and satisfactory placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite satisfactory, which includes different classrooms for different courses with AC, computer labs, and a medical room. All the equipment required for learning is available. The environment is friendly. Events and games are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: This college is new, but it is growing and will surely be the best in all fields.
reviews.review_text: As the classes are conducting online, we really didn't get any opportunity to get the facilities of the course or department. However, we will surely get them when offline classes start as the management and faculty members are nice. Our institute doesn't have any hostel or mess, but they made sure that every student who comes from other places will get the right place to stay. It provides them with a list of paying guests.

reviews.review_heading: INSD Kolkata is the best institute with friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a perfect environment and a perfect infrastructure. There are different classrooms for different courses. We have computer labs and air-conditioned classrooms. They also arrange some games and events.

reviews.review_heading: Best institute for designing.
reviews.review_text: It's very spacious. Infrastructure is quite good. The crowd is really good. All the materials necessary for Jewellery designing are always available. The rooms are quite big. The washroom is neat and tidy. We have separate room for CAD designing with the latest technologies available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities with the best teachers guidance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college has modern approach. The campus is fully air conditioned with Wi-Fi facility and practical labs. Our college doesn't have a library but teachers provide different books to go through. Hostel facilities are not available but college guide us with the same.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities with best teachers guidance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure has a modern approach.the campus is fully air conditioned with wifi facility and practical labs. Our college doesn't have a library but teachers provide many  different books to go through. Hostel facilities are not available bt the college guide us with the same

reviews.review_heading: I am happy with our institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of INSD is well maintained. There are air-conditioned classrooms, and practical labs are well equipped. Wi-Fi facility is available on our campus. Our college provides relevant kits for the courses.

reviews.review_heading: It's provided grt education and learning environment with vast knowledge.
reviews.review_text: International School of Design provided different classroom for different courses. International school of design have one cad room or computer room. Pantry also available in this institute. AC attached with every clsss rooms. International school of design provides educational environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Multimedia - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Given a good amount of placements in 2024, really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Most of my seniors have been placed in my course. The lowest package was around 1,50,000 per year, and the maximum was 24,00,000 per annum. Most of them get internships from my course. Some of them are going to animation companies. The top roles offered in my course are animator, graphic designer, video editor, cinematographer, director, story writer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All my department labs are totally connected with Wi-Fi in the world university. The Wi-Fi connection is very good. Classes are well-maintained and totally furnished. The library has a lot of books. The hostel quality is also good. It is in a good area. The food quality is also nice. Even hostels have their own medical area, sports area, and indoor games. There is also a gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides very good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not provided in our course till now because the first batch has not passed out yet. This course was introduced in our college in 2018. The roles offered in our course are UI/UX designer, graphic designer, creative director, advertising, publication designer, technical writer, brand management, industrial design, illustrator, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of all the departments in our college is good. Classrooms are spacious. It has 3 libraries. It provides free Wi-Fi. Hostel food, medical facilities, and sports and games are very good. Co-curricular activities are very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Real college student life.

review_content.Placements: The batch includes a total of 55 students. The highest package so far a senior has gotten is 7 LPA. Top roles offered are communication designer, graphic designer, UI/UX designer, etc. There have been roles like marketing manager as well this course has a lot to offer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good and just the hostel timings and rules are a bit overboard where the curfew is 7:00 PM. They don't allow you to wear shorts in canteen and games are available like badminton, basketball, carrom, chess, volleyball, etc. The wardens are pretty strict about North Indians and South Indians, where they favor South Indians.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Game Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This place has one of the best infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90%of students were placed the highest package was one Lacs fifty thousand per month and the lowest was seventy thousand per month Yes there are a lot of companies recruiting like ubisoft and ea sports and there a lot of indie companies recruiting.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is one of the best and of your there is Wi-Fi there a library but you won't get time to visit it coz of the course you chosen the quality of staff is to notch these are a lot of food places which you can visit such a subways and hatti kappi.

admission_overview.college_name: School of Design Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_process.title: School of Design, Presidency University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: School of Design, Presidency University admission 2025is open. The institute offers BSc and BDes courses at undergraduate levels.School of Design, Presidency Universityadmissions are both merit and entrance-based. For the BSc course, students are accepted on merit, while admissions to the BDes programme are based on the valid score obtained in UCEED. Presidency University also conducts its entrance test for admissions to its programmes. The institute is an integral part ofPresidency University.

School of Design, Presidency University admissions are currently ongoing. The institute offers BDes and BSc programmes in the field of Design, The courses are offered in regular mode. Find below the key highlights forSchool of Design, Presidency University admissions 2025:
School of Design, Presidency University Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
2 (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Download Brochure

School of Design is part of Presidency University and provides undergraduate degree in BDes and BSc courses across several specialisations. Students need to appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university followed by a Studio test and subsequent interviews for BDes course. Check the below-mentioned table to know aboutSchool of Design, Presidency University eligibility & selection criteria:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 40% from a recognised board
Merit-based
Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% in case of reserved categories) from a recognised board
Know more aboutSchool of Design, Presidency Unviersity courses.
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

School of Design, Presidency University admissionsare offered based on both entrance and merit secured by applicants in their most recent qualifying exam. To be eligible for a seat, candidates must complete all of the course's selection rounds. The eligible candidates can refer to the below-mentioned steps for theadmission process of School of Design, Presidency University:

Step 1: School of Design, Presidency University Application Process:Visit the official website of School of Design, Presidency University and register yourself. Fill out the application form, select the desired programme, and proceed with the payment of the application fee to successfully submit the application form. Candidates must also submit a Statement of Purpose along with the application form.
Step 2: School of Design, Presidency University Selection Process

The selection process for the BDes programme offered at the School of Design requires the candidates to clear the PUDET or UCEED entrance exam followed by appearing for the Studio Test and Interview for final selection. For the BSc course, applicants will be shortlisted based on merit secured by them in Class 12 or its equivalent exam. Shortlisted candidates will be sent an "Admission Letter" or a request for additional tests via email.

Step 3: School of Design, Presidency University Fee Payment and Admission ConfirmationStudents will be sent an official offer letter via courier. The shortlisted candidates will be accepted into the programme once they have paid the course fee and submitted the specified documents.

courses_data.name: School of Design, Presidency University, Bangalore B.Des Admission 2025
courses_data.description: B.Des at School of Design, Presidency University, Bangalore is a 4 years UG course in the field of Design. See below the eligibility for School of Design, Presidency University, Bangalore B.Des:

faqs.question: Who can apply for BDes at School of Design, Presidency University?
faqs.answer: Those who have successfully completed their Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board, can apply for the BDes programme at School of Design, Presidency University. However, the selection criteria is clearing the entrance exam, studio test and interview. The institute will shortlist the candidates on the basis of score obtained by them in the entrance tests.

faqs.question: What BDes specialisations does School of Design, Presidency University?
faqs.answer: At School of Design, Presidency University, students can pursue BDes across several specialisations. The institute offers the following specialisations:BDes in Fashion DesignBDes in Communication DesignBDes in Game DesignBDes in Product DesignBDes in Space Design

courses_data.name: School of Design, Presidency University, Bangalore B.Sc. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: School of Design, Presidency University, Bangalore B.Sc.is offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.Sc. programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 3 years programme.

faqs.question: Does School of Design, Presidency University offer BSc?
faqs.answer: Yes, School of Design, Presidency University offers a three-yearsBachelor's degree in Bachelor of Science. The institute offers the programme inMultimedia. Interested candidates who have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination can visit the official website of the institute to apply for the programme online by filling out the application form and completing the admission process.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in BSc at School of Design, Presidency University?
faqs.answer: Admissions to the BSc in Multimedia programme offered at School of Design, Presidency University are done on the basis of merit secured by the candidates in the last qualifying exam, i.e. Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 40% from a recognised board. The candidates will be shortlisted onmerit basisonly.

courses_data.name: Ph.D. Admissions 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:ICMR JRF, UGC NET, CSIR NET, ASRB ICAR NET

faqs.question: Is School of Design, Presidency University admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, School of Design, Presidency University admission 2025 is open. The institute offers undergraduate degrees in BDes and BSc programmes to the students. Interested candidates who satisfy the eligiblity criteria stated by the institute can visit the official website of Presidency University directly or the website of School of Design, Presidency University to apply for the desired programme online.

faqs.question: Is admission at School of Design, Presidency University entrance or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Admissions to the School of Design, Presidency University is bothmeritandentrance-based. The institute offers BSc and BDes prgorammes at undergraduate level. Those seeking admissions in the BSc prgoramme will be shortlisted on the basis of merit secured by them in Class 12, while for the BDes course, the applicants need to clear the entrance exam, appear for the studio test and a round of interview. The university conducts its entrance test calledPUDET, however, those with a valid score in national and state-level entrance tests such asUCEEDwill also be accepted.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at School of Design, Presidency University?
faqs.answer: At School of Design, Presidency University Bangalore, students can pursue a three-year undergraduate degree inBSc in Multimedia (VXF, SFX and Gaming)and a four-year undergraduate degree inBDesacross several specialisations such asBDes in Fashion Design,Comunication Designand more. Interested candidates who fulfil the eligiblity can visit the official website of the institute to apply for the desired course online.

college_info.college_name: MKSSS' School of Fashion Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
School of Fashion Technology (SOFT), Pune was founded in 1998 under the aegis of old Maharshi Karve Stree Shikshan Samstha (MKSSS). It is one of the premier schools imparting education in the stream of Fashion and is located in Pune. The school is affiliated to was ranked 12 and 13 for Fashion Design by the Week 2020 and Outlook 2019. SOFT is affiliated to SNDT Women’s University, Mumbai and offers several courses in the areas of Fashion Design, Technology, Production, Merchandising, Communication, Textile Design and Sustainable Fashion. The faculty memebrs at SOFT are highly qualified and experts from the industry. They train the students and prepares them for a promising future by equipping their minds with creativity, intellect and confidence.

To provide exposure to the students, SOFT invites professionals on a regular basis from the relevant companies. It encourages students to seek and maintain links with the industry experts for a better understanding. It also conducts several lecturers and seminars by the industry experts to enhance the dimensions of design along with the technical awareness for both the students as well as the faculty members.

SOFT is equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure, including a computer centre, resource centre, library, an auditorium and a health club. The school also offers hostel facilities to the students. The school has several collaborations which are presented below:

A few of the quick facts regarding SOFT Pune are tabulated below:

Read more: SOFT Pune Student Reviews

Admission process of SOFT Pune is conducted through its official website. Aspirants willing to take admission are required to apply online through the official website of SOFT. Some of the fast facts related to NIFT admission process are listed below:

Read more: SOFT Pune Admission Process

SOFT Pune offers nine progammes at the UG, PG, PG diploma and diploma level. These programmes include Bachelor of Design (BDes), Master of Design (MDes), PG diploma in Fashion Design & Merchandising. The duration of BDes programme is two years, whereas MDes and PG diploma in Fashion Design & Merchandising programmes are offered for two years each. Addtionally, the school offers UG diploma programmes in association with Pearson Business & Technology Education Council (BTEC). The below table contains an overview of popular SOFT Pune courses along with the minimum eligibility criteria and total fees:

Read more: SOFT Pune Courses and Fees

With the help of its central placement cell, SOFT Pune offers both interships as well as placements opportunities to the students by inviting top organisations every year. It conducts pre-placement interactions, Group Discussion and Personal Interview (GD/ PI) rounds for the students. Some of the recurring recruiters of SOFT Pune are Tommy Hilfiger, Calvin Klein, and Van Heusen, etc.

Read more: SOFT Pune Placements

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good but can be improved.

review_content.Placements: Every student in our college gets placed. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are AND, Biba, etc. More than 80% of students get internships. Fashion designers, fashion communication, textile design, jewellery design, and fashion management are the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good but the check-in timings are a bit early. Facilities are good and can be improved, as sometimes we face issues with food, water, and others.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: This is a nice place to study.

review_content.Placements: There is no exact amount of placement but according to your work you will get the placement so basically work hard on your portfolio and present it well and you'll be placed. That's all you have to do for getting a better placement. You'll get enough possibilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have good machines plus you will never face the lockage of machines Computers are available mostly. Library have so many books for the one who wants to stay there and read it's a perfect place well organized. Wi-Fi is available always at the campus for each student.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Jewellery Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for learning art .

review_content.Placements: Almost 50-60%students get placed. The lowest package offered is 2 -3 Lacs. The companies such as Pantaloons, wills lifestyle, arvind textile come to the college for placement. The students also get internships from companies to learn the industrial insights. Roles are offered according to the course studied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a huge campus. The college is surrounded by green ambience all over. Classrooms are spacious. The college has an auditorium for any cultural programme or college fest. The hostel of the college is neat and clean. The food served is completely vegetarian.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Communication - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college offers a friendly environment and a large variety of academic courses.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't assure placements. However, they provided internship opportunities as per the student's interest. The college provides you with opportunities which will help you build a resume. They will guide you which will help you during the interviews. Placements for our batch were okay.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not that huge. There are well-equipped labs for stitching and sewing. Even there is a computer lab for fashion communications. They recently provided a handloom for a textile design course. They are expanding the campus area. The quality of the food served in the canteen is very good, and it is also yummy. There were no issues regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college follows a really good education pattern.

review_content.Placements: The college does help during internships and placements if a student asks for it. They do have a placement cell that works for only retail brands. The placement department helps one to analyze the field of interest and lets them reach through the right contact.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is really good. The machines are new, and dummies are in the right condition. We have 4 sewing labs, 4 computer labs with all the required software, 4 pattern making labs, 3 tracing tables, 3 exhibition halls, 4 textile labs, and a library. It has everything which a design student needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: All in all, a good place for you to start your journey.

review_content.Placements: They do not guarantee placements but provide internship of the students choice. Placements are given to rank holders and you have to fend for yourself. They give opportunities which will help you build your resume and during job interviews. They'll guide you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is not that huge but they have well-equipped practical labs for sewing and stitching. Also they have huge computer labs for software integrated courses like fashion communication. They recently bought a handloom for the textile design course. They are recently expanding their campus.

hostel_campus.college_name: SOFT

hostel.description: The institution has its hostel, for girl students, with a capacity of around 300 girls. There is triple sharing room accommodation with facilities like attached toilet & bathroom, 24 hours security personnel and CCTV cameras, 24 hours solar water, medical room & doctor on call, wi-fi internet facility, gymnasium and landline service in the rooms for receiving call, washing machine facility, good quality food and bus facility on Saturday & Sunday from Narhe campus to Karve Nagar campus and back.

library.description: The college library has 3550 books, 3059 titles, 213 reference books, 09 newspapers, 181 book CD's, 920 internship reports, 35 magazines & journals, 100 forecast, 100 craft documentation and 2492 old periodicals. It also has British Library membership.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Jogging Track, Baseball Court, Volleyball Court, Cricket, Athletics, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, Badminton, Table Tennis, Yoga

reviews.review_heading: Good curriculum and qualified professionals but disappointing as there are no placements.
